title: Life Insurance Cold Caller
description:
Welcome to Americapreneur Financial. 



We are a life insurance agency out of California. We are looking for cold call reps to call clients daily Monday - Friday 9:00am PST - 5:00PM PST. Your job will be to call clients who inquired about life insurance and you will ask questions to prequalify them. You will be in charge of asking medical questions, type of policy they are looking for, budget, etc. Once you prequalify them you will be passing the lead over to an agent who will be contacting the client. 



We will be starting you at $5.00 an hour and have the potential to move up to $7.50 per hour once you show us that you are good on the phone. We need a calling representative from 9:00am - 10:00am PST time Monday - Friday. You must have experience calling clients who are inquiry about life insurance already. 



In order for us to consider you please
 us a recording of yourself and your resume at 
 make sure to send a recording of you calling our clients.



Here is the script we use to qualify:



JR BROKER SCRIPT:





Agent: Hi (Client) this is (Your name) with the Final Expense Life Insurance program, How are you doing today? 



Agent: The reason for the call is I see at one point of time you explored some interest in getting discounted coverage for final expense? Does that ring a bell? 



Agent: Okay perfect, Just to make sure I am talking to the right person I have your DOB as (date),
 as 
), and you are residing in the state of (state), is that correct? 



Agent: So look (client name) the process is very simple, on this call we are going to establish the coverage amount you are hoping to get set up with, I am going to ask you a few medical questions to understand your health, and then if it makes sense for you and your budget we will submit an application on your behalf today with our underwriting team, sounds fair? 



Agent: Perfect, so (Client name) how much in coverage were you looking to actually get, typically the clients we work with want to get anywhere from $10-15 thousand, were you looking to be in that range or were you looking to get more coverage than that?



Agent: Thank you for letting me know, so the way these programs work is they go based off your age, health, and budget. For the amount of coverage you are looking to get, what is a comfortable range you feel you can keep up with on a monthly basis without breaking the bank? $100-$150, $150-$200, $200 - $300, which one?



Agent: Okay perfect, thank you for that information. If we are able to get you approved today would you be okay with the life insurance carrier drafting that monthly amount today so you are covered immediately? (start application)







Agent: Okay perfect  let me ask you a couple medical questions, once we are done here I will send it over to the underwriting team to get you an approval as soon as today.

*When asking medical questions, dig in depth, also build rapport and have sympathy. You are asking very personal questions*



1.) Do you have any history of high blood pressure? 

2.) Do you have any history of smoking? When was the last time you smoked? Is it in your medical profile? 

3.) Have you had a stroke recently?

4.) Any heart conditions of any sort? Anything in your medical profile?

5.) Any history of COPD?

6.) Any diabetes? If so, what type? How long?

7.) Any history of cancer?

8.) SSN

9.) Drivers license number 



Agent: Amazing thank you for all this information when is the best time our underwriting team can call you back to go over your application?



Agent: Perfect, we will be reaching to you shortly to get this application started.

title: Ghostwriter / Story Development Assistant for Powerful Memoir
description:
I am looking for a talented, intelligent, emotionally aware writer from the Philippines to help me turn one of the most powerful life stories imaginable into a professionally written book.



This is not ordinary writing work.



This is the true story of a man who was wrongfully convicted, sent to death row as a teenager, survived years inside one of America’s harshest prison systems, was later exonerated, and is now rebuilding life as a father raising his sons while traveling across America in an RV in search of healing, freedom, and purpose.



I need someone who can help organize memories, conduct interviews, structure chapters, shape scenes, preserve my voice, and turn raw truth into a compelling memoir.



About Me / The Story



My name is Shareef Cousin.



I became the youngest person exonerated from death row in America.



As a teenager, I was sentenced to die for a crime I did not commit. I lived through years of fear, isolation, trauma, and survival while surrounded by executions, violence, and a justice system that failed me.



Eventually, I was freed.



But release from prison did not automatically mean freedom.



This book explores:



* What it means to lose your youth to wrongful conviction

* Surviving death row as a child among grown men

* Watching others be executed

* Trauma after release

* Learning fatherhood after survival mode

* Rebuilding identity after injustice

* Traveling America with my sons in an RV searching for healing

* Freedom, masculinity, race, justice, and redemption

* What prison tried to kill that life could not



This is a story of pain, truth, growth, humor, resilience, and becoming whole.



What I Need Help With



* Interviewing me by Zoom / WhatsApp / voice notes

* Turning stories into chapters

* Organizing timeline of life events

* Helping create chapter outlines

* Writing clean drafts in my voice

* Editing for emotional impact and readability

* Helping prepare manuscript for publishing or agents

* Managing files and notes professionally



Ideal Candidate



* Excellent written English

* Strong storytelling ability

* Experience writing memoirs, biographies, documentaries, or life stories

* Emotionally intelligent and respectful with trauma-based material

* Organized and dependable

* Able to capture someone else’s authentic voice

* Comfortable asking thoughtful interview questions

* Long-term mindset



Preferred but Not Required



* Journalism background

* Book ghostwriting samples

* True crime / justice reform interest

* Documentary storytelling instincts



To Apply



Please send:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Why this project interests you

3. Writing samples (memoir, biography, storytelling preferred)

4. Your hourly rate

5. The word: FREEDOM in your application so I know you read this

title: Devloper
description:
Application & Software Developer (Right-Hand Role)



We’re looking for more than just a developer—we’re looking for a right-hand partner in building and scaling software inside a growing company.



This role sits close to leadership. You’ll be directly involved in shaping, building, and improving multiple projects across our ecosystem—from internal tools and automation workflows to customer-facing platforms.



We’re a startup, which means two things:



You’ll have real influence on how systems are built

You’ll grow with us as we scale

What You’ll Be Doing

Collaborating directly with me to turn ideas into functional systems

Building, testing, and improving web apps, tools, and integrations

Helping architect workflows across platforms (Wix, Shopify, APIs, AI tools, etc.)

Identifying better, faster ways to execute and automate processes

Acting as a technical sounding board for decisions and future builds

Who This Is For

Someone who wants to build, not just complete tasks

A developer who thinks in systems, not just code

Someone comfortable working in a fast-moving, evolving environment

A person who values ownership, communication, and reliability

Someone who wants to grow into a key role, not stay in the background

What Matters Most



We’re building a team where no single person stands above the rest—but everyone performs at a high level.

If you take ownership, communicate clearly, and care about the outcome, you’ll fit here.



Growth Opportunity



This is not a static role. If it’s a strong fit, this position evolves into a core leadership function on the technical side of the company.



Hi, my name is Jordan, and I’m the owner of Casper Buzz Media Group.



I want to be transparent about why I’m here. With the advancement of tools like OpenClaw, I could automate a large portion of the work typically handled by virtual assistants. But what I cannot automate—and what I never will—is human connection.



At the core of what I’m building is something bigger than tasks or output. It’s about people. It’s about creating opportunities, supporting others, and building something meaningful that connects communities—both locally and globally.



I strongly believe in acting with intention and integrity—doing what’s right, even when it’s not the easiest path. That mindset has shaped how I’ve built this company, and it’s exactly how I intend to grow it moving forward.



Now, I’m in a position where I can bring others along for that journey. I’m not looking to just “hire help.” I’m building a team—one that grows together, supports each other, and operates at a level where no single person stands above the rest.



My goal is simple: build something strong enough that no one can easily point to who the leader is—only that the team itself is exceptional.



If that kind of environment excites you, I look forward to connecting and seeing if we’re the right fit.

title: Senior Real Estate Admin (Transactions and Property Management)
description:
Hey, my name is John Lee. I’m a Realtor and real estate investor based in the Philadelphia area.



Here’s a quick look at what I do: 



I’m looking for a strong admin to help me with transaction coordination, property management, and client communication. The goal is simple. I need someone who can take ownership of the backend so I can stay focused on high value work like prospecting and building relationships.



This role includes

Managing transactions from contract to close

Coordinating with agents, lenders, and title

Following up with clients and keeping communication tight

Handling tenant communication, maintenance requests, and rent collection

Keeping systems organized like CRM, files, and timelines



You will also be on the phone. Calling clients, building relationships, and handling tenant conversations. Some of these will be easy. Some will not. You need to be able to communicate clearly, build trust, and handle difficult people when needed. Knowing when to be firm and when to be understanding is important.



The three core skills I’m focused on are speaking English, transaction coordination, and problem solving.

Speaking English because you’ll be on calls and communication has to be clear and confident.

Transaction coordination because deals need to move and stay on track without me chasing details.

Problem solving because I need someone who can think for themselves and not just wait to be told what to do.



Communication matters a lot to me. You need to be extremely fluent in English and understand American culture. You should be comfortable talking to clients, tenants, and vendors without hesitation.



I’m not looking for someone who just waits for instructions. I want someone who thinks, solves problems, takes initiative, and is willing to take the lead when needed.



Ideally, you have experience with U.S. real estate transactions and property management and understand the full process from contract to close and beyond.



Before applying, please send a short video explaining why you’d be a good fit for this role and attach your DISC profile to 



If this sounds like you, send me a message with your experience and how you like to work.

title: Loan Data Analyst - BIZCORE EXPERIENCE REQUIRED
description:
About the Role

We are an Australian-based private lender looking for a detail-oriented Loan Data Analyst to support our credit team. You will play a key role in preparing and organising customer financial data to assist our assessors in making responsible lending decisions.



Ideally we need applicants with experience using Bizcore Loan Management System.





Key Responsibilities

• Review and organise customer bank transaction data (last 90 days)

• Categorise income, expenses, and liabilities accurately

• Identify key financial behaviours (e.g. gambling, BNPL, payday loans, overdrafts)

• Prepare clean, structured summaries for credit assessors

• Flag inconsistencies or missing information for further review

• Maintain strict data handling and privacy standards at all times







What We’re Looking For

• Experience working with bank transaction data, financial data, or lending/fintech platforms

• Strong attention to detail and ability to spot patterns or anomalies

• Experience categorising transactions (manual or via tools)

• Understanding of personal finance (income vs expenses, liabilities, etc.)

• Ability to follow structured processes and compliance requirements

• Excellent English communication skills



?



Important – Privacy & Data Handling

You will be working with sensitive financial data. All work must be completed in line with strict privacy and confidentiality requirements. No customer data is to be stored, shared, or used outside of the platform.



?



Application Requirement (Important)

As part of your application, please provide examples of how you have previously categorised bank transaction data, ensuring:

• All personal information is removed or anonymised

• No real customer names, account numbers, or identifiable details are included

• Examples clearly show how transactions were grouped (e.g. income, rent, utilities, gambling, BNPL, discretionary spending)







Why Join Us?

• Work with a fast-growing Australian lender

• Be part of a scalable, tech-driven lending model

• Long-term opportunity with growth potential

title: Affiliate Manager (Independent Contractor)
description:
Position Overview



Shop Super Discounts is an online e-commerce store selling men's and women's clothing with free USPS shipping and discounts from 10% to 90% off. We are looking for an Affiliate Manager to recruit and manage affiliate marketers who will promote our products to customers within the United States only.



This is a work-from-home position. You choose your own days and hours.



---



What You Will Be Doing



· Recruiting affiliate marketers to join the Shop Super Discounts affiliate program

· Recommending affiliates for approval to join the program

· Coordinating with your team of affiliates by providing tips, suggestions, and encouragement

· Communicating with active affiliates by
 for all important matters (pay, rates, approvals, etc.)

· Ensuring affiliates understand program rules and commission structure

· Reporting any issues, concerns, or technical problems directly to Shop Super Discounts



---



What You Will NOT Be Doing



You are not an employee. You are an independent contractor. You will not be:



· Required to work specific days or hours

· Required to track or report your time

· Told how to recruit affiliates

· Required to set quotas or minimum posts for affiliates

· Responsible for paying affiliates (Shop Super Discounts handles all payments)

· Allowed to change commission rates or terminate affiliates



---



Compensation Structure



· Weekly base budget: $120 (based on 40 hours of weekly availability at $3/hour)

· Performance bonus: 10% commission on sales generated by affiliates you recruit, paid after you meet the recommended on-target sales of $600 per week

· Payment method: PayPal

· Payout schedule: Weekly budget paid every Friday. Bonus payouts may be daily, weekly, or monthly

· Minimum guarantee: You will receive at least $120 per week. If affiliate commissions are less than $120, Shop Super Discounts adds the difference



---



Requirements



· Must have an active PayPal account

· Must have reliable
 for formal communications

· Must be comfortable using UpPromote (affiliate tracking app)

· Must speak and write professional English

· Must have a device (laptop, desktop, tablet, or phone) with internet access

· Must be located in the Philippines







How to Apply



Apply here:

title: Outdoor Youtube Video Editor needed!
description:
I’m looking for a video editor for a YouTube channel focused on outdoor content (Flying Airplanes, Overnight Camping, Fishing, Cooking, Hiking, and Nature in Alaska). Each episode is built from 3-7 hours of multi-camera footage and needs to become an 18-25-minute film that feels immersive, unhurried, and  will be almost entirely word-free.



If you love outdoor storytelling through a video and can transform hours of mostly raw wilderness footage into a calm, polished viewing experience, I’d love to hear from you. Looking for a good working relationship that is willing to be hired full time.  To start I have multiple raw files need to be converted to that 18-25 minute film. 

After this we will have content every couple weeks needed to edit so good communication and reliability are essential. Examples of Youtube videos I’m looking for. 




  


 





What matters most to me is the first 5 Second HOOK in the video (Showcasing what happens in this episode).  Long for video(18-25-minute) with Clean cuts, well-timed ambient music blended with crisp natural sound.  No flashy transitions, speed-ramps, or effects—just a simple cinematic style that lets the scenery, being in the wild, do the storytelling. Youtube short teasers > 60 seconds to gain audiences build the channel pacing. Minimal to no Talking throughout all videos. 



Typical workflow

• Receive raw files (mostly 4K, multi cameras and drone).  

. From raw 3-7 hours of video and Build a coherent narrative that foregrounds the best action for the end result video.  Flying, camping 
nts, fishing, camp-fire, cooking, and sweeping landscape B-roll.  

• Occasional keyframe scaling edits, light color correction, stabilization, looking for consistent, natural look.  

• Layer ambient music and authentic location sound for a relaxing feel when traveling to destination or on scenery shots.  No Music in most on location shots.   

• Export a edit format to me for any additional fine tuning. Typical video desired length 18-25-minute 4K edit format near YouTube-ready master video plus, Hook Video and multiple short teasers to gain audiences build the channel with a  (?60 s) for YouTube Shorts.





To apply, please:  

Start your message with “OUTDOOR CINEMATIC YOUTUBE EDITOR”.  or I won’t consider your application.. 

Link to at least two portfolio pieces in a similar slow, atmospheric style showing transitions and multi camera angles. 

3.    State your rate per hour or long-form episode and per Short.

4.    Average turn around time on producing that desired 18-25 minute video with shorts and a hook video.

title: Administrative -customer service - sales - VA
description:
Administrative / Customer Service / Sales Virtual Assistant (Full-Time)



We are looking for a highly organized Administrative / Customer Service / Sales Virtual Assistant to help manage daily operations, customer communication, and scheduling for our security camera installation company.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys talking with customers, staying organized, solving problems, and helping a business grow.



You will play an important role in keeping our operations running smoothly while ensuring customers receive excellent service and fast responses.



This is a long-term opportunity with potential for growth as the company expands.



Work Schedule



Monday – Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Pacific Time)



You must be available during these hours.



Key Responsibilities

Customer Service



Handle incoming calls, texts, and
s from customers professionally and efficiently.



Answer questions about security camera systems, installation services, and scheduling consultations.



Maintain a friendly, helpful, and professional tone with every customer interaction.



Scheduling & Dispatching



Schedule site surveys, consultations, and installation appointments.



Manage the technician service calendar and optimize daily schedules.



Coordinate with technicians to ensure smooth daily operations.



Maintain and update our online booking system.



Administrative Support



Process invoices and payments.



Maintain organized digital records and files.



Assist with basic bookkeeping tasks.



Support general office operations and administrative tasks.



Customer Follow-Up & Reviews



Follow up with customers after installations are completed.



Ensure customer satisfaction.



Encourage customers to leave online reviews.



Help maintain a strong reputation for our business.



Sales Support



Respond to customer inquiries about security camera systems and installation services.



Assist with converting inquiries into scheduled consultations and installations.



Support sales efforts through customer communication and follow-ups.



Must Have Skills



Excellent English communication skills (minimal accent preferred)



Strong organization and multitasking abilities



Customer service experience



Ability to work independently and solve problems



Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive)



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working with security systems, IT services, or home service businesses



Basic bookkeeping experience



Experience coordinating team schedules





Sales experience or strong customer interaction skills



Friendly personality and strong people skills



Willingness to learn new skills and grow with the company



Compensation



Base Pay: $400 per month



This is a full-time position.



Trial Period



This role begins with a 1-month trial period to ensure we are a good fit for each other.



At the end of the trial period, performance will be reviewed and the position may transition into a long-term role.



Required Application Materials



To apply, please submit the following:



1. Resume

2. Cover Letter



Explain why you would be a great fit for this role and our team.



3. Video Submission (2–3 Minutes)



Your video should include:



• A brief introduction about yourself

• A role-play phone call with a potential customer asking about security camera installation services and pricing

• Your explanation of how you stay organized while managing multiple tasks



Short Skills Test (Required)



Please answer the following questions in your application.



Question 1 – Customer Service Scenario



A customer sends the following message:



"Hi, I'm interested in installing security cameras at my business. How much does it cost?"



Write the exact response you would send to this customer.



Your response should be professional, friendly, and focused on scheduling a consultation or estimate.



Question 2 – Organization Test



You receive the following at the same time:



• 3 phone calls

• 4 text messages

• 5
s from customers



Explain step-by-step how you would manage these tasks without missing anything.



Question 3 – Attention to Detail



To confirm that you carefully read this job description, include the phrase:



"Blue Ocean Scheduling"



at the top of your cover letter.



Also include the word "Reliable" in the last sentence of your cover letter.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Important



Applications without the required video submission will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone who is professional, reliable, organized, and ready to grow with our team.

title: [HIRING] Reddit VA – Content Posting for Creator
description:
Looking for a detail-oriented VA to manage Reddit posting for a professional content creator. This is a long-term role for someone who actually understands Reddit culture — not just someone who can copy/paste.

Download content from the model's
/Instagram using provided tools (no watermark)

Follow a daily posting schedule and track activity in a shared sheet

Learn and follow the rules of each subreddit to avoid removals/bans

Engage naturally — upvote, comment, browse — not just post and ghost

Use provided browser/proxy setup (antidetect browser + proxy supplied by us — no setup needed on your end)

Proven Reddit experience — you understand how the platform works

Attention to subreddit rules (we will test this)

Consistency — this is a daily role, not ad hoc

Good communication and daily reporting

Iphone 10+

Good internet connection

Warmed-up Reddit account(s) ready to use

Full subreddit list with notes on rules/posting style per sub

Content sourced and ready to post daily

Antidetect browser + proxy (just log in and go)

Posting guidelines and SOPs



To apply, send the followiing:  a written message explaining your Reddit experience and why you'd be good at this. Include past work experience/references if you have any. Include the word REDDIT2026 so I know you read this. Name 5 subreddits you'd post on for a big breasted female content creator and explain why. What's your daily availability and timezone. Applications who don't include these will not be considered.

title: Ecommerce Operations Assistant - Remote
description:
THRIVIN is building the uniform for disciplined women. We combine premium aesthetics with performance gymwear, creating products designed for women who train hard and expect more.



We launched 2 years ago and are scaling fast, 60+ people and growing. 



Our website is one of our most important assets. Every product, page and detail matters.



The Role

This is a newly created contractor role, built to support the scale we're operating at. You'll work remotely and own the day-to-day execution of our Shopify store with clear direction from our Senior Ecommerce Manager and Store Coordinator.



This role is right for someone who finds satisfaction in precision, takes pride in a clean and accurate site, and doesn't need to be managed to stay on top of things.



Rate: Hourly contractor rate shared on application review. 

Competitive for the scope of work.



What You'll Be Doing

Product & Catalogue Management

Upload and manage products in Shopify

Maintain accurate product data (titles, descriptions, pricing, variants, tags)

Execute product launches, drops and restocks



Content & Merchandising Execution



Build and update collection pages

Schedule homepage banners and site updates

Support campaign launches (sales, promos, new arrivals)



QA & Site Accuracy

Perform regular checks across PDPs, collections, cart and checkout

Ensure all product information and imagery is correct

Flag any issues or inconsistencies immediately



Operational Support

Execute tasks from the Ecommerce Manager and Store Coordinator

Maintain trackers and internal documentation

Support inventory-related updates (pre-orders, stock updates)



What We're Looking For

1–2 years experience in ecommerce

Strong, hands-on Shopify experience (non-negotiable)

Extremely detail-oriented and structured

Comfortable owning repetitive, execution focused work without close supervision

Strong sense of accountability you flag problems, you don't let them slide

Able to follow processes and meet deadlines consistently



Bonus if you:

Are confident in Google Sheets / Excel

If you are great with AI, Nano banano, highfielfd.

Great at vibe coding to make automations tools.

Have experience in fashion, activewear DTC brands



What Success Looks Like

Products are always live, accurate and on time

Zero errors across pricing, variants or product data

Campaigns and launches run smoothly

The site is consistently clean and high-performing



A Note on Growth

We're scaling quickly and this team is growing with us. We don't have a fixed path mapped out for this role yet — but we'd rather be honest about that than overpromise. What we can say is that people who perform here get visibility, and we promote from within when the right opportunity opens.



To Apply

Please include:



Your relevant ecommerce / Shopify experience

Tools you've worked with

A short note on how you approach accuracy and detail in your work

title: Remote Estimator - Construction / Home Building
description:
Mutti Homes is a residential home builder based in Edmonton, Canada. We’re looking for an experienced Construction Estimator with a strong civil engineering background to join our team remotely. You’ll be responsible for material takeoffs, cost estimating, and creating purchase orders for our residential projects. This is a long-term position with room to grow.

Key Details

• Full-Time, Remote (Work From Home)

• Must be available during Canadian Mountain Time (MST/MDT) business hours

• Salary: Competitive – based on experience

• Start: Immediately

What You’ll Do

• Perform detailed material takeoffs and quantity surveys from architectural and structural drawings for residential homes

• Prepare accurate cost estimates for new home builds including materials, labour, and subcontractor costs

• Create and manage Purchase Orders (POs) in JobTread and/or QuickBooks Online with zero-error quantity verification

• Review blueprints, specs, and engineering drawings to identify scope and pricing

• Coordinate with suppliers and subcontractors to obtain competitive pricing and quotes

• Track project budgets and flag cost variances to management

• Maintain organized records of estimates, POs, and vendor pricing in our project management system

• Support the Project Manager with scheduling, procurement, and project coordination as needed

Requirements

• Civil Engineering degree or equivalent technical background

• Minimum 5 years of construction estimating experience (non-negotiable)

• Residential construction experience – must understand home building scopes, materials, and trades

• Proficient in reading and interpreting architectural and structural drawings

• Experience creating Purchase Orders in JobTread, QuickBooks, or similar construction/ERP software

• Strong knowledge of material takeoffs, cost analysis, and budget tracking

• Proficient in Excel/Google Sheets for estimating and reporting

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Detail-oriented with a zero-error mindset on quantities and pricing

• Reliable internet and professional home office setup

Bonus Skills

• Experience with Bluebeam, PlanSwift, or other digital takeoff software

• Previous experience working remotely for a North American builder

• Knowledge of Canadian building codes or North American construction standards

• Experience with QuickBooks Online PO workflows and vendor management

How to Apply

Send your resume highlighting your estimating and construction experience, a brief cover letter, your expected monthly salary (CAD or USD), and any sample work or references that demonstrate your estimating skills at

title: Design and Tech VA
description:
**About This Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to support the Less Stressed Life brand in building and maintaining our online funnels, automations, and digital systems. This is a contractor position starting at 4 hours per day with room to grow. You will work closely with the founder: this is a trusted partner VA role for someone who loves the back-end of online business and executes with efficiency and precision.



You will be responsible for building out complete funnels, from page design using our existing templates or examples, to asset creation, automation logic, tagging, and ManyChat flows in addition to supporting all aspects of launches. You will meet with the founder twice per week to review priorities, troubleshoot, and plan ahead.



**About You

You are exceptionally detail-oriented:  you catch the small things before they become big problems.

You execute fast without cutting corners. When something is on your list, it gets done on time, every time.

You are proactive and take initiative. You don't wait to be told. You anticipate what's needed and move.

You are a strong problem-solver who can Google it, figure it out, and come back with a solution rather than just a question.

You are honest and communicative. If something is unclear or running late, you say so early.

You are tech-comfortable and genuinely enjoy learning platforms, building workflows, and making systems run smoothly.

You are coachable, take feedback well, and care about the quality of your work.



**Responsibilities & Duties

Funnel Building & Tech (Primary Focus)

Build complete funnels in Kajabi, including opt-in pages, sales pages, checkout, and thank-you pages using existing brand templates.

Set up automations, tags, and sequences in Kajabi to support webinar funnels, challenges, and program launches.

Configure and manage Zapier workflows connecting platforms across the business.

Build and manage ManyChat flows for Instagram and 
ment/DM automation.

Troubleshoot tech issues across platforms quickly and proactively flag anything that may affect the user experience or funnel performance.

Design Support (Secondary/Templates Provided but also open to someone that loves design to update our brand presence)

Create or adapt funnel page assets in Canva using existing brand templates (graphics, covers, mockups).

Maintain visual consistency across funnel assets — fonts, colors, layouts.

Occasionally create social graphics or podcast graphics or mockups using templates in Canva.



**Collaboration & Communication

Meet with the founder twice per week for the first month via video call to review active projects, troubleshoot, and align on priorities. (After the first month, meetings will go to once/week and then twice/month depending on project cadence). 

Communicate project status and flag blockers proactively via Slack.

Update and maintain project management tasks in project management database.

Respond to Slack messages within one business day during regular business hours.

Identify opportunities to use agentic AI tools to reduce repetitive admin work, including organizing inboxes, drafting initial
 replies, summarizing content, and streamlining internal workflows and test and implement solutions with founder approval.



**Platforms You'll Work In

Strong working knowledge of the following is required or expected to be learned quickly:

Kajabi (pages, pipelines/funnels, automations,
, products, tags)

Zapier (multi-step zaps, filters, formatting, webhook basics, knowledge of API Key connections a plus)

ManyChat (Instagram/Facebook flows, triggers, conditions, tags)

Canva (brand kit, templates, asset resizing)

Slack (primary team communication)

Google Suite (Docs, Drive, Sheets)

Practice Better (client portal — will train as needed)

Navigate potential platform moves to GoHighLevel and updating project management system. 



**Qualifications

At least one year of experience in a VA, OBM, or tech support role for an online business.

Demonstrated experience building funnels or automations in Kajabi or a comparable platform.

Experience with Zapier workflow creation (not just using existing zaps).

Experience with ManyChat or similar chat automation tools strongly preferred.

Comfortable exploring and implementing AI tools (such as ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to automate repetitive tasks including
 triage, draft reply generation, and workflow documentation and proactively brings ideas for where AI can save the team time.

Reliable internet connection and a computer capable of handling multiple platforms simultaneously.

Ability to work independently, manage your own time, and meet deadlines without hand-holding.

Fluent written English communication.

Ability to meet with founder between 7:30 AM-8 PM Mountain time (Denver) 2x/week for first 3-4 weeks and then weekly or bimonthly thereafter to touch base on projects. 



**Terms & Availability

Contractor position: 4 hours per day to start, with openness to expanding as the role grows.

Must be available to respond during normal US business hours at least 3 days per week.

Two twice-weekly check-in meetings are required (Zoom video, 30 minutes each).

Work begins after a paid test project to ensure mutual fit.

3-month trial contract, renewable by both parties. Two weeks' notice requested by either party.

Rate: Competitive, based on experience; to be discussed after test project (range: $7-14/hr). 



***How to Apply***

>>> Here is exactly what to do to stand out:

1. Send an
 to 
 with the subject line: “Tech/Design VA Application — [Your Name]"

2. In the body of the
, briefly describe one funnel or automation you have built — what platform, what it did, and what the result was.

3. Include your Enneagram type (number + wing if you know it) and one sentence about why it fits the way you work.

4. Attach or link a short video introduction — 2 to 3 minutes — so we can get a sense of who you are. 

***We will be working closely together and the personality fit matters.

Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed. 

***We are excited to meet the right person. :)

title: ABA Intake Specialist
description:
ABA Intake Specialist (Administrative – PST Hours)



Company: Developmental Pathways, Inc.

Department: Intake / Operations

Reports To: Intake Manager

Position Type: Full-Time | Remote (PST Hours)

Hourly Rate: $8.00

Requires: ABA or  Healthcare Intake Experience In USA



Position Summary



The ABA Intake Specialist is responsible for the administrative processing of new client intakes, ensuring all required information, documentation, and insurance verifications are completed accurately and efficiently.



This role does not manage client relationships or ongoing support, but instead focuses on data collection, system entry, and process execution to move cases from inquiry to readiness for clinical scheduling.



Core Responsibilities



Intake Processing



Receive and log new client inquiries into the system

Collect required demographic, insurance, and referral information

Ensure all intake documentation is complete before advancing cases



Insurance Verification



Verify insurance eligibility and benefits for ABA services

Submit and track authorization requests as directed

Document verification outcomes clearly in system



Data Entry & Documentation



Maintain accurate and timely entry of all intake data in CRM/EMR

Upload and organize required documents (referrals, insurance cards, etc.)

Ensure all records meet compliance and audit standards



Internal Handoff



Prepare completed intake files for transition to clinical or scheduling teams

Flag incomplete or missing items for follow-up

Maintain clear internal notes for next-step processing

title: Customer Service Representative - Moving & Logistics
description:
We are hiring 5 individuals for a mission-critical support role. You are not a salesperson; you are the bridge between a signed contract and a successful move. You will handle the logistics that ensure a "catastrophe-free" move day.



This requires a pragmatic mind and a calm voice.



The Requirements

Elite English Proficiency: Your spoken English must be clear, with a neutral or professional accent. You will be the voice of the company to NYC-based clients.



Infrastructure: You must possess a stable, high-speed internet connection and a mandatory backup power supply (UPS/Generator). Power outages are not an excuse for absence.



Focus: Extreme attention to detail. In this industry, a wrong address or a missing item on a list causes a chain reaction of failure. You must be precise.



The Duties

Client Guidance: Handling inquiries regarding Certificates of Insurance (COI), timing adjustments, and inventory changes.



Pre-Move Verification: Calling every customer 24 hours before their move to confirm all details, update addresses, and collect final payments.



Internal Sync: Identifying urgent updates and relaying them immediately to Sales Representatives.



System Management: Full mastery of our custom CRM (Movit Movit), Google Voice, and Google Workspace.



The Reality

We are busy. Customers are often stressed and frustrated. We do not need people who react emotionally. We need people who provide solutions, remain stoic under pressure, and ensure the data in our CRM is 100?curate.



Schedule & Compensation

Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (NYC Time). Includes 1-hour lunch break.



Salary: $600 USD per month (Fixed).



How to Apply

If you have the discipline this role demands, send a brief introduction. Include a voice recording (at least 60 seconds) explaining your experience with customer logistics and confirming your backup power setup.



Vague applications will be ignored.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
Welcome to USA Home Flippers!



We are a real estate investment company out of California. We focus on purchasing homes nationwide across the United states. We are a company that provides multiple career opportunities and growth as long as we see hard work and dedication to the company. We are on a mission to becoming the #1 real estate investment company in the nation and we need good tea
mbers to join the team. We look forward to you applying to the position and getting started with us. If you make it pass the interview process and get started with us you will have a long lasting career with us. Please read job description.



We are looking for individuals to call homeowners nationwide. Your Job will be to use our dialer systems to call homeowners daily. You will be asking qualifying questions to homeowners Monday - Friday 9:00am - 5:00pm PST (California time). Your pay will be every 2 weeks starting at 5.00 an hour (8 hours per day). You will also get paid bonuses daily and weekly for hitting goals.  The more progress you show us the more we will begin to pay you as well.



In order for us to schedule you an interview you will have to
 us a recording to 
 call recording needs to be you cold calling a homeowner, qualifying them for cash offer, and asking questions about the property. This position is only for those that already have previous experience working at a real estate company and know how to call. You also must have your own headset, good internet connection, and not work multiple jobs while you work for our company.



You also have to be proficient already in using a dialer system like ready mode and qualifying homeowners.



Once we have received your recording through
 than we will reach out to schedule a one on one interview. Good luck, we look forward to meeting you!

title: Virtual Assistant – Business Credit Specialist
description:
Type: Contract / Remote (U.S.-based preferred, but open to experienced international candidates)



About the Role:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant who specializes exclusively in business credit building. This is not a personal credit repair role. You will be responsible for helping our clients structure and develop their business credit profile from the ground up, ensuring it is properly set up to obtain funding, credit lines, and trade accounts.



Responsibilities:

 • Assist with proper LLC structuring and ensure business compliance with state and federal guidelines.

 • Guide clients through obtaining and setting up EINs, D-U-N-S Numbers, and business credit reporting profiles.

 • Set up and manage Net 30 accounts and vendor lines of credit to build strong payment history.

 • Recommend and apply for business credit cards and funding opportunities as appropriate.

 • Monitor and update business credit profiles on bureaus such as Experian Business, Equifax Business, and Dun & Bradstreet.

 • Advise clients on maintaining good standing and compliance for continued credit growth.

 • Track and report progress, ensuring clients hit milestones in their business credit journey.

 • Stay up to date on business credit building strategies, requirements, and best practices.



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in building business credit profiles from start to finish (references or portfolio required).

 • Strong understanding of LLC creation, compliance, and proper business structuring.

 • Direct experience working with Net 30 vendors, business credit bureaus, and funding institutions.

 • Familiarity with tools, platforms, and systems used to monitor and manage business credit.

 • Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage multiple client profiles simultaneously.

 • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.



Preferred Skills:

 • Experience in consulting or mentoring small business owners on credit and funding.

 • Knowledge of alternative funding options and credit-building strategies.

 • Background in business consulting, finance, or credit repair (business-specific).



Compensation:

 • Competitive, based on experience and proven results.

 • Performance-based bonuses possible.



To Apply:

Send your resume, details of your business credit experience, and examples of results you’ve achieved for past clients. Applicants without proven business credit experience will not be considered.

mbers across Europe and worldwide, we specialize in direct-response marketing, creating high-converting ads and VSLs that generate 7+ figures annually.

Why Join Us?

title: Senior Amazon Catalog Manager (SEO, Bundles & Revenue Optimization)
description:
# Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term Position



We are a growing U.S.-based premium brand building a **high-performance Amazon team** focused on scaling revenue and operational excellence.



We are seeking an experienced **Amazon Catalog Manager** to take full ownership of our catalog, listings, and revenue optimization strategy.



This is **not an entry-level role**. We are looking for someone who deeply understands Amazon — including catalog structure, indexing, variation strategy, flat files, **bundling, promotions**, and Seller Central troubleshooting.



---



## Your Role



You will be responsible for the overall health, optimization, and performance of our Amazon catalog.



Your work will directly impact organic rankings, conversion rates, and **revenue growth through SEO, bundling, and promotional strategies**.



You will fully own the catalog.



---



## What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)



* Improved indexing and keyword rankings across key listings

* Increased conversion rates through listing and image optimization

* Reduction in suppressed listings and catalog errors

* Successful implementation of bundles and promotional strategies

* Measurable growth in revenue and average order value (AOV)



---



## Core Responsibilities



### Catalog Management



* Create and optimize listings (Titles, Bullet Points, Descriptions, Backend Search Terms)

* Build and manage parent-child variations correctly

* Perform bulk updates using flat files (required skill)

* Fix suppressed listings and catalog errors

* Resolve stranded inventory issues

* Maintain listing compliance with Amazon policies

* Manage and update A+ Content



---



### Amazon SEO & Optimization



* Conduct advanced keyword research (Helium 10, DataDive, or similar)

* Improve indexing and organic rankings

* Monitor keyword performance and adjust strategy

* Increase conversion rates through listing improvements

* Analyze competitors and identify ranking opportunities



---



### Bundles, Promotions & Revenue Optimization



* Create and manage product bundles and virtual bundles

* Develop and execute promotional strategies (coupons, deals, discounts)

* Increase average order value (AOV) through bundling strategies

* Identify revenue growth opportunities through offer structuring

* Analyze performance of promotions and optimize based on data

* Coordinate bundle positioning within catalog and listings



---



### Image Strategy & Coordination (No Design Required)



* Conduct image audits to improve click-through rate and conversion rate

* Analyze competitor images and identify improvement opportunities

* Create detailed image briefs for designers

* Coordinate with designers and photographers

* Ensure all images comply with Amazon policies

* Upload and manage image order within listings

* Continuously improve images based on performance data



---



### Amazon Creator & Influencer Content



* Manage Amazon Creator Connections and influencer collaborations

* Identify and work with relevant creators to drive external traffic and conversions

* Oversee creator-generated content usage within listings and storefront

* Track performance of influencer campaigns and optimize strategy



---



### Seller Central Management



* Open and manage Seller Support cases

* Handle Brand Registry-related issues

* Monitor listing health dashboards

* Ensure correct category placement and attributes



---



## Required Experience



* 3+ years managing Amazon Seller Central

* Strong flat file experience (mandatory)

* Deep understanding of Amazon SEO and indexing

* Experience fixing suppressed listings

* Strong variation strategy experience

* **Proven experience with bundles and/or virtual bundles**

* **Proven experience running promotions (coupons, deals, discounts)**

* Strong written English skills

* **Strong ownership mindset with the ability to operate independently and make decisions**

* Willing and able to consistently work with **4–6 hours overlap with U.S. business hours**



---



## Preferred (Bonus) Experience



* Experience working with branded or premium products

* Experience with Brand Registry

* Experience significantly improving conversion rates

* Experience with Amazon Creator Connections or influencer marketing

* Understanding of external traffic strategies (Amazon Attribution, etc.)

* Strong data-driven mindset



---



## Compensation



* Competitive monthly salary based on experience and proven results

* Performance-based bonuses

* Long-term opportunity

* Growth potential into senior operations role



---



## Work Details



* Full-time

* Remote

* Must be willing to work **U.S. business hours (EST/PST)**

* Must have **at least 4–6 hours of daily overlap with U.S. working hours**

* Long-term commitment required (no short-term freelancers)



---



## This Role Is NOT For You If:



* You rely on step-by-step instructions instead of taking ownership

* You do not have hands-on flat file experience

* You have only managed small or inactive Amazon accounts

* You are looking for short-term or freelance work

* You are not available to work at least 4–6 hours overlapping with U.S. business hours



---



## How to Apply (Important)



**Subject Line Requirement (Mandatory)**

Include the word **“VELARION”** in the subject line of your application.

Applications without this exact word will not be reviewed.



---



Please send:



1. A short summary of your Amazon experience

2. 2–3 examples of listings you have optimized

3. A brief explanation of how you improve indexing

4. Your expected monthly salary

5. A link to your CV/resume with work history

6. Your current timezone and **daily hours of overlap with U.S. business hours**



---



### Required Experience Checklist (Mandatory)



Please confirm your experience with each of the following by replying with **YES or NO**:



* Amazon Seller Central (3+ years)

* Flat file uploads and bulk catalog management

* Parent-child variation setup and troubleshooting

* Fixing suppressed listings and listing errors

* Amazon SEO and keyword indexing

* Keyword research tools (Helium 10, DataDive, etc.)

* Improving conversion rates through listing optimization

* A+ Content management

* Seller Support case handling

* Brand Registry experience

* Image optimization strategy (briefing designers, not designing)

* Competitor analysis for ranking improvements

* Bundles / Virtual Bundles management

* Promotions (coupons, deals, discounts)

* Amazon Creator Connections / influencer collaboration



---



### Optional but Strongly Preferred (Confirm YES/NO)



* Experience with premium or branded products

* Data-driven decision making (analytics, testing, iteration)

* External traffic strategies (Amazon Attribution, influencers, etc.)



---



### Short Evaluation Question (Required)



**If a listing is indexed but not ranking, what steps would you take to improve its performance?**



---



If you take ownership, think strategically, and know how to drive real results on Amazon — we want to hear from you.

If that’s you, apply now.

title: Customer Success Manager For Online Program
description:
The Role:



You'll be the person who makes sure every client has a smooth experience from the 
nt they sign up. You'll handle onboarding, regular check-ins, and make sure nobody slips through the cracks. You'll also help with admin and coordination across the team so things run smoothly behind the scenes.



This is a client-facing role — you'll be communicating with real people, so strong written English and a warm, professional tone are essential.



What You'll Be Doing:



Client Onboarding



Setting up new clients when they join (Slack channel creation, sending welcome messages, making sure they have access to everything)

Confirming all deliverables have been sent and received

Making sure every new client feels welcomed and knows exactly what to expect



Client Check-Ins & Retention



Running regular check-ins with active clients to see how they're doing

Identifying clients who are disengaged, unresponsive, or at risk of leaving

Reaching out proactively to re-engage clients before they go silent

Flagging at-risk clients to the team so we can take action early

Tracking client milestones and making sure people are progressing through the program



Admin & Coordination



Keeping our client tracking systems updated and organized

Coordinating between the coaching team, fulfillment team, and lead gen team to make sure nothing falls through the cracks

Helping manage the team Slack workspace (organizing channels, keeping things tidy)

Scheduling and calendar management as needed

Handling client questions that don't require coaching expertise (billing, access issues, general program questions)

Preparing simple reports on client status, engagement levels, and retention metrics





Requirements



Must-Haves:



Excellent written English — you'll be messaging clients directly, so your communication needs to be clear, warm, and professional

Experience in customer success, client management, virtual assistance, or a similar client-facing role

Highly organized — you'll be tracking multiple clients and making sure nothing gets missed

Comfortable with tools like Slack, Google Drive, Google Sheets, and Zoom

Proactive — you don't wait to be told what to do. If you see a client going quiet, you reach out. If something is falling behind, you flag it.

Reliable — you show up on time, meet deadlines, and communicate if something comes up



Nice-to-Haves:



Experience working with online coaching programs, course creators, or digital businesses

Familiarity with platforms like Whop, Circle, or similar community/membership platforms

Experience with CRM tools or client tracking systems

Background in the creator economy, social media marketing, or UGC





Schedule & Availability



20 hours per week (flexible on how you split the days)

Must be available during US EST business hours for at least part of your shift (client communication happens in EST)

Some tasks can be done on your own schedule, but responsiveness during EST hours is important





Compensation



$5.00 USD/hour

Paid twice monthly (1st and 16th of each month)

Time tracking required — simple timesheet submitted before each payment date

Independent contractor arrangement





How to Apply

Please send a message that includes:



A brief intro about yourself and why this role interests you

Your relevant experience (especially anything client-facing or in online businesses)

Your availability and timezone

A short example of how you'd write a friendly check-in message to a client who hasn't been active in 10 days (just 2-3 sentences — we want to see your communication style)



We're a small team that values people who take ownership, communicate well, and genuinely care about helping clients succeed. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Land Entitlement Project Assistant
description:
About Us



We are a South Florida-based land entitlement firm specializing in platting, zoning coordination, and development approvals across Miami-Dade, Broward, and surrounding municipalities.



Our work requires precision, persistence, and strong coordination with local agencies. We are growing and looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to help manage project tracking and ensure consistent follow-ups so nothing falls through the cracks.





Role Overview



This role is focused on tracking deadlines, managing follow-ups, and maintaining organization across multiple active projects.



You will act as a key support role to ensure all projects continue moving forward by proactively monitoring timelines and communicating with agencies.



This is not a passive admin role—we are looking for someone who is organized, proactive, and takes ownership of tasks.





Key Responsibilities



Project Tracking & Organization

* Maintain and update a Master Project Tracker (Excel or Google Sheets)

* Track multiple active projects (plats, waivers, LOAs, etc.)

* Monitor deadlines, submissions, and required follow-ups

* Ensure all project information is accurate and up to date



Follow-Ups & Communication

* Send professional follow-up
s to municipalities, agencies, and consultants

* Track all outgoing and incoming communications

* Schedule and track follow-up intervals (typically every 3–5 business days)

* Escalate delays, missing responses, or issues when needed



 & Administrative Support

* Monitor a shared inbox or assigned
 account

* Draft clear, professional
 responses

* Organize
 threads and maintain communication records

* Assist with scheduling and coordination when required



Reporting & Accountability

* Provide a weekly summary of:

    * Follow-ups sent

    * Responses received

    * Outstanding items

* Flag any risks, delays, or unclear responses promptly





Required Skills & Qualifications

* Strong written English (clear, professional communication)

* Extremely detail-oriented and organized

* Ability to manage multiple tasks and timelines simultaneously

* Experience with Excel or Google Sheets

* Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

* Ability to follow structured processes (SOPs)



Preferred (Not Required)

* Experience working with U.S.-based clients

* Background in real estate, construction, or permitting

* Experience as a project coordinator or executive assistant





Work Schedule

* Monday–Friday

* Must be available for at least 4 hours overlap with Eastern Time (U.S.)





Compensation

* Based on experience

* Opportunity for long-term role and increased responsibility





Growth Opportunity

This role has the potential to grow into a long-term position with increased responsibility, including deeper involvement in project coordination and client communication.





Important Instructions (Application Filter)



To be considered, please:

1. Use the subject line: “Tracking is everything”

2. Answer the following:

    * Describe your experience with tracking tasks or projects

    * How do you make sure nothing is missed?

    * If you follow up twice and receive no response, what would you do?

3. Provide a short sample
: Write a professional follow-up
 asking for a status update on a pending application. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.





What We’re Really Looking For



Someone who:

* Takes ownership of their work

* Is proactive, not reactive

* Notices when something is missing or overdue

* Communicates clearly and consistently

title: AI Automation Engineer - Local LLM, n8n, Agent Swarm Architecture
description:
We are a fast-growing AI automation company (Viral Growth Media) building a private, self-hosted AI infrastructure on a Mac Studio M3 Ultra with 512GB unified memory. We need an engineer who can deploy open-source LLMs locally, orchestrate multi-agent systems using n8n, and build the AI brain that powers our entire business - without relying on cloud APIs.



This is NOT a basic automation job. We are building a 6-agent AI system that runs 24/7 on local hardware, handling content generation, sales automation, lead qualification, DM outreach, revenue analytics, and self-monitoring. If you've never heard of Ollama, LangChain, or local inference - this role is not for you.



What You'll Build

- Deploy and manage open-source LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek) on a Mac Studio M3 Ultra (512GB unified memory) using Ollama

- Build and orchestrate 6 AI agents using n8n as the workflow engine:

   > SYNDICATE: Content script generation from trending topics

   > FRACTAL: Automated upsell sequences on Whop

   > CLOSER: Automated lead qualification and DM outreach via Gmail + Whop

   > PRISM: Monthly promotional offers triggered by astrological events

   > ORACLE: Daily revenue and performance briefing

   > SOVEREIGN: Meta-controller that monitors all agents, detects failures, auto-restarts, and escalates

- Migrate existing 
 + OpenAI API workflows to local n8n + Ollama (without breaking production)

- Scale our AI subscription product (ScrollKeeper AI) from 32 to 2,000+ subscribers with proper queuing, batch processing, and monitoring

- Build the backend for ViralOS - a multi-tenant SaaS platform (Stripe billing, feature gating, user auth, data isolation)

- Create inter-agent communication systems (webhooks, shared state via Supabase/PostgreSQL, priority queuing)

- Build monitoring dashboards and Slack/Telegram alerting for all agent activity

- Document everything with SOPs and Loom walkthroughs



Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)

- Hands-on experience with n8n workflow automation (not just Zapier/Make - we need someone who has built complex multi-step n8n workflows)

- Experience integrating LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic/Claude, or open-source models) into production workflows

- Understanding of local LLM inference - you know what Ollama is, you've run models locally, you understand quantization and model selection

- Strong backend development skills (Node.js, Python, or PHP)

- Database experience (PostgreSQL, Supabase, MongoDB, or equivalent)

- Experience deploying on Vercel, DigitalOcean, AWS, or equivalent

- Comfortable with Hubstaff time tracking (screenshots every 10 minutes) from day one

- Willing to commit to full-time exclusivity after a trial period - no side clients

- Able to overlap with US Eastern Time for at least 4 hours daily



Strong Pluses

- Experience with Claude Code, LangChain, CrewAI, or other AI agent frameworks

- Experience building multi-agent systems where agents communicate with each other

- GoHighLevel experience (we use GHL as our CRM - your AI systems will write data to GHL)

- Experience with Whop, Stripe API, or subscription billing systems

- Mac/Apple Silicon experience (our hardware is M3 Ultra)

- Experience migrating cloud API workflows to local inference

- SaaS architecture experience (multi-tenancy, feature gating, user provisioning)



Compensation

- $1,500–$3,000/month USD depending on experience

- Part-time (20 hrs/week) to start, transitioning to full-time (40 hrs/week) after trial

- Paid via Wise on the 1st and 15th

- Long-term position - this is the core AI infrastructure for a company targeting multi-million dollar scale



About Us

Viral Growth Media has sold 12,400+ AI-generated products, has 447K Instagram followers (all organic, zero ad spend), and is building toward a multi-million dollar AI platform. Our products include a $33 AI scroll scan, an $88/month AI subscription, $888 one-on-one sessions, and $11K-$55K enterprise AI builds. The AI infrastructure you build will power all of it.



We are not a startup hoping to find product-market fit. We have revenue, we have customers, and we have a proven product. What we need is the engineer who can build the self-hosted AI brain that takes us from here to scale.



How to Apply

Send a message with ALL of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



  1.  Links to your portfolio, GitHub, or examples of n8n/automation workflows you've built

  2.  A Loom video (under 5 minutes) walking through the most complex automation or AI workflow you've built - show the actual n8n nodes or code, not a slide deck

  3.  Answer this question: "What is the most complex AI agent or automation system you have built? Describe the tools, the architecture, and what problem it solved."

  4.  Tell me which open-source LLMs you've worked with and whether you've run any locally

  5.  Your availability (hours per week and EST overlap)

  6.  Your expected monthly rate in USD

  7.  Confirmation that you are comfortable with Hubstaff time tracking



Applications without a Loom video will be skipped. If you mention GoHighLevel in your application, also mention n8n or a similar automation tool - this role is primarily about AI infrastructure, not CRM management.

title: Operations VA for US Junk Removal Company — On-Call Role, Growth Path to Ops Lead
description:
Hi! I'm the founder of Dropcurb, a curbside junk removal brokerage based in the US. We connect homeowners with independent haulers who pick up junk from their curb. We're growing fast and I'm looking for someone special to join as our first operations hire — with a clear path to becoming an Operations Lead managing other VAs as we scale.



This is not a "sit and wait for tickets" VA role. I want someone hungry, sharp, and hardworking who wants to grow their career and their wage with the company.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Dispatch incoming work orders to our network of haulers — most days this is a one-click process

- When we don't have a hauler for a job, recruit one: post on Craigslist, message local haulers, onboard them into our system

- Respond to customer calls, texts, and
s — send booking links, answer questions, handle support

- Respond to hauler messages, keep them happy, pay them quickly 

- Follow up with customers for reviews after successful pickups

- Flag issues to me (no-shows, complaints, payment problems)

- Deliver a great experience to every customer and every hauler, every time

- Look for ways we can improve our process (automated text changes, website copy) 



THE GROWTH PATH:

I want to hire the person who takes this role ONCE. Within 6–12 months, as we scale, you'll stop doing day-to-day dispatch yourself and start managing a team of VAs under you — setting SOPs, training new hires, and owning operations across multiple markets and service verticals. Your wage grows with your responsibility.



Only apply if this excites you. I'm not looking for a task-taker — I'm looking for a future ops leader.



THE REALITY OF THE WORK (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY):

This is an on-call role, not a traditional 8-hour shift. Here's what the day actually looks like:



- You're on-call from 9 PM – 9 AM Philippines Time (9 AM – 9 PM US Eastern), 7 days per week

- Actual focused work is typically 3–5 hours per day, spread across that window

- Morning burst (~1-2 hrs): review the day's orders, dispatch haulers, post Craigslist ads for any uncovered jobs

- Middle of the shift: passive monitoring — check messages every 30-60 min, respond to customers and haulers as needed

- Late shift (~1-2 hrs): dispatch West Coast (Pacific time) orders, confirm completions, process payouts



This structure is ideal for someone who wants reliable full-time income without being chained to a screen for 8 hours straight. But it does require you to be REACHABLE during the window — you can cook, exercise, run errands, rest — but you need to check messages regularly and respond within ~10 minutes.



IDEAL PERSON:

- Excellent written English — you'll be texting and
ing US customers daily

- Clear spoken English — comfortable on the phone with American customers

- Hungry, ambitious, wants to grow into a leadership role

- Hardworking, reliable, detail-oriented

- Good judgment on pricing and customer situations (we'll train you, but you need the instincts)

- Reliable internet + quiet space for calls

- Experience in dispatching, customer support, ops, or recruiting is a big plus



WHAT I OFFER:

- $800–$900/month starting, with real wage growth as you take on more responsibility

- 13th month bonus (paid in December, pro-rated for first year)

- Paid PH holidays after probation

- Long-term role with a clear path to Operations Lead

- Clear SOPs and training — you won't be guessing

- Direct daily communication with the founder (me)



TO APPLY:

1. Tell me about your experience with dispatching, customer support, recruiting, or ops work

2. Why does this growth role excite you? What do you want your career to look like in 2 years?

3. Confirm you can commit to being on-call 9 PM – 9 AM PHT, 7 days a week

4. Include a short voice recording (1 min) introducing yourself in English



I read every application personally. Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Short-Form Video Editor (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)
description:
Our brand is called ShockForce — we created the world's first technological shoes that allow the wearer to conduct static electricity with a simple touch. Our product videos regularly go viral, and we're now looking for a full-time short-form video editor to scale our content production across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



You'll be compiling product clips into high-energy, beat-synced TikToks with captions and trending sounds. The ideal candidate should be detail-oriented, consistent, and comfortable with repetitive but rewarding edits. You should be eager to help drive our brand's visual presence forward.



This is a full-time role starting with 25 ShockForce videos per week (5 per day) at $3 per video. Once you've proven consistency with ShockForce content, you'll take on additional long-form video editing and short-form repurposing for a personal brand at $3/hr, filling the rest of your working day.



Responsibilities:

- Create 5 short-form videos daily based on the weekly content-brief I provide

- Edit 10-25 second TikTok style videos from raw clips (5 per day, 25 per week)

- Sync edits to trending phonk-style sounds and add captions

- Source appropriate music/sounds for each video

- Keep video cuts fast, smooth, engaging and on-beat

- Complete revisions based on Loom review feedback (2x per week)

- Deliver consistently and meet daily upload deadlines

- As the role grows: long-form video editing, short-form repurposing from long-form content



Requirements:

- Must be available to work 7pm-12am Philippine time during initial training period (once trained, hours become flexible as long as deadlines are met)

- PERFECT English is required

- Confident with editing software of your choice (CapCut preferred)

- Fast internet and stable connection, if you constantly get power outages, don't apply

- Must be available to start by Monday 11th May

- Must be able to submit a sample within 24 hours of being shortlisted



Pay Structure:

- ShockForce short-form videos: $3 USD per video (5 per day, 25 per week)

- Long-form/personal brand work: $3 USD/hr (once proven with ShockForce videos)

- Payment: Every Friday



How to Apply:

Applications must be a maximum of 3 sentences long, and the title of your application must include the word 'avocado'. Send exactly 2 of your best TikTok style videos which are as similar as possible to the style our videos use. Check our TikTok 
 for reference. If you have done long-form work for personal brands, send 1 long-form video, but this is NOT required for the job role.



If shortlisted, you'll be given a trial task using our raw clips. This will involve creating a short TikTok style video that showcases our product and editing style. The quality of your trial will determine if you move to the next round. Full details, inspiration links, and content files will be provided to shortlisted applicants only.

title: Executive Assistant | Cold Email Expert
description:
Hello! My name is Austin, and I run Fantum Growth — a creative growth agency that helps financial advisors and founders stand out and scale through strategic branding, cold outreach, and conversion-focused systems. I work with busy entrepreneurs who are tired of relying solely on referrals and want a consistent way to bring in better-fit clients.



I’m looking for a sharp, English-speaking Virtual Assistant with cold
 expertise to support our outbound efforts. This is a part-time role at $10/hour, with the potential to expand as we grow. Your main focus will be keeping our outreach engine running smoothly and consistently.



Here’s what I need help with:

*Cold
 Strategy & Execution*

- Write and test
 sequences inside Instantly

- Track performance and deliverability

- Triage inbox responses (positive, bounce, OOO, wrong contact, not interested, etc.)

- Maintain and improve
 templates based on results



*Inbox & Campaign Management*

You need to be tech-savvy, organized, and proactive. We move fast and iterate often so I need someone who can think independently, catch mistakes, and stay one step ahead. You must have hands-on experience with Instantly.ai, cold
 copywriting, inbox triage, and lead scraping (Apollo or Sales Navigator).



If this sounds like a fit, please watch this short video before applying:

????

title: Title: Meta Ads Media Buyer — Low-Ticket Digital Product (AI Assessment Tool)
description:
We're launching OpsPlan, an AI-powered operations assessment for founders and operators ($27 front-end, $67 upsell). We need an experienced Meta ads media buyer to own paid acquisition end-to-end — not just build campaigns, but run them.

Starting part-time (15-20 hrs/week) with room to grow as we scale spend and launch additional products under the same brand.



You'll own



Full campaign strategy and setup (CBO, Advantage+, manual — you pick based on what works)

Pixel and Conversions API setup and QA

Audience research and testing (cold, lookalikes, retargeting)

Creative testing cadence — you'll work from briefs and assets I provide, and should spot underperforming creative and request variants before I ask

Daily optimization and budget management

Weekly reporting: spend, CPM, CTR, CPA, ROAS, LTV signals

Scaling what works, killing what doesn't — fast



Must have



3+ years running Meta ads for direct-response digital products (info products, courses, low-ticket tripwires, SaaS). Not e-commerce, not local services.

Hands-on experience with low-AOV funnels ($20-100 products with OTOs/upsells) — you understand the unit economics cold

Proven track record keeping CPA inside a tight breakeven. This product runs $35-45 AOV and CAC target is under $25.

Current grasp of Meta post-iOS 14: CAPI, attribution windows, Advantage+ behavior, creative fatigue cycles

Clear written English — async communication in Slack

Reliable weekly reporting — you own the numbers



Nice to have



Experience launching new offers from zero, not just scaling proven ones

Copywriting — you can draft ad variants, not just test them

TikTok or YouTube ads background



Rate: $10-12/hour based on experience. Part-time to start (15-20 hrs/week), with rate review at 90 days tied to performance.



To apply, include:



Links to 2-3 ad accounts you've managed (screenshots of results are fine — blur account names)

The lowest CPA you've driven on a sub-$50 digital product, and what the offer was

Your honest read: Is a $27 tripwire with a $67 OTO a hard or easy Meta ads play in 2026? Why?

title: Sales & Marketing Content Assistant (AI-Assisted Writer)
