title: PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VIRTUAL ASSISTANT (UK HOURS FOR UK BASED REAL ESTATE AGENCY)
description:
PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VIRTUAL ASSISTANT (UK HOURS FOR UK BASED REAL ESTATE AGENCY)

FULL TIME, LONG TERM



We are a well-established, single-branch estate agency based in West London. We are seeking a highly reliable, detail-oriented, and experienced VA with property management experience to join our team.



This is a full-time, long-term property manager position. We are looking for someone committed and dependable, you must NOT be working another job alongside this one. Reliability and availability are absolutely essential.



STRICT WORKING HOURS (UK HOURS – PLEASE CHECK CAREFULLY)

• Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM UK time

(Equivalent to 4:00 PM – 1:00 AM Manila time)

• Saturday: 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM UK time

(Equivalent to 4:00 PM – 9:00 PM Manila time)



Only apply if you can commit fully to these hours without other work or study commitments.



ABOUT THE ROLE

You will support the daily operations of our property management department, covering administration, customer service, diary and
 management, and marketing support. You’ll work with dedicated property management software.



RESPONSIBILITIES

• Send a daily summary
 listing completed and ongoing tasks

• Manage the Director’s diary: update appointments, send reminders, confirm with clients

• Keep our contact database updated and well organised

• Monitor and sort incoming
s: respond to enquiries, filter spam, forward as needed

• Provide marketing support and occasional customer service communication

• Assist in coordinating property-related tasks such as right to rent checks, utility swaps, referencing, coordinate gas and electrical safety checks.



REQUIREMENTS

Property experience is essential – minimum 1 year in a property management role. Please do not apply if you do not meet this requirement.

Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook

Excellent written and spoken English: you must be confident in both written communication and making calls (for taking calls, confirming appointments, arranging maintenance access, etc.)  You will be given a test where you cannot use Ai.



SCHEDULE & BENEFITS

Full-time: approx. 45 hours per week (1 hour daily break per full day)

UK working hours, as above

Observance of most Filipino public holidays (excluding All Saints' Day and All Souls' Day)

10 vacation days available between November and March (after probation period)



SALARY & GROWTH POTENTIAL

Starting from $1,050/month, with potential for a higher starting rate depending on skills and experience

13th-month pay and annual bonus after successful completion of 3-month probation

Health Care Insurance contribution



HOW TO APPLY - we want to arrange interviews quickly, do make this happen:

1. Provide a link to your CV (e.g. Google Docs)

2. Confirm you have at least 1 year’s property management experience (highlight clearly if this is UK experience)

3. Confirm you are happy with the required strict UK working hours and the salary

4. Confirm your earliest available start date. You must not have other job commitments during working hours and must be reliable and available.

5. Give a quick example of your computing skills (e.g. advanced Excel functions, Canva design, etc.)

6. Use the subject line: PM1025 in your application

title: Genuinely Talented Graphic Designer for Poster Company
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We are looking for a talented, unique Graphic Designer to join our growing wall art brand (Wallbuddy Ltd), selling on Etsy, Amazon, and wholesale globally.

This role is focused on creating and scaling designs for multiple shops (Etsy etc.)

You will work under our Creative Director to take proven design styles and roll them out across hundreds of variations (e.g. cities, landmarks, maps, etc.).



IMPORTANT:

To be considered, you MUST:

Submit a portfolio of poster or layout design work

Include “WALLBUDDY DESIGN” in your subject line

Use 5 APPLY POINTS in your application

Applications without these will not be reviewed.



YOUR ROLE (VERY IMPORTANT TO UNDERSTAND)

This is not a typical “creative designer” role.

You will:

Take approved design templates

Adapt them into multiple variations (e.g. 100+ cities, landmarks, etc.)

Work quickly and consistently within a defined style

Think: high-quality repetition at scale



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES

Create 20+ poster designs per day using existing templates

Adapt designs across different themes (cities, landmarks, maps, etc.)

Restore and enhance vintage artwork (e.g. old posters, adverts, illustrations) by cleaning, sharpening, upscaling, and preparing high-resolution print files

Follow strict layout, typography, and branding guidelines

Work closely with our Creative Director and team

Send a short daily progress update



REQUIRED SKILLS

Minimum 2 years graphic design experience

Strong Photoshop and/or Illustrator skills (essential)

Excellent attention to detail and layout consistency

Ability to follow design systems and templates precisely

Fast turnaround and ability to hit daily targets



ADDITIONAL SKILL (HIGHLY VALUED)

Experience restoring vintage or old artwork

Ability to clean, sharpen, and upscale low-resolution images

Experience using tools such as Photoshop, Topaz Gigapixel, or similar

Strong attention to detail when preparing files for high-quality printing



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED BUT A PLUS)

Experience with poster or print design

Experience creating product mockups

Familiarity with AI tools (Midjourney, DALL·E, etc.)

Experience working in high-volume design roles



WORK SCHEDULE

Full-time (Monday–Friday)

Flexible working hours

Remote



SALARY

$150–$190 per week depending on experience and speed

Paid weekly

PERKS & BENEFITS

After 6 months:

13th month pay

Paid leave

Long-term stable position with growth opportunities



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

If you are:

Fast

Consistent

Detail-focused

and have some talent with illustation and have some creative flair

You will do very well in this role.

title: AI Web Builder & Prompt Artist
description:
We're a small, fast-moving team that rebuilds business websites using AI tools, then pitch them cold to the business as a proposal. You'd be our go-to builder, the person who makes it all happen.



What you'll do

You'll take real business websites and rebuild them from scratch using AI, handling layout, copy, visuals, and interactions, then help us present them as cold proposals to potential clients. You'll work across high-end brochure/service sites and Shopify builds. Volume is high, variety is high, and the work is genuinely fun.



The stack

Claude, GPT-4o, Google AI Studio, Cursor, Framer Motion, React, Tailwind, Webflow, Shopify, GSAP, and whatever tools make things faster and prettier



Who we're looking for

If you've seen someone

title: Data Pipeline QA Tester — Financial Data
description:
We are building a financial data pipeline. All code is written by the development lead. Your job is to run scripts, test outputs, and report results. You do not write or edit code.

You will run Python scripts from the command line, run SQL validation queries against databases, and report exactly what happened — full outputs, full error messages, row counts, and anything unusual. If something breaks, you describe the problem. You do not fix it. The development lead fixes it. You run the fix and confirm it works.

This role requires extreme attention to detail, comfort with repetitive process-driven work, and clear written communication. You must be comfortable working independently with minimal supervision and validating data without knowing what it is used for.

Long-term full-time position. Build phase is 6-12 months, then transitions to daily monitoring. Paid via Wise monthly.

Start your application with the word VALIDATED. Include your SQL and Python experience, an example of a time you caught a data error others missed, and your salary expectation.

Honesty about mistakes. If you a
 ran the wrong file, skipped a step, or aren't sure if you did something correctly — say so immediately. We fix mistakes fast. We cannot fix hidden mistakes.

title: Autonomous Content Coordinator — Pinterest Setup + Ongoing Production (Faceless Catholic Lifestyle Brand)
description:
We run a faceless Catholic lifestyle content brand — blog, Pinterest, YouTube, and
 newsletter. We need a content coordinator who can build our Pinterest presence from scratch, then take finished articles and run them through the full production pipeline — Pinterest, WordPress, ConvertKit — without hand-holding.



**This is not a task-taker role.** We give you the source content, brand guidelines, and publishing calendar. You figure out the rest — pin angles, SEO fields, send timing, tag selection, graphic design — and bring us the finished work for final approval, not twenty questions along the way.



**Copy quality is non-negotiable**



Because our brand is faceless, the writing *is* the brand. Every pin description, meta description,
 subject line, alt text, and caption has to sound human, warm, and on-brand. Typos, awkward phrasing, or generic AI-sounding copy are disqualifying — not fixable with a second round of edits.



You need to be a strong writer and a sharp copy editor in English. You'll be touching hundreds of pieces of micro-copy every month. If English is a second language and you're not fully fluent in written English with an ear for tone, this isn't the right fit.



**About how we work with AI**



We use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Canva AI, Pinterest AI features) to move faster. You should too. If you're faster with AI in the loop, use it.



**But our brand cannot feel AI-generated.** Our audience comes to us for warmth, real voice, and Catholic sensibility — not sterile, obviously-AI prose or generic stock-feeling graphics. You need the taste to know when AI output sounds like AI and the editorial skill to rewrite it so it doesn't. "AI wrote it" is never an acceptable reason for something shipping that sounds flat, generic, or off-brand.



If you use AI for pin descriptions, SEO fields, alt text, or meta descriptions — that's fine, as long as the final output reads human and matches our voice. If you don't yet use AI in your workflow, this role isn't the fit.



Starting with Pinterest setup and scaling into steady-state production.



Hours structure:

- First month: 25-30 hrs/week — Pinterest setup is the priority. Board architecture, profile optimization, Rich Pins, scheduler, first 50-100 pins live.

- Ongoing: 15-20 hrs/week— steady-state production across all channels, with room to grow as the brand scales.



You'll own



Pinterest (setup + ongoing)

- First 30 days — build our Pinterest account from scratch:** business account setup, website verification, board architecture mapped to our content pillars (15-25 boards), board descriptions with SEO, profile bio and cover, Rich Pins enabled, scheduler integration, first 50-100 pins seeded

- Ongoing: take each blog article and produce a full Pinterest rollout — 5-10 pins per article, titles, descriptions, board assignments, scheduling cadence

- You d
 pin angles based on the article. You don't ask us which angle to use.

- Maintain boards and pinning rhythm without being prompted



WordPress publishing

- Take articles from Google Docs and publish them fully formatted: featured image, optimized images, internal links, SEO fields, schedule

- You choose featured images from our library or create them in Canva. You don't ask which image to use unless nothing fits.

- Copy-edit as you go — catch typos, awkward sentences, and inconsistencies before publishing. You're the last set of eyes.

- Flag anything genuinely ambiguous. Don't flag things you can reasonably d
 yourself.



ConvertKit newsletter

- Build broadcasts from provided copy, apply correct tags and segments, schedule and QA

- Copy-edit every send — subject lines, preview text, body, CTAs. Catch errors before they go to the list.

- Maintain automations and flag list health issues proactively

- Tag hygiene is non-negotiable — we'll train you on our tagging system before you touch anything live



Design

- Canva graphics for Pinterest,
, social — on-brand, fast, no generic templates

- Work from provided brand kit. Never deviate without asking.



What autonomy looks like here



Good: "I published all 3 articles this week. Pin rollouts are scheduled through next Tuesday. The Wednesday newsletter is built and ready for your final review — I flagged one sentence I wasn't sure about and fixed two typos in the article before publishing. One question for next week: we're running low on Pinterest graphics for the prayer content category. Want me to batch-create 20?"



Not good: "I'm about to publish the article. What featured image do you want? Which category should I put it in? Should I schedule it for morning or evening? What tags go on the newsletter?"



You'll have a brand kit, SOPs, and a shared Loom library. Use them first. Ask only when you genuinely can't d
.



**Must have**

- **Native-level written English with strong copy editing skills** — you catch typos, awkward phrasing, inconsistent voice, and off-brand tone before anything publishes

- 2+ years hands-on with Pinterest (including at least one account setup from scratch), WordPress, and ConvertKit (or Kit)

- Active AI tool use in your current workflow — ChatGPT, Claude, or equivalent. You know what AI is good at and where it falls short.

- Editorial judgment: you can spot AI-generated text that sounds generic, flat, or off-brand and rewrite it to feel human

- A track record of running content operations with minimal supervision — tell us about it in your application

- Canva proficiency, fast and on-brand

- Reliable weekly reporting — you tell us what shipped, what's scheduled, what's stuck



**Nice to have**

- Experience setting up Pinterest business accounts from scratch for faceless content brands

- ConvertKit automation builder experience

- Pinterest Trends and Pinterest SEO

- Yoast or Rank Math SEO plugins

- Familiarity with Catholic or Christian content (helpful for tone, not required)

- Custom GPTs, Claude projects, or documented AI workflows you've built for content production



**Rate:** $8-12/hour based on experience.

- First month: approximately $800-$1,440/month (25-30 hrs/week)

- Ongoing: approximately $640-$960/month (15-20 hrs/week)

- Rate review at 90 days based on performance.



**To apply, include:**



1. Links to 2-3 Pinterest accounts you've run (bonus if you built any from scratch) and 1 ConvertKit broadcast you built

2. Tell me about a time a client gave you a piece of content and minimal direction, and you ran with it to completion. What decisions did you make without asking? What did you ask about?

3. How do you use AI in your current content workflow? Name the specific tools, the specific tasks you use them for, and one example of AI output you had to significantly rewrite because it didn't meet the brand's standard. What was wrong with it, and what did you change?

4. **Copy editing test.** Here is a Pinterest pin description written by AI. Rewrite it so it sounds human, warm, and on-brand for a Catholic lifestyle content brand aimed at busy Catholic moms. Limit to 100 words.



    *"Discover the transformative power of prayer in your daily life as a busy mom! In this comprehensive guide, we dive deep into three simple prayers that will seamlessly integrate into your hectic schedule. Whether you're juggling kids, work, or household responsibilities, these powerful prayers will help you cultivate a deeper spiritual connection and find 
nts of peace amidst the chaos. Click through to unlock these game-changing prayers today!"*



5. Here's a scenario: It's Wednesday morning. You've been given a 1,800-word blog article on "3 Simple Prayers for Busy Moms" with no other instructions. What do you do, in order, to get this article live on WordPress, pushed to Pinterest, and featured in Friday's newsletter — without checking in with me until it's done? Note where you'd use AI and where you wouldn't.

title: Customer Support + Operations Assistant - Weekend/Flex Schedule (30 hrs/week)
description:
We are a fast-growing AI-powered digital product company (Viral Growth Media) with 500K+ Instagram followers and 12,400+ products sold. We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented customer support and operations assistant to provide coverage on the days our lead support person is off.



You will be the first point of contact for customers who purchased our AI-generated digital products, handling support
s, community DMs, troubleshooting, and basic operational tasks. Most support requests follow predictable patterns with scripted responses. You will be fully trained using our existing SOP document before going solo.



THE SCHEDULE (READ CAREFULLY):

This is a 3-day-per-week role with 10-hour shifts (30 hours/week). The schedule alternates every week:

- Week 1: You work Friday, Saturday, Sunday

- Week 2: You work Saturday, Sunday, Monday

- Then repeats back to Week 1.

You will ALWAYS work Saturday and Sunday. The third day alternates between Friday and Monday. This schedule is fixed because you are covering the days our lead support person is off. If you cannot commit to every Saturday and Sunday with 10-hour shifts, please do not apply.



What You Will Do



 SUPPORT

- Respond to all customer
s during your shift

- Handle common inquiries: missing product delivery, incorrect information, refund requests, subscription access issues

- Follow our SOP document with pre-written response templates for every scenario

- Escalate unusual issues to the team lead



COMMUNITY DM MANAGEMENT (WHOP APP)

- Respond to customer DMs in our Whop community

- Handle product access questions, subscription inquiries, and onboarding guidance

- Direct customers to the correct resources using links from our SOP

- Send welcome messages to new subscribers with onboarding instructions



INSTAGRAM DM RESPONSES

- Respond to comment-triggered DMs using scripted sales sequences

- When someone comments a trigger word on our posts, send the corresponding scripted DM response

PRODUCT TROUBLESHOOTING

- Check
 logs to verify delivery status

- Collect customer details and manually rerun products using ChatGPT when the automation fails

CALENDAR + BOOKING MANAGEMENT

- Send weekly Zoom reminders for subscriber onboarding calls



CONTENT CLIP FARMING

nts into short-form content segments

SUBSCRIPTION MANAGEMENT

Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)

, community apps, and Instagram DMs

- Can start immediately and train with our current support lead during her shifts



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM

- Experience using ChatGPT or AI tools for work tasks

- Experience with Zoom recording management or basic video clipping

Compensation

How to Apply

title: Virtual Assistant / Executive Assistant
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a driven, detail-oriented full-time Virtual Assistant to support a growing consulting firm based in Ontario, Canada. This is a long-term role with real ownership, a clear path to expanding scope, and direct working relationships with the owners.

The primary focus of this role (about 60% of your time) is supporting a boutique consulting firm that specializes in financial planning and analysis (FP&A) technology implementations for financial institutions across North America. The work is varied and growing — executive support, sales and marketing coordination, client administration, and internal operations.

The remaining 40% of your time supports a small related business run by the owner’s spouse — a solo law practice in Ontario. This portion is general administrative support only. No legal experience or training is required. We will handle all legal work internally. What we need on this side is scheduling, client communication, document organization, and invoice coordination — the same administrative skills that make you strong on the consulting side, applied to a second business.

Think of this as one role supporting one household of small businesses, with consulting as the primary focus and the law practice as a lighter secondary stream. You will work directly with both owners and will not be managing two separate workloads competing for attention.



Who We Are Looking For

This role comes with a high degree of autonomy. You will not be micromanaged. That also means we need someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and delivers work that is accurate and polished the first time.

The right person for this role is:

• Genuinely driven. You take pride in your work and want to grow with the business. You care about outcomes, not just checking boxes.

• Extremely detail-oriented. You catch the small things that others miss. Typos in client-facing documents, a missing date on a form, or an incorrect figure on an invoice are the kinds of things you naturally flag.

• Professional in tone and conduct. You represent both businesses to clients, referral partners, and prospects. Your written communication reflects well on us.

• Proactive. When you see something that needs doing, you do it or raise it. You do not wait to be asked.

• Trustworthy and discreet. You will handle confidential financial, business, and client information every day.

• Comfortable supporting two related businesses. Both are small and owner-operated. The work is varied but the skills are the same across both.



Role Details

Hours 40 hours/week, Monday to Friday

Schedule Eastern Time business hours (9 AM to 5 PM ET)

Location Remote (Philippines preferred)

Role Focus Primary: consulting firm support | Secondary: general admin for a solo law practice

Compensation $8 to $12 USD/hour depending on experience

Tools All software, licenses, and tool access provided

Start Date As soon as possible



Primary Focus: Consulting Firm (60%)

Executive Assistant and Scheduling

• Manage the founder’s calendar, schedule client meetings, and resolve conflicts

• Prepare meeting agendas and distribute post-meeting notes and action items

• Inbox triage: flag urgent
s, draft routine replies for review, and archive low-priority messages

• Coordinate scheduling across multiple time zones with clients and partners

• Book travel and personal appointments as needed



Sales and Business Development

• Manage LinkedIn Sales Navigator: build saved searches, create lead lists, and flag warm prospects

• Research target prospects and gather relevant background before outreach

• Monitor LinkedIn for trigger events such as core system conversions, executive hires, and FP&A job postings

• Draft first-pass outreach messages for the founder’s review

• Follow up with prospects who have gone quiet

• Keep the sales pipeline tracker updated and accurate



Marketing and Content

• Schedule and post LinkedIn content from a provided content calendar

• Repurpose existing content (posts, articles, client case studies) into other formats

• Update the company website with new content, case studies, or team information

• Prepare and format marketing materials, one-pagers, and client-facing documents

• Maintain a competitor and market positioning reference file



Client and Project Administration

• Send invoices and follow up on outstanding payments

• Chase signatures on contracts and statements of work

• Prepare and send project status updates to clients

• Coordinate client onboarding logistics (kickoff scheduling, document collection, access setup)



Internal Operations

• Track team PTO, utilization hours, and project timelines

• Manage software subscriptions and renewal dates

• Coordinate with vendors for compliance, insurance, and managed services

• Update and maintain employee handbook, policies, and compliance documentation



Secondary Focus: Law Practice Admin Support (40%)

This portion is general administrative support for a solo law practice. No legal experience is required. All legal work and judgment is handled by the lawyer. Your role on this side is to keep the office organized, manage client-facing logistics professionally, and handle admin work so the lawyer can focus on her clients.



Scheduling and Client Communication

• Manage the lawyer’s calendar and coordinate client meetings

• Screen and route incoming calls and
s; flag urgent items

• Respond to routine client inquiries using provided templates

• Conduct initial client intake calls using a provided script and questionnaire

• Send reminders for upcoming meetings and appointments



File and Document Organization

• Open and set up new client files in the practice management system (training provided)

• Organize and index client documents and correspondence

• Populate standard templates with client information for the lawyer’s review and finalization

• Send out prepared documents for signature using Adobe or similar virtual signing tools

• Archive and close out completed files per firm procedures



Billing and Admin

• Prepare invoices from time entries for the lawyer’s review

• Send invoices to clients and follow up on outstanding accounts receivable

• Organize expense receipts and support bookkeeping

• Maintain client contact lists and referral partner databases



Marketing Support

• Schedule and post social media content from a provided calendar

• Update the firm’s website with new content as provided

• Collect and help publish client testimonials and reviews



Requirements

• 3+ years of experience as a virtual assistant, executive assistant, or in a BPO/administrative role

• Exceptional attention to detail. This is non-negotiable.

• Strong written and spoken English with a professional tone

• Self-starter who takes initiative, follows through consistently, and thrives with autonomy

• Comfortable working North American Eastern Time hours

• Experience with common business tools: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Teams, Adobe, and Zoom

• Ability to maintain strict confidentiality with sensitive client and business information

• Familiarity with LinkedIn (Sales Navigator experience is a plus; we will train)

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional work environment



Strongly Preferred

• Experience supporting sales or marketing activities, such as managing a CRM, researching prospects, scheduling social media content, or coordinating outreach campaigns

• Demonstrated ability to create or format polished marketing materials

• Prior experience supporting a small business owner or professional services firm



Nice to Have

• Experience with Canva or basic graphic design tools

• Experience in financial services, consulting, or B2B professional services

• Familiarity with Microsoft Fabric, Vena, Power BI, or similar FP&A/analytics platforms (we will train)

• Prior experience supporting a law firm or professional services practice (not required; we will train)



What You Get

• A long-term role with a growing consulting firm and a stable law practice, not a short-term gig

• All software licenses and tools provided (LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Adobe, Microsoft 365, practice management software, and others as needed)

• Direct working relationship with both business owners

• Clear path to expanding scope and responsibility as the consulting firm grows

• Paid time off and other benefits consistent with Philippines employment standards



How to Apply

Please send your resume along with a brief message (3 to 5 sentences) explaining why you are a good fit for this role. Highlight any experience supporting a small business owner, working across multiple priorities, or managing sales and marketing coordination.



Include your hourly rate expectation in USD and your availability to start. We value reliability, discretion, and a proactive attitude. If you are someone who takes ownership of tasks and follows through consistently, we would love to hear from you.

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
We’re an employee-owned, vertically-integrated company operating in the pet space. 



With 30+ tea
mbers across Europe and worldwide, we specialize in direct-response marketing, creating high-converting ads and VSLs that generate 7+ figures annually.



We prioritize quality, responsiveness, and velocity—delivering creative that doesn’t just look good but drives conversions. 



If you’re a top 1% video editor who thrives in performance-driven environments, keep reading.



We’re Looking For: A High-Performance Direct Response Video Editor



We need an extra-talented video editor who understands both direct response marketing and high-impact storytelling. 



You will be responsible for editing short and long-form video content, crafting compelling motion graphics, and structuring edits that maximize engagement, retention, and conversion rates.



This is a remote role, but you’ll be part of a global team collaborating on high-budget campaigns for
, YouTube, and VSLs. If you know how to turn raw footage into money-making assets, we want you.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Edit and assemble raw footage into scroll-stopping, high-converting ads and VSLs.

- Develop and integrate motion graphics that enhance persuasion and storytelling.

- Optimize hook, pacing, and retention to maximize performance.

- Work with marketers, copywriters, and media buyers to test and refine creatives.

- Stay updated on what’s working in paid ads and apply performance data to your edits.

- Manage multiple projects under tight deadlines while maintaining high-quality execution.



What You Bring to the Table:



- A strong aesthetic eye. We care about taste — technique can be taught.



- A portfolio that shows polished, detail-oriented work.



- Experience editing for e-commerce brands or YouTube channels.



- Deep understanding of platform-specific ad formats (FB, IG, YouTube).



- Knows how to hook an audience within 3 seconds and maintain engagement.



- Works fast, meets deadlines, and thrives in a high-performance team.



- Bonus #1: Experience in the pet niche.



- Bonus #2: Experience with AI video generation and voice tools such as Sora, Veo, HeyGen, Higgsfield, Dreamface, ElevenLabs, or similar. 



Why Join Us?



- Work on high-budget ad campaigns that generate real results.

- Remote-first—work from anywhere, collaborate with top-tier talent worldwide.

- Be part of a 7-figure company where great work is valued and rewarded.

- Join an elite team of A-Players who push for excellence in every project.



How to Apply:



DON’T REPLY to this job post, but click the link below and fill the form. Those who do not follow this first simple instruction will be immediately excluded.



Apply now here:

title: Trainee Full Stack Developer (Computer Science Graduates Only)
description:
About Us:

Unit Network is building world-class technology in AI, blockchain, and decentralized systems. We are passionate about nurturing the next generation of developers and giving young talent the opportunity to gain real-world experience. Our mission is to empower ambitious graduates to become highly skilled full stack developers capable of building the future of the internet.



The Opportunity:

We are opening trainee positions for fresh graduates in Computer Science and related fields. This is a structured career development program where you will learn, build, and grow into a professional full stack developer.

What We Offer:

Content Production: Record 1 short-form video (Reel/TikTok/Short) daily.



Video Style: Energetic "reaction" or "commentary" style videos over provided trading clips featuring the GainzAlgo indicator.



Engagement: Focus on high-retention "hooks" and expressions to stop the scroll.

No Experience Needed: We provide the content and the growth strategy. Trading knowledge is a "plus" but not required.

Payment & Benefits

Milestone Payouts: Payments are processed every 10 videos.

title: Short From Video Editor $12/ Reel
description:
Hey, I'm Callum — a 19-year-old creator and marketer building a personal brand around My life, marketing, and AI 



I'm hiring a short-form video editor for my personal brand content, with real potential to grow into additional work across my agency's clients (we have ongoing short-form + long-form needs).



What you'll be editing:

* 40–70 second talking-head reels (me to camera)

* Clean, smooth, caption-driven edits

* Simple b-roll / image overlays to visualize what I'm explaining

* Focus is clarity and flow — NOT flashy effects, crazy zooms, or editing for editing's sake

* The edit should make the message easier to follow, not distract from it



If you're the kind of editor who adds a whoosh and a shake to every cut, this role isn't for you. I want someone who understands less is more when the content itself carries the weight.



Compensation:

* $12 USD per finished reel, paid via EasyPay every 2 weeks

* Onboarding (first 2 weeks): 5 reels/week at $12/reel (~$120 total). This is a paid trial where we align on style, workflow, and feedback.

* Ongoing (week 3+): 10 reels/week at $12/reel (~$516/month)

* Scale path: If the work is consistently great, i can eventually happily bump to $15/reel and open up additional workload from my agency's clients. I'm not trying to find the cheapest editor — I want someone who's actually good at this and wants to keep getting better. Pay will reflect that.



Why this role is different:

* You work directly with me — no project managers, no agency middle layer

* I'll give you detailed feedback in the first two weeks so we lock in the style fast. I'd rather over-communicate early than have you guessing.

* Multiple income streams over time (personal brand + agency clients)

* Fast, reliable payment via EasyPay.

* Im not looking for cheap editing, im looking for a tea
mber.



What I'm looking for:





* Portfolio with 3+ short-form examples in a similar style (clean, caption-driven, b-roll overlays)

* Fast turnaround — 24–48 hours per reel

* Clear, responsive communication (Good English)

* Willingness to do a paid test reel ($15 one-time) before the 2-week trial, so we both know if we're a fit



What I provide:

* Raw talking-head footage (usually shot vertical)

* A script or bullet-point notes for each reel

* 3–5 reference reels I love so you can see the target style

* Detailed feedback, especially early on

* Consistent pipeline — no weeks of silence then a flood of work



How to apply:

1. Send your portfolio — specific reel links, not just a website

2. Tell me what editing software you use

3. Your weekly availability and typical turnaround time

4. Include the phrase “pura vida" at the top of your message so I know you read the full post

5. (Optional) One sentence on why this role interests you



Applications without a portfolio or the keyword will be ignored. I get a lot of applicants and I need a way to filter for people who actually read.



Looking forward to finding the right person. Let's build something long-term.

— Callum

title: Full-Time YouTube Editor + Shorts Specialist + Growth Strategist
description:
Please read this job post in its entirety.  Applicants who do not follow instructions will not get a response nor be considered.  Thank you.  



Additionally this could be a very big opportunity.  We are intending to turn this into a company with built in clients already.  We are a multi billion dollar company with 500+ real estate teams in our ecosystem  



We’re a fast-growing real estate media brand creating YouTube and short-form content focused on helping people make smarter real estate decisions.



We’re looking for a full-time YouTube expert who can:

 • Edit long-form YouTube videos

 • Create high-performing short-form content

 • Support scripting and content ideas

 • Help grow the channel



This is not just an editing job.

We want someone who understands how YouTube works and how to make content perform.



What You’ll Be Doing



YouTube Long-Form Editing

 • Edit 10–20 minute videos with strong pacing and storytelling

 • Add b-roll, graphics, captions, and sound design

 • Improve flow and retention (not just visuals)



Short-Form Content (Custom Content)

 • Edit short videos (usually under 2 minutes) from raw footage

 • Add captions, b-roll, and visual elements

 • Focus on strong hooks and keeping attention

 • Create content for Shorts, Reels, and TikTok



YouTube Growth & Strategy

 • Help come up with video ideas that will perform

 • Assist with titles, hooks, and overall structure

 • Understand retention, CTR, and watch time

 • Bring ideas to improve channel performance



Script & Content Support

 • Help improve scripts, hooks, and video structure

 • Contribute ideas for both long-form and short-form content



Team Support

 • Help edit videos for agents on our team

 • Maintain consistent quality across content

 • Be reliable with communication and deadlines



Who This Is For



You:

 • Have experience editing YouTube videos and short-form content

 • Understand what makes videos perform, not just look good

 • Know how to improve retention, watch time, and engagement

 • Can contribute ideas, not just follow instructions

 • Are reliable, detail-oriented, and consistent



Requirements

 • Strong portfolio (YouTube + Shorts/Reels/TikTok)

 • Experience working with creators, brands, or channels

 • Understanding of YouTube strategy and content structure

 • Full-time availability and reliable internet



How To Apply (REQUIRED)



If you do not follow these steps, your application will not be considered.



1. Portfolio



Send:

 • 2–3 YouTube videos you edited

 • 3–5 short-form videos you edited

 • Links to channels or brands you’ve worked with

 • Brief explanation of your role



2. Background



Answer these questions:

 • What YouTube channels or creators have you worked with?

 • Have you helped grow a channel?   If yes, how?

 • What do you think makes a video perform well on YouTube?



3. Test Project (Important)



Selected applicants will be given:

 • A 5-minute YouTube clip

 • A short-form raw video (under 2 minutes)



You will edit both.



We will evaluate:

 • Hook and pacing

 • Storytelling and structure

 • Retention editing

 • Use of b-roll and captions

 • Overall editing decisions



This is the most important step.



Compensation

 • Full-time role

 • Pay based on experience

 • Long-term opportunity



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow quickly.



As we expand, you may:

 • Support multiple real estate agents and teams

 • Take on a lead editor role

 • Help manage content across multiple channels

 • Play a bigger role in strategy and growth



Final Note



We are not looking for a basic editor.



We are looking for someone who understands:

 • YouTube

 • Content

 • Attention



If that’s you, apply and show us your work.

title: Amazon PPC & Growth Specialist (Health, Supplements & Household Brands)
description:

This role is not entry-level. You must have a proven track record of driving revenue growth, optimizing ad performance, and staying fully compliant with Amazon policies, especially in regulated categories like vitamins and supplements.



* Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize Amazon Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns



Develop data-driven PPC strategies to increase sales while maintaining strong ROAS and TACoS



Perform advanced keyword research, search term mining, and negative keyword optimization



Scale winning campaigns while identifying and reducing wasted spend



Monitor listing compliance (health & supplement claims, restricted terms, policy risks)



Create weekly and monthly performance reports, including:



Sales growth



ACOS / TACoS



Conversion rates



Keyword and campaign performance insights



Provide clear recommendations and actionable growth strategies beyond PPC:



Budget reallocation



Listing improvements



New campaign structures



Launch and scaling strategies



Collaborate with the internal team to align ads with branding and compliance requirements



* Required Experience & Skills



3+ years of hands-on Amazon PPC experience

Strong experience with health, wellness, supplements, vitamins, or household products

Deep understanding of Amazon Advertising policies, especially for regulated categories

Proven ability to scale accounts while staying compliant

Advanced knowledge of:



Keyword research & campaign structuring



Search term analysis



Budget optimization



Scaling without violating Amazon policies



- Experience with tools such as:



Helium 10



Keepa



Seller Central reports



Excel / Google Sheets for reporting

Before & after results showing:



Sales growth



ACOS / TACoS improvements

Your experience specifically with supplements or health products



Applications without proof of results will not be considered.



Schedule



Paid on the 1st of every month



Full-time position



Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

title: CRO Specialist & Landing Page Optimization Expert (Shopify, E-commerce)
description:

This is not just a design role — the main goal is to increase conversion rate, AOV, and revenue through structured testing and data-driven decisions.

- Plan and run A/B tests (headlines, layouts, offers, bundles, messaging)

- Analyze performance (conversion rate, CTR, scroll depth, AOV)

What we’re looking for:

- Strong understanding of customer psychology and buying behavior

- Experience with Shopify (custom sections, page builders, or code edits)

Nice to have:

Important:

To apply, please include:

- Your approach to CRO and testing

title: DME INTAKE/BILLING
description:
Overview:



VIP DME & VIP NEMT is a rapidly growing healthcare services company based in California, serving patients across the Central Valley. We specialize in durable medical equipment (DME) and non-emergency medical transportation.



We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to manage patient intake, order processing, and insurance verification. This role is critical to ensuring patients receive timely care and that all documentation is accurate and compliant.



Key Responsibilities:

Patient Intake & Data Entry

Collect and enter patient demographics into our system (Brightree or similar)

Verify completeness of intake documentation:

Full name, DOB, address, phone

Height, weight, gender

Insurance information (primary & secondary)

Physician information

Ensure all required forms are completed prior to processing orders



Order Processing (DME & NEMT)

Review incoming orders for accuracy and completeness

Input and manage orders for:

Hospital beds, wheelchairs, walkers, commodes, etc.

Flag missing documentation and follow up with providers



Insurance Verification

Verify eligibility and benefits (Medicare, Medi-Cal, Medicare Advantage plans)

Confirm:

Active coverage

DME benefits

Authorization requirements

Document verification results clearly in system notes

Prior Authorization Support

Prepare and organize documentation for prior authorization submissions

Ensure all required clinical notes, ICD-10 codes, and prescriptions are included

Track authorization status and follow up as needed



Communication & Follow-Up

Call doctor’s offices, hospitals, and patients to obtain missing information

Maintain professional and clear communication at all times

Escalate urgent patient needs quickly

Compliance & Accuracy



Ensure all work meets Medicare/Medi-Cal and insurance compliance standards

Avoid errors that could lead to claim denials or audit risk

Maintain HIPAA compliance at all times



Requirements:

Previous experience in:

Medical Virtual Assistant / Healthcare BPO (REQUIRED)

DME, medical billing, or intake experience (HIGHLY PREFERRED)

Strong understanding of:

Insurance verification

Prior authorizations

Medical terminology (ICD-10 familiarity preferred)

Excellent English communication (spoken & written)

High attention to detail (this is critical)

Ability to multitask and manage high volume

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Preferred Experience (Bonus):

Experience with Brightree, Office Ally, Noridian, Availity or similar systems

Experience with:

Medicare / Medi-Cal

DME billing workflows

NEMT scheduling

Prior U.S. healthcare account experience



Working Hours:

Must be available during U.S. Pacific Time (California hours)

Flexible scheduling available based on performance



Compensation:

Competitive (based on experience)

Performance-based increases and bonuses available



What Success Looks Like in This Role:

Clean, complete intakes with minimal errors

Faster order turnaround times

Reduced claim denials due to missing information

Strong communication with providers and patients



How to Apply:



Please submit:



Resume

Brief summary of your experience in medical intake or DME

Screenshot or description of systems you’ve used (Brightree, EMR, etc.)

Voice recording (1–2 minutes introducing yourself)

title: Bookkeeper/Accounting Assistant
description:
Overview

Sterling Insurance Brokers Ltd. is seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Bookkeeper / Accounting

Assistant to support our Accounting Manager / Controller.

This role focuses on executing day-to-day accounting tasks including transaction entry, accounts

receivable and payable support, processing payments, and assisting with reconciliations. You will

work under the direction of a senior accountant who will review your work.

This is an execution-focused role requiring strong attention to detail, consistency, and organization.



Key Responsibilities

• Record daily financial transactions accurately and maintain organized records.

• Track accounts receivable and assist with collections follow-ups.

• Process accounts payable and prepare payments.

• Assist with client refunds and maintain proper documentation.

• Support bank and account reconciliations and flag discrepancies.

• Organize financial data and support month-end close.



Qualifications

• 1–3+ years of bookkeeping or accounting assistant experience.

• Basic understanding of AR, AP, and reconciliations.

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy.

• Comfortable working under direction and following structured processes.

• Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets.



Nice to Have

• Experience in insurance brokerage or MGA environments.

• Familiarity with Applied Epic or similar systems.

• Experience in high-volume transaction environments.



What Success Looks Like

• Accurate and timely transaction entry.

• Up-to-date AR/AP records.

• Smooth processing of payments and refunds.

• Organized records for efficient review.

• Reduced backlog in accounting tasks.



Reporting Structure

Reports directly to the Accounting Manager / Controller.



Application Instructions

To apply, please include the word “Sterling” in the subject line of your proposal or in the first line of

your message. Applications without this will not be considered.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Do not apply if you are a beginner. Marketing Experts only. 4 years Experience minimum



We are seeking a results-oriented Digital Marketing Specialist to join our growing team. Reporting directly to the Director of Marketing, you will be responsible for executing multi-channel campaigns and driving growth through SEO, paid media, social platforms, and
 lifecycle management.



This role requires a forward-thinking marketer who stays ahead of the curve by integrating AI-driven tools into their workflow to maximize efficiency and search visibility.

Social Media

Stay current with platform trends and AI-assisted content creation to maximize reach.



 Marketing

Build, test, and deploy
 campaigns, including newsletters and automated nurture sequences.



Manage list segmentation and hygiene to ensure high deliverability and engagement.

Qualifications

SEO Expertise: Proven experience in technical SEO, link-building, and utilizing AI tools to scale search performance.

How to Apply

To be considered for this position, please submit your resume and portfolio along with your answers to the following questions.



?? IMPORTANT: We are looking for your authentic expertise. Do not use AI to generate your responses. All answers must be written in your own words. We use detection tools to screen for AI-generated content; any application found to be using AI for these answers will be immediately disqualified.



Link Building: Describe a specific outreach strategy you have used to secure high-quality backlinks. How do you evaluate if a potential link-partner is worth the effort?



AI in SEO: How do you believe AI-driven search (SGE) changes the way we should approach keyword research compared to traditional search?



Ads & Analytics: If a Meta Ads campaign has a high Click-Through Rate (CTR) but a very low Conversion Rate on the landing page, what are the first three things you would investigate or change?



Social &
: Describe how you would use social media data to inform the content of an automated
 nurture sequence.

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
# Hiring 10+ Closers to Help Build Local Business Communities - $1,500-$4,000/Month



**Company:** Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)



**Location:** Remote - **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)



**Type:** Full-time Independent Contractor



---



## The Story Behind Start Over



Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

- Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

- Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

- Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

- Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)



It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.



---



## Why We Need You



We are looking for at least 10 cold caller closers to help launch and fill the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ closers across all our territories. 10 is a minimum target for Mississippi alone, not a cap - we will hire every qualified closer we find.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.



Your job is to find them, explain it, and close them on the call. One business per industry means urgency sells itself. Once the plumber in Jackson signs up, no other plumber in Mississippi can join. That is the hook.



---



## What You Will Earn



Commission is simple: **$100 for every $1,500 membership you close.** No cap. Pro-rated on cash collected, full commission once the full membership clears. Paid every Friday via Wise, PayPal or Payoneer.



| Monthly Closes | Commission |

|---|---|

| 15 (modest) | $1,500 |

| 25 (solid) | $2,500 |

| 40 (strong) | $4,000 |

| More | More |



Plus a $15/day base, paid daily, to cover your time while you ramp up and to guarantee you earn something from day one.



---



## The 14-Day Trial



We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:



- $15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

- Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

- **Day 1:** Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

- **Day 2 onwards:** Full production with daily minimums

- Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

- Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2



**Event attendees count too:** Every call you make that leads to someone attending a Start Over event and closing at that event earns you the same $100 commission. Attribution = whoever secured the attendance.



**To continue past day 14, you need to have earned $200 in commissions during the trial.** That is 2 full sales (or more in partial payments / event closes). This gate exists because we invest real time and resources in training you. If you cannot close 2 deals in 14 days, it is not the right fit - for either of us.



---



## What Makes This Role Different



**1. You are not hustling a bad offer.** Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



**2. You are part of a real team.** We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



**3. You have a growth path.** Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



**4. You get real support.** Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.



---



## The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:



- **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

- Monday to Friday, five nights a week

- **300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day** from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

- **10+ event bookings per day** (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

- Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

- End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

- Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)



It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.



---



## We Are Looking For Someone Who



**Must have:**

- 2+ years phone sales or closing experience

- **OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+** verified on your profile

- **NBI clearance** (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

- Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

- Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

- Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

- Own Zoom Pro account

- Reliable internet (**25+ Mbps** - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset



**Will thrive if you:**

- Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

- Care about what you sell, not just about commission

- Take coaching well

- Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

- Want a long-term role, not a quick gig



---



## Honest Caveats



- The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

- Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

- Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

- Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.



---



## Verification and Accountability



We use:

- **TimeProof** (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

- **GoHighLevel / Ringover** (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

- **Shared call tracker** (real-time logging)

- **Random call audits** (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)



This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

1. We know you are working the hours you claim

2. You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

3. Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls



We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.



**Zero tolerance for fraud:** Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.



---



## Termination



Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.



---



## Group Interview - Tomorrow



We are hosting a **group interview tomorrow (Saturday) at 7pm Manila time** (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).



**Zoom link:**




/meeting/register/628htlhiTgmuLE8vnNh4qg



This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

- Webcam and microphone working

- Professional background and attire

- Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

- Questions about the role



If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.



---



## How To Apply



Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:



1. **Name and location**

2. **Internet speed test screenshot** (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

3. **ID Proof score** (60+ required) and NBI clearance status

4. **Short summary of your sales experience** - where, what, for how long

5. **A 2-3 minute voice recording** where you:

- Introduce yourself

- Answer this directly: **"Can you do 120 connects per night and close $1,500 deals? Prove it."**

- Handle this objection
 *"I am already in BNI, why would I need another group?"*

6. **Your earliest start date**

7. **Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift** consistently



No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.



---



**Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for one real closer in Mississippi.**



We look forward to meeting you tomorrow

title: Accountant
description:
We are an airline consolidator specializing in group travel and are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Accountant to manage day-to-day financial records, reconciliations, reporting, and overall accounting processes.



This role is ideal for someone who is organized, accurate, proactive, and comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment.



Responsibilities

Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

Record daily financial transactions accurately

Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, and payment records

Prepare financial reports and summaries

Monitor incoming and outgoing payments

Track outstanding balances and follow up when needed

How to Apply

Your updated resume

Your expected salary

Why you'll be a great fit



 address:

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Instagram Reels & TikToks
description:
Job Title:

Short-Form Video Editor — Instagram Reels & TikToks

Job Type:

Part-Time (Flexible Hours)

Salary:

£100/month (with potential to increase as volume grows)

Number of Positions:

1



Job Description:

We're looking for a skilled short-form video editor to join PureVision Enterprise, a UK-based agency. You'll be editing Instagram Reels and TikTok videos for our brand — content focused on business, entrepreneurship, and the aesthetics clinic industry.

This is a part-time role. You'll receive raw footage filmed on a phone and turn it into polished, scroll-stopping short-form videos ready to post.



What You'll Do:



Edit 10-15 short-form videos per month (30-90 seconds each)

Add captions and subtitles to every video (bold, readable, animated text)

Cut out pauses, filler words, and dead space for a clean, fast-paced flow

Add trending or suitable background music and sound effects

Apply simple motion graphics, transitions, and zoom effects where needed

Deliver in 9:16 vertical format optimised for Instagram Reels and TikTok

Maintain a consistent visual style across all videos

Turnaround time: 24-48 hours per video





What We Provide:



Raw footage filmed on phone (talking head, behind the scenes, day in the life style)

Brand guidelines (colours, fonts, general aesthetic direction)

Reference videos showing the style and energy we're going for

Clear feedback on each edit so you improve over time





Requirements:



Proven experience editing short-form content (Instagram Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts)

Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing software

Strong sense of pacing — you know how to keep viewers watching

Clean caption and subtitle work (not basic auto-captions — styled, timed, and readable)

Reliable internet and the ability to upload and download video files quickly

Can deliver edits within 24-48 hours of receiving raw footage

Good communication — responsive on Slack or WhatsApp





Bonus (Nice to Have):



Experience editing content for personal brands or agency owners

Familiarity with trending Instagram and TikTok styles and formats

Basic thumbnail or cover image design

Experience with colour grading and audio cleanup

Understanding of what makes content perform well on social media





How to Apply:

Send a message answering these 3 questions:



Share your portfolio — link 3-5 examples of short-form videos you've edited (Instagram Reels, TikToks, or YouTube Shorts). If you have a portfolio website, share that. If not, share direct links to the videos.

What editing software do you use, and what's your typical workflow for a 60-second talking head reel?

What's your typical turnaround time for a single short-form edit?



Do NOT apply without a portfolio. We need to see your work before anything else.



About PureVision Enterprise:

We're a UK-based agency helping aesthetics clinics grow through automated booking systems. We're building a brand presence on Instagram and TikTok and need a reliable editor who can make raw footage look professional, engaging, and shareable.

This is an ongoing monthly role. If you deliver consistently, there's room to grow as our content output increases.

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Cold Caller Closers Wanted (10+ Roles) - Remote - $1,500 to $4,000 Per Month OTE - Start Over Movement



**Company:** Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)



**Job Type:** Full-time, Remote, Independent Contractor



**Working Hours:** Monday to Friday, **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (PHT)** = 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time. Graveyard shift, no exceptions.



**Compensation:** $15 per day base + $100 commission per closed sale, uncapped



---



## About Start Over Movement



Start Over Movement is a growing network of local business chapters founded by Sir Marco Robinson. Our members are local business owners who refer business to each other, get marketing advice directly from Sir Marco, and receive a commission-only closer assigned to their business to help them generate more revenue.



Each chapter holds a maximum of 300 members, with only one business allowed per industry per chapter. Membership is £1,500 per year (UK) or $1,500 per year (US and Canada).



**Currently hiring: 10+ closers for Mississippi** (this is our minimum target, not a cap - we will hire every qualified closer we find)



This is part of a broader expansion to 100+ closers across all territories. Other active and upcoming chapters (currently full, expanding, or launching soon, future opportunities):

- Laguna Beach, California

- Tampa Bay, Florida

- New York, New York

- London, United Kingdom

- Toronto, Canada



**Mississippi is where we are growing the team fastest right now.** Strong performers will be prioritised for placement in new territories as they launch.



---



## The Role



You are a cold caller closer. Full cycle sales. You open the call, qualify the business owner, handle objections, and close them into the chapter on the same call where possible. You are not an appointment setter. You are not booking calls for someone else to close. You own the close.



**Close hierarchy (in priority order):**

1. **Close on the call** - sign them up and take payment there and then

2. **Get them to the next FREE event** - Sir Marco attends in person, high conversion environment

3. **Book a Zoom follow-up** - for prospects who need more time



---



## Compensation Structure



### 14-Day Paid Trial



- **$15 per day base**, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days only - see Verification section)

- **Full commission on all sales closed during trial**: $100 USD per closed $1,500 membership, pro-rated on cash collected (example: $750 collected = $50 commission; full $100 once full membership clears)

- **Event attendee rule:** If a prospect you called attends a Start Over event and closes there, you get the full $100 commission. Attribution is based on who made the call that secured attendance.

- Commission paid every Friday, 7 days after sale clears

- Training, onboarding, and live coaching included throughout the trial

- Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass live roleplay by end of day

- Day 2 onwards: Full production on real calls with daily minimums



### Performance Gate to Continue



To keep the role beyond day 14, you must **earn $200 in commissions during the trial period** (equivalent to 2 full closed sales, or more in pro-rated partial payments).



- Hit the gate = ongoing role at $15/day + $100 per sale, uncapped

- Miss the gate = trial ends, final payment settled within 7 days



This gate exists because we want real closers. If you cannot close 2 sales in 14 days with our script, our leads, and our training, this role is not for you.



### Ongoing Role (Day 15+)



- $15 per day base, paid daily via Wise

- $100 commission per closed sale, pro-rated on cash collected

- Commission paid every Friday, 7 days after sale clears

- Payment via Wise, PayPal or Payoneer (your choice)

- **No cap on sales**



### Illustrative OTE (commission only, plus base on top)



| Month | Sales | Commission |

|-------|-------|------------|

| Month 1 | 15 sales | $1,500 |

| Month 2 | 25 sales | $2,500 |

| Month 3+ | 40 sales | $4,000 |



---



## Daily Work Standard



From **Day 2 of your trial onwards** (after Day 1 training and roleplay pass), you must meet ALL of these minimum standards on every working day:



**Daily minimums:**

- **300 dials OR 120 connects per day** (whichever you hit first)

- **10+ event bookings per day** (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event) OR **1+ direct sale closed** OR **15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked**



- "Dials" = outbound calls made, verified through our dialler system

- "Connects" = calls of 30 seconds or longer with a live contact (not voi
)

- "Event bookings" = confirmed attendance at the next Start Over event (logged in tracker with contact details)

- Verified via GoHighLevel initially, Ringover shortly after onboarding



This is the bare minimum definition of a day's work. An experienced cold caller hits 300 dials comfortably within 5-6 hours of a 9-hour shift. If you cannot hit either threshold, you either did not work the full shift or did not put in real effort. Either way, the day is not complete.



**Audit and Fraud Prevention:** We audit random recorded calls daily (minimum 5 per contractor). Fabricated connects, dials to invalid numbers, use of mouse jigglers or activity simulation tools, fake call logs, or any misrepresentation of work performed = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work is withheld or clawed back from future commission.



**Other daily expectations:**

- 5 days per week, Monday to Friday

- Working **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

- Log every call in real time on the shared tracking spreadsheet

- Submit daily report to the Cold Caller Manager at end of shift

- Attend twice-weekly meetings with the Cold Caller Manager



**Graveyard shift warning:** This is a true overnight role from Philippines. You will be working 9pm to 6am, five nights a week. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to this long-term. People who quit in week 1 because "I didn't realise how hard graveyard is" waste everyone's time.



---



## Payment Verification



Payment is based on hours actually worked, verified by a combination of:

- **TimeProof** (screenshots and activity tracking, you install on your own machine via your OnlineJobs.ph account)

- **Dialler activity** (GoHighLevel initially, Ringover after onboarding)



Any material discrepancy between claimed hours and verified activity will result in payment adjusted to verified levels only.



---



## Termination



This is an independent contractor role. **The Company reserves the right to terminate this engagement at any time, with or without cause, and without notice.** Reasons may include but are not limited to:



- Failing to meet the daily 300 dial / 100 connect minimum

- Failing to hit the $400 commission gate within the 14-day trial

- Misrepresentation of hours, dials, connects, or work performed

- Any other reason at the Company's sole discretion



Upon termination, the Contractor is paid only for verified hours worked and commissions earned on sales closed prior to termination.



---



## What We Provide



- Full proven cold calling script (refined across thousands of calls)

- Complete training and onboarding programme

- Leads and assigned territory

- Booking link and calendar setup (handled by our team)

- Dialler access (GoHighLevel, transitioning to Ringover)

- Shared tracking spreadsheet for call logging

- Twice-weekly coaching meetings with the Cold Caller Manager

- Direct reporting line into Marco Fernandes (39 years of sales experience, Sales Director)

- Support from the wider Systemise & Sell team



---



## What You Need



**Required:**

- Minimum 2 years phone sales experience (cold calling and closing)

- **OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+** verified on your profile

- **NBI clearance** (or willingness to provide within 2 weeks of hire)

- Fluent English with a clear, neutral accent

- Ability to work full 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, five nights a week

- Reliable laptop, headset and stable internet (**minimum 25 Mbps** - speed test screenshot required with application)

- **Own Zoom Pro account** (required for follow-up Zoom calls)

- Quiet, professional environment with no background noise

- Willingness to be recorded on every call for quality and coaching

- Ability to pass a live roleplay before going live on real calls

- TimeProof installed and running during all paid hours



**You will thrive if you:**

- Have closed high-ticket offers ($1,000+) before

- Have B2B sales experience, especially with small business owners

- Are competitive and motivated by uncapped commission

- Take coaching well and apply feedback fast

- Can handle rejection without losing 
ntum

- Have experience selling coaching, consulting, BNI, networking groups or community memberships (bonus)



---



## Who This Is NOT For



- Appointment setters (this is full cycle closing)

- Part-timers who want 2 to 3 hours a day

- Anyone who cannot commit to 300 dials or 120 connects per day, plus 10+ event bookings or equivalent conversion output

- Anyone uncomfortable being recorded or logging every call in real time

- Anyone who has not closed a sale on the phone before

- Anyone unwilling to work Mississippi Central Time business hours (overnight from Philippines)



---



## Contract Terms



- Independent contractor agreement (you are not an employee)

- Governed by the laws of England and Wales

- 12 months non-solicit clause

- 2 years confidentiality clause

- Termination at will by either party, with or without cause, without notice

- Contractor covers own taxes in their country of residence



---



## How To Apply



Send us:



1. **Your full name and current location**

2. **Internet speed test screenshot** (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps download)

3. **OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof score** (must be 60+) and confirmation you have or can obtain NBI clearance

4. **Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM to 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift** consistently, Monday to Friday

5. **A voice recording (2 to 3 minutes)** answering:

- **"Can you do 120 connects per night and close $1,500 deals? Prove it."** - tell us about your biggest closes and how you would hit the numbers

- Walk us through how you would handle this objection: *"I don't have time for another networking group."*

6. **Your earliest start date**



Upload the voice recording to Google Drive, Dropbox or attach as an audio file.



**Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.** The voice recording is how we filter for serious closers. If you cannot record a 3-minute voice note, you are not the right fit for a phone sales role.



---



## GROUP INTERVIEW - TOMORROW



We are running a **group interview tomorrow (Saturday) at 7pm Manila time** (12pm UK time, 7am Mississippi Central time).



Zoom link:




/meeting/register/628htlhiTgmuLE8vnNh4qg



Serious applicants should:

1. Send your application (name, location, voice recording, start date) via OnlineJobs.ph message BEFORE the interview

2. Attend the group interview with your webcam on and a professional setup

3. Be ready to do a live cold call roleplay on the call



This is a hard filter. If you cannot make 7pm Manila tomorrow, send your application anyway and we will consider you for the next round, but priority goes to those who attend live.



---



**Start Over Movement. Remote first. Performance based. Real money for real closers.**

title: Social Media & Admin Virtual Assistant
description:

I am hiring a Virtual Assistant who can assist with Admin & Social Media tasks.



I am looking for someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and reliable, who can learn systems quickly and keep things running smoothly when I am unavailable.



This role is focused on execution, consistency, organization, and content repurposing.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with the business over time.





WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR



Someone who:



-Can learn systems quickly and execute tasks without repeated instructions

-Has strong attention to detail (very important)

-Is organized, reliable, and proactive with task completion

-Has strong English communication skills 
 + written)

-Can manage time and prioritize tasks independently

-Is comfortable working independently once trained

-Can identify patterns and improve efficiency over time

-Has a creative eye for content repurposing (turning one idea into multiple posts)

-Has experience (or interest) in photography, branding, or creative work





PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Client & Admin Management (High Priority)

-Send follow-ups and reminders

-Create and prepare contracts, proposals, and invoices

 inbox organized and up to date

s and outreach messages

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



-Tasks are completed correctly the first time

-Clients receive fast, clear communication

-Content is posted consistently across platforms

-Nothing falls through the cracks

-The business stays organized even when I’m working full-time





WHAT I VALUE IN THIS ROLE



-Attention to detail

-Organization

-Reliability

-Efficiency (working smarter, not harder)

-Clear communication

-Consistency

-Completing tasks on time

-initiative (improving speed and accuracy over time)





PLATFORMS YOU SHOULD KNOW OR BE READY TO LEARN

-Notion

-Google Drive (Docs, Sheets, etc.)

-Instagram

-LinkedIn

-Pinterest

-TikTok

-Squarespace

-CapCut

APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (REQUIRED)



To apply answers these 4 questions:



1.Start your application with the phrase: “I pay attention to details”

    A client hasn’t responded in 3 days after receiving a proposal. Write a follow-up
.

Turn this topic into content:

Topic: “Why small boutiques need professional photographers”

4.How would you prioritize the following tasks:



-Responding to client
s

THIS ROLE IS NOT A GOOD FIT IF YOU:
