title: LinkedIn Consultant (B2B leads)
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a sharp, creative LinkedIn Content Writer who can build a powerful personal or brand presence on LinkedIn, one that stops the scroll, earns trust, and drives real engagement. This isn't a copy-paste content mill role. You'll be crafting 5 high-quality posts per week that combine authoritative writing with visually compelling, data-driven infographics and model-style graphic design.



What You'll Do

You'll write and publish 5 LinkedIn posts daily, each crafted to educate, provoke thought, or inspire action within a specific niche. Every post must feel like it came from a credible expert, not a content scheduler. Alongside your writing, you'll design or direct infographics, carousel frameworks, and model-style visual breakdowns. Think clean hierarchy, bold typography, and data visualization that makes complex ideas instantly digestible.



You'll research trending topics and industry conversations to stay ahead of the curve, develop a consistent voice and editorial calendar, A/B test hooks and formats, and analyze post performance to continuously refine the content strategy.



What We're Looking For

You have at least 2 years of experience writing professional content for LinkedIn, with a portfolio that proves you can drive engagement, not just impressions. You understand what makes a LinkedIn hook work in the first three lines, and you know how to structure a post for maximum dwell time and comments.



On the design side, you're comfortable in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Express and can produce infographics that look like they belong on a top-tier thought leader's feed. You have a strong eye for layout, color, and information hierarchy. Bonus points if you've grown a LinkedIn account from scratch or ghostwritten for executives or founders.



Non-Negotiables

Consistency is everything here: 5 posts per week, every week, on schedule. Each piece of content must be original, well-researched, and free of generic filler. You take ownership of results and aren't waiting to be managed.



Compensation

Competitive, based on experience. Performance bonuses tied to engagement growth and follower milestones.



Bonus

Candidates with linkedin posts links to showcase their competency will get priority in interview.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
**Customer Service Representative**

Remote | Fashion eCommerce & Dropshipping | Part-time (2–4 hrs/day)

*With clear growth path to full-time*



---



We run a fashion dropshipping store and are looking for our first dedicated customer service hire — someone who takes ownership of the inbox, keeps customers happy, and helps build the support system around them.



This role starts at 2–4 hours per day. As the business grows and you prove yourself, hours will expand with it. The right person has a real path to becoming our full-time CS Manager.



---



**Growth opportunity**



This isn't just a support job. You're our first CS hire, which means you'll shape how we do customer service from the ground up. People who deliver quality and actively improve our processes will grow into a Customer Service Manager role as the team scales.



---



**What we're looking for**



You've done this before. You know how fashion dropshipping works — long shipping windows, supplier delays, sizing questions — and you handle them without drama.



• Minimum 2 years in customer support, including at least 1 year in fashion dropshipping or print-on-demand

• Proven ability to manage supplier delays, missing orders, and long ETAs without escalating customer frustration

• Experience handling returns, refunds, and sizing complaints specific to fashion products

• Excellent written English — clear, professional, and consistent across every interaction

• Spoken English is a plus



---



**Tools you'll use**



• Shopify — order and store management

• 
 — team communication



---



**What you'll do**



• Handle all inbound customer
s — refunds, tracking, FAQs, and complaints — within a 24-hour response window

• Manage refund and complaint reporting with precision and consistency

• Contribute to and improve our internal SOPs and support documentation

• Maintain a professional, on-brand tone in every message — no duplicate
s, vague answers, or off-topic replies

• Stay reachable on 
 during working hours and join weekly team video calls



---



**What we offer**



• 2–4 hours per day to start, with a clear path to full-time as the business grows

• Clear SOPs and processes to get you up to speed quickly

• Direct access to the founders for questions and escalations

• A 2-week paid trial followed by a stable ongoing role for the right candidate

• A real path to CS Manager as the team expands



---



**Requirements**



• Available 2–4 hours per day, consistently and reliably

• Not currently working another full-time job

• Able to start immediately

• Organised, self-motivated, and proactive about improving processes



---



**How to apply**



Send us a short message about your experience with fashion dropshipping — what tools you used, what types of complaints you handled, and why you're the right fit for this role.



One small thing before you write your application:



We get a lot of applications. Most people skim job posts and copy-paste the same message to everyone. We don't want that. To make sure you're someone who actually pays attention to detail — which is, after all, the most important skill in customer service — we have a small request buried in this post.



If you've made it this far and genuinely read everything, you'll know what to do with that. Start your application title with your favourite fruit — that's how we know you're the real deal.



**Applications without the correct subject line will not be considered, regardless of experience.**



---



*— Ezana & Donny, Founders*

title: Short-Term Ops & Quality Management
description:
**Part-Time Night Shift Operations & Quality Control SpecialistP | Remote**



**About Us**

We are a a fast-growing short-term rental property management company operating vacation properties across the Orlando/Disney corridor. We run a tight, high-performing team and hold ourselves to a high standard — for our guests, our owners, and each other. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us, not just clock in and out.



**Role Overview**

This is not a passive monitoring role. You will own a critical slice of our operations — from the quality of every clean to the outcome of every guest issue that comes in during your shift. You'll exercise real judgment, represent our brand, and take initiative without being told. If you're looking for something to do on the side while working another job, this is not the right fit. We need your full attention and commitment.



**Hours:** Monday–Friday, 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST



---



**What You'll Own**



*Quality Control & Cleaner Management*



- Review post-clean photo submissions via Turno and make expert judgment calls on approval or rejection before every guest check-in

- Review, enforce, and continuously improve our cleaner checklists — you will own these documents

- Monitor cleaner ratings and deliver regular, specific feedback based on photos, guest reviews, and claims

- Place supply and maintenance orders as needed to keep properties guest-ready

- Identify patterns and proactively flag recurring issues before they escalate



*Claims & Owner Communication*



- File and manage guest damage claims from submission to resolution

- Track claim outcomes and notify property owners of successful results

- Share video walkthroughs and property updates with owners

- Request Google reviews from guests at the right 
nt

- Support ad-hoc projects as the business grows



*Night Shift Guest Operations*



- Own all guest communication during your shift — questions, emergencies, and last-minute issues

- Coordinate guard gate access and resolve entry issues in real time

- Escalate and document i
 appropriately



---



**Who You Are**



- **Already working in short-term rentals** — you know the platforms, the pace, and the problems that come up

- Extremely detail-oriented — you notice what others miss and you care about getting it right

- Strong sense of ownership — you don't wait to be told and you don't let things slip

- Curious and self-motivated — you actively look for ways to improve your work and the systems around you

- A clear, professional communicator in writing

- You want to grow within a company, not just fill a seat



**This Role Is Not For You If:**



- You don't have hands-on STR experience

- You are working or plan to work another job simultaneously

- You need someone to check on you to stay focused

- You're looking for something low-effort during quiet hours



---



**Requirements**



- Prior short-term rental experience (Airbnb, VRBO, 
, or property management company) — **required**

- Dual-monitor setup + laptop *(photo required with application)*

- Fast, reliable internet *(speed test screenshot required)*

- Typing test completed at 
 *(screenshot required)*

- Willingness to work under screen monitoring software during shift hours



---



**Schedule & Compensation**



- Part-time | Monday–Friday, 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST

- Fully remote

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- **Growth opportunity:** For the right person, there is real room to grow over time. Tea
mbers who demonstrate ownership, consistency, and curiosity will have the opportunity to expand into other areas of the business they're interested in.



---



**To Apply**

Please submit the following:



1. Resume or summary of relevant STR experience

2. Photo of your dual-monitor + laptop setup

3. Internet speed test screenshot from 

4. A few sentences on why this role interests you and what "ownership" means to you at work

title: Experienced Sales Virtual Assistant for MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD | Inbound Calls, Cold Calling, Outreach & Closing
description:
MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD is looking for a highly experienced Sales Virtual Assistant to join our growing company for the long term.



We are not looking for just another VA.



We are looking for someone confident, persuasive, professional, and hungry to grow with a company that is building something serious in the cleaning industry.



This role is for someone who is excellent on the phone, speaks very strong English, knows how to speak with leads professionally, can handle both inbound and outbound calls, and already has real experience working with a residential cleaning company, commercial cleaning company, or both.



You must be able to prove your experience.



We are building for the long term, and we want someone who is not just looking for a temporary job, but someone who wants to become part of a company with growth, stability, and ongoing opportunity.



Main Responsibilities

Answer inbound calls from potential clients

Make outbound calls and cold calls to generate new business

Follow up with leads quickly and consistently

Do client outreach in high volume

Speak confidently with potential clients and handle objections

Help convert leads into booked appointments or closed deals

Communicate professionally by phone, message, and

Keep lead information organized and updated

What We Are Looking For

Excellent spoken and written English

Strong confidence on calls

Proven experience in sales

Proven experience working for a residential cleaning company, commercial cleaning company, or both

Strong ability in cold calling and client follow-up

Experience with high-volume outreach

Ability to close deals

Persuasive, professional, and confident communication

Organized, reliable, and consistent work ethic

Important



You must be able to prove that you have already worked in this type of role.



Please do not apply if you do not have real experience in:



cleaning company sales

cold calling

client outreach

closing



We are only looking for someone who already understands this environment and can bring value from the beginning.



Why Join Us



MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD is a growing company with a long-term vision.



We are looking for the right person to grow with us as we expand. For the right candidate, this is an opportunity to build a stable long-term role inside a business that values strong performance, commitment, and results.



If you are ambitious, reliable, and know how to generate and close cleaning clients, this could become a very strong long-term opportunity for you.



To Apply



Start your application with: CLEANING SALES PRO



Then answer all of the following:



What cleaning companies have you worked for before?

Was your experience in residential cleaning, commercial cleaning, or both?

What exactly did you do in that role?

How much of your work involved inbound calls, outbound calls, and cold calling?

What results did you get?

How do you usually handle objections from potential clients?

What is your experience with high-volume outreach?

What is your experience with closing sales?

Please send proof of your previous experience in this industry

Please send a voice recording introducing yourself in English

Proof Required



Please send any of the following if available:



voice recording

screenshots

call recordings

CRM screenshots

references

proof of past work with a cleaning company



We are looking for someone strong, experienced, and ready to build something long term with us.

title: Route Mapping & Property Research Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a UK cleaning company looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help us build targeted residential walking routes for door hanger distribution.



You will use Google Maps, Google My Maps, Zoopla, and spreadsheets to identify high-value residential houses in the UK based on strict criteria.



Your Responsibilities:



Research UK residential areas using Google Maps and Zoopla

Identify houses worth £300,000+

Confirm properties have 3+ bedrooms

Exclude bungalows, flats, apartments, and inaccessible gated communities

Use Google My Maps to create tight circular walking routes

Add and organize 100–130 qualifying houses per route

Label areas, polygons, and route markers correctly

Update spreadsheets with route name, area, and number of houses mapped

Follow our SOP exactly without skipping checks



Requirements:



Strong experience with Google Maps and Google My Maps

Good research skills and attention to detail

Able to verify properties carefully before adding them

Comfortable using spreadsheets

Able to follow detailed instructions

Bonus if you have experience with Zoopla, Rightmove, UK property research, or route planning



Work Type:

Project-based / part-time



To Apply:

Start your application with the words: ROUTE MAP UK

Then answer these 4 questions:



What experience do you have with Google Maps, My Maps, or route planning?

Have you ever researched property data using Zoopla, Rightmove, or similar websites?

How do you make sure you do not include wrong houses by mistake?

Can you send a short sample or screenshot of similar research work you have done?

title: Ecommerce video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

 “I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you. 

Speak soon, Karos

description:
We are hiring a top level video editor to turn a finished script into a visually strong, high retention long form video.

We need someone who can match each part of the script with the right visuals, pacing, stock footage, motion graphics, text, sound design, and scene changes.

You must be good at:

Long form editing

Motion graphics

Visual research

Stock footage sourcing

Sound design

Pacing and retention

Documentary style storytelling

To apply, send

Your best 3 to 5 relevant edits

Your rate

Your turnaround time

The software you use

title: Script Writer for High-Converting Health Reels (Facebook Avatar Page)
description:
I’m looking for a reliable script writer to create high-converting short-form reels for a
 avatar page in the health & wellness niche.



Your role is not to create scripts from scratch, but to rewrite and improve proven reel formats.



You will be given access to a large database of successful channels and pages, so research is fast and structured. Your job is to take what already works and adapt it into new angles to promote our product: Pure Health Max NMN. 
 



What You Need to Understand:



What makes a script high-converting vs average

How to improve hooks for retention

How to clearly explain a problem and its internal cause

How to build a natural product bridge

How to promote without sounding forced



Responsibilities:



Write 4–6 short-form reel scripts per day

Rewrite and improve proven formats (not from scratch)



Follow a clear structure:



Hook ? Problem ? Internal Cause ? Explanation ? Product Bridge ? CTA



Schedule reels to be posted every ~4 hours (you will not need to manually post each time)



We Provide:



Proven reference content (channels & pages)

Clear structure and guidance

A simple, repeatable workflow once understood



Requirements:



Experience in short-form content or script writing

Basic understanding of viral hooks and audience psychology

Ability to follow structure and improve existing content

Consistency and reliability (very important)



Payment:



€5 per reel

4–6 reels per day (€20–€30 daily)



Important:

If you’re not comfortable with the payment or workload, please do not apply.



Also, only apply if you are serious, consistent, and able to follow instructions. This role is focused on execution, not creative experimentation.



Application Requirement:



To apply, rewrite the script below into a new angle to promote our product: Pure Health Max NMN (NAD+ support).



You can search for the product on Amazon if you need more context.



Instead of using the “Mother Satori” cultural reference, you must adapt the script using the character Shen — a Chinese medicine practitioner.



Your goal is to:



Improve clarity

Keep strong hooks and retention

Build a natural product bridge

Make the script more conversion-focused



Do not copy — improve and adapt.  :""  If the skin under your chin has started to loosen,

if your neck looks older than your face,

if it happened faster than you expected,

the problem is not your age, sugar.

I am Mother Satori, a holistic healer from African.

Save this video.

The problem is hidden inside.

It is your liver.

The neck is where collagen breaks down first.

It has thinner skin and less fat to protect it.

When your liver is clogged with toxins,

it cannot clear the waste in your blood.

That waste creates inflammation,

and inflammation destroys collagen,

faster than any amount of years.

That waste creates inflammation.

That is what loosens the skin under your chin.

Not time.

No firming cream fixes this.

No neck exercise rebuilds what keeps being destroyed from within.

In my practice,

we see this reversed all the time.

Clear the liver,

cool the inflammation, and the collagen holds.

The skin stops loosening.

Some of what was lost begins to return.

In holistic medicine,

we clean the liver with herbs passed down for generations.

Soursop, black seed, lemon root, and hibiscus.

These are bitter herbs.

Bitter compounds trigger your liver to produce bile.

Bile is what your liver uses to break down toxins

and push them out of your body.

When bile starts flowing again,

the liver finally clears the waste,

stops building up.

The inflammation has nothing left to feed on,

and your collagen stops breaking down.

That is when the skin under your chin stops loosening.

But here's the problem.

Almost all the herbs you find today are mass produced,

heavily processed, full of fillers, and completely weak.

You end up wasting money on herbs that do absolutely nothing.

There's only one brand I trust that combines all these herbs into one formula.

It's a small company called Serene Herbs.

Soursop bitters.

They use 100% pure organic herbs

and third-party test them right here in the United States.

Comment "t," and I'll send you the exact t recipe I mix my bitters with every morning.

I've attached the Amazon link to Serene Herbs Soursop Bitters in the comments and in my profile.

But ever since they became a No. 1 best seller on Amazon,

they're having a really hard time keeping up.

So if they're still in stock,

don't wait, because last time they sold out,

they were gone for months.  "" 



If you’re reliable and can consistently deliver quality work, this can become a long-term collaboration.

If you’re interested, please send your rewritten script along with any relevant information, samples, or previous work to:







Thank you.

title: Video Editor - YouTube for Business/Finance
description:
We're launching two YouTube channels covering business, AI, finance, and leadership and need an editor to grow with us long term.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Edit 5 Content Types: Mini-docs, talking heads, mini-series, interviews, and shorts.

- Match the visual style of reference channels

- Create motion graphics, kinetic typography, and data visualizations

- Advise on equipment for production quality.





CONTENT TYPES:



- Practical Business Guides (10–15 min, weekly)

- Mini-Documentaries (12–20 min, 1–2/month)

- Mini-Series / Experiments (10–15 min, 3–5 episodes)

- Interviews / Podcasts (30–60 min, TBD)

- Shorts (30–60 sec, as needed)



NOTE: The primary language is Italian, so you do not need to speak it, but you must be comfortable editing content you cannot understand





VISUAL STYLE REFERENCE:



Primary:

-  Starting Finance: 

- MRNBD: 

- Pietro Michelangeli: 

Secondary:

- Ali Abdaal: 

- Marcello Ascani: 

- Chapeau: 

Editing Style Sample:

- How I Made $3M+ Using Instagram DMs (Dan Martell): 





QUALIFICATIONS:



- YouTube editing portfolio with motion graphics

- Ability to match and maintain a defined visual style from reference channels

- Comfortable editing non-English footage

- English proficiency for communication and scripts





BONUS POINTS:



- A background in STEM is a massive advantage as you will be dealing with technical business and AI topics.

- Proven experience editing for channels with 100k+ subscribers





COMPENSATION:



- $70-$100 per video (negotiable based on experience)

- 8-15 vid/month, 13-18 min/vid

- Minimum guaranteed: $500-$700 per month

- Path to full-time as channels scale





HOW TO APPLY:



Start your application with the phrase "YOUTUBE VIDEO EDITOR". Applications without this phrase will not be reviewed.



Include the following:



1. Portfolio: At least 3 relevant edits (include motion graphics/data animation).

2. Your rate expectation

3. Updated CV

title: Experienced Amazon UK Admin / Operations VA (Seller ToolKit + Returns + Reimbursements)
description:
Please Read Carefully Before Applying



We are only looking for experienced Amazon UK Admin / Operations professionals who understand the backend of an Amazon FBA business and can help keep operations organised, accurate, and running smoothly.



This is not a beginner role.



We are looking for someone who has already worked inside a real Amazon UK business and understands how to manage the day-to-day admin and operational tasks that keep the business performing.



If you are detail-oriented, proactive, reliable, and take pride in doing excellent work — please continue reading.



?



About the Role



We are a fast-growing Amazon UK business looking for a high-level Amazon Admin / Operations VA to help manage and improve the backend of our FBA operations.



This role is for someone who understands that Amazon admin is not just
 handling.



You must be confident in supporting core operational areas such as:

 • Seller ToolKit (STK)

 • Returns management

 • Prep centre coordination

 • Invoice management

 • Buy sheet / spreadsheet updates

 • Sourcing cost / cost price updates

 • Inventory adjustments

 • Reimbursements

 • Seller Central case support / issue management

 • General Amazon operations administration



We want someone who is not only organised and accurate, but also proactive and innovative — someone who can improve systems, spot problems early, and bring ideas that make the business run better.



?



Key Responsibilities



You will be responsible for helping manage and maintain the operational backend of the Amazon UK business, including:



1)
 & Admin Management

 • Organise and manage Amazon-related
s

 • Categorise and prioritise
s correctly

 • Flag urgent issues such as cancellations, prep centre problems, customer issues, or account-related matters

 • Maintain clear communication and follow-up where required



2) Invoice Management

 • Collect, organise, and file supplier invoices correctly

 • Ensure invoices are linked to the relevant products / purchases

 • Keep invoice records clean, accurate, and easy to access

 • Support reconciliation between invoices, buy sheets, and inventory



3) Buy Sheet / Cost Price Management

 • Update and maintain sourcing / buy sheets accurately

 • Ensure cost prices are entered correctly

 • Track sourcing costs

 • Support accurate COGS / cost price updates

 • Maintain clean and organised spreadsheets



4) Prep Centre Coordination

 • Coordinate with prep centres regarding:

 • incoming shipments

 • check-ins

 • delays

 • discrepancies

 • missing units

 • issues with deliveries

 • Follow up proactively with prep centres when needed

 • Keep internal trackers updated

 • Help ensure stock moves through the process correctly



5) Returns Management

 • Handle and track Amazon returns

 • Help manage return workflows and outcomes

 • Support decision-making around:

 • resellable items

 • used / damaged returns

 • faulty units

 • disposal / removal / secondary sale routes

 • Maintain accurate returns records and trackers



6) Seller ToolKit (STK) Management

 • Use Seller ToolKit confidently for:

 • cost price updates

 • sourcing cost updates

 • inventory checks

 • reimbursements

 • refund / discrepancy reviews

 • tracking operational issues

 • Identify inconsistencies or missing data

 • Help keep STK accurate and up to date



7) Inventory Adjustments & Reimbursements

 • Review and monitor inventory adjustments

 • Understand how to identify issues relating to:

 • lost inventory

 • damaged inventory

 • removals / disposals

 • FC discrepancies

 • reimbursement opportunities

 • Assist in tracking and following up on Amazon reimbursements

 • Help support case preparation where needed



8) Seller Central Support

 • Be comfortable navigating Amazon Seller Central

 • Assist with:

 • checking listings / shipments / inventory status

 • reviewing case history

 • tracking problems

 • preparing information for escalations

 • identifying operational issues



9) Process Improvement / Innovation

 • Suggest improvements to systems and workflows

 • Identify inefficiencies and propose better ways of working

 • Help make the business more organised, scalable, and efficient

 • Think like an operator, not just a task-taker



?



What We Are Looking For



We are specifically looking for someone who has real experience in the following areas:

 • Amazon UK FBA admin / operations experience

 • Seller ToolKit (STK) experience

 • Returns handling experience

 • Prep centre coordination experience

 • Invoice management

 • Spreadsheet / tracker management

 • Sourcing cost / cost price updates

 • Inventory adjustments

 • Reimbursements / reimbursement tracking

 • Amazon Seller Central navigation and support



This role is best suited to someone who has worked in a serious Amazon UK operation before and understands the importance of accuracy, organisation, and proactive problem-solving.



?



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



To be considered, you must have:

 • Proven experience working in Amazon UK FBA admin / operations

 • Experience using Seller ToolKit (STK)

 • Experience handling Amazon returns workflows

 • Experience managing or coordinating with prep centres

 • Strong experience with invoice management and spreadsheet tracking

 • Understanding of sourcing cost / cost price updates

 • Understanding of inventory adjustments and reimbursements

 • Strong knowledge of Amazon Seller Central

 • High attention to detail

 • Strong communication skills

 • Reliability and accountability

 • Ability to work independently without needing constant supervision



?



Who Will Excel in This Role



You will do well in this role if you:

 • Take ownership of your work

 • Are highly organised and detail-oriented

 • Can spot issues before they become bigger problems

 • Understand the operational side of Amazon deeply

 • Care about accuracy and clean systems

 • Can think critically and not just follow instructions blindly

 • Bring ideas and improvements to the business

 • Want to grow long-term with a serious Amazon company



?



Why Join Us

 • Work directly with a serious and growing Amazon UK business

 • Long-term opportunity for the right person

 • Opportunity to grow into a more senior operations role over time

 • Be part of a team that values:

 • excellence

 • accountability

 • ownership

 • long-term thinking

 • continuous improvement



We are building a real team and want people who take pride in being great at what they do.



?



How to Apply



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.



To apply, you must do ALL of the following:



1. Start your application with the word: YES



2. Send proof of your previous Amazon admin / operations experience

This can be:

 • a brief explanation of previous roles

 • screenshots (if allowed)

 • sample trackers

 • systems you have managed

 • examples of tasks you have handled



3. List all Amazon tools and software you have used

For example:

 • Seller ToolKit

 • Seller Central

 • Keepa

 • SellerAmp

 • Google Sheets / Excel

 • Prep centre portals

 • Gmail / Slack / project management tools



4. Briefly explain your experience with the following:

 • Seller ToolKit

 • Returns handling

 • Prep centre coordination

 • Invoice management

 • Inventory adjustments

 • Reimbursements



5. Answer this question:



If inventory is missing, damaged, or adjusted incorrectly in Amazon, how would you identify whether it may be eligible for reimbursement, and what steps would you take next?



(Applicants who cannot answer this clearly likely do not have enough real experience.)



?



Final Note



We are only looking for experienced professionals who take pride in their work.



If you are a beginner, this role is not for you.



If you are highly capable, proactive, and want to grow long-term with a serious Amazon UK business — we would love to hear from you.

title: Paralegal/Attorney – Criminal Defense
description:
Position Overview:

We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Paralegal or Attorney to support our criminal defense practice. This role requires in-depth knowledge of criminal law, including motion preparation, legal research, and document management. The ideal candidate will be responsible for preparing motions, drafting legal documents, and ensuring compliance with legal procedures. They will work closely with attorneys to ensure the defense strategy is executed effectively, and help prepare cases for court. This is a remote position requiring exceptional written English, organizational skills, and a strong grasp of U.S. criminal law procedures fundamentals.



Key Responsibilities:



• Draft, review, and be prepared to file various legal documents including motions, briefs, and memoranda.

• Prepare appendices for motions, including organizing exhibits, declarations, and supporting documentation.

• Prepare the table of contents for legal filings, ensuring accuracy and compliance with court rules.

• Conduct in-depth legal research on complex criminal law issues and generate a research summary for the attorney.

• Analyze discovery materials to identify critical issues and inconsistencies.

• Prepare memoranda and case summaries to aid in litigation strategy.

• Assist in the preparation of motions for hearings, trials, and appeals, including motions to suppress evidence, dismiss charges, or modify bail.

• Manage case files, ensuring all relevant documents and evidence are properly documented and stored.

• Prepare discovery responses, subpoenas, and other legal documents as directed.

• Coordinate with clients, witnesses, and experts to gather information and evidence for cases.

• Maintain communication with the court, opposing counsel, and clients regarding motions, hearings, and court dates.

• Provide support during trial preparation, including organizing exhibits, trial briefs, and witness lists.

• Ensure all legal documents comply with applicable state and federal rules and deadlines.



Qualifications:



• Must be a Graduate of a law school (JD).

• Proven experience in criminal defense law, specifically in motion practice.

• Strong knowledge of court rules, procedures, and legal writing standards.

• Experience preparing appendices, tables of contents, and organizing large case files.

• Excellent research, analytical, and writing skills.

• Must have strong knowledge of legal citation

• Ability to manage multiple cases and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong communication skills and attention to detail.

• Experience with legal research tools (e.g.,Lexis/Nexis and Westlaw) and document management software, such as Clio CRM software.



Preferred:



• Prior experience in criminal defense law or litigation.

• Knowledge of specific motions in criminal defense, including motions to suppress, dismiss, and motions for bond 

        reductions.

• Familiarity with Nevada local court rules and procedures in criminal defense.



Application Process:



Interested candidates should submit the following:

• An updated resume.

• A cover letter detailing your experience with U.S. criminal law and Clio software.

• Two writing samples (legal motions or briefs preferred) with how long it required the applicant to finalize the presented 

        document (in hours) from the time the assignment was given to the document presented.

title: Credit Repair Specialist (Consumer Law, And Credit Sweep Focus)
description:
We are looking to bring on a skilled Credit Repair Specialist with strong experience in consumer law, advanced dispute strategies, and fast, effective results.



This is a part-time role to start, with a clear path to full-time and increased compensation as we scale.



What We’re Looking For:



* Strong understanding of FCRA, FDCPA, and consumer protection laws (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

* Ability to use consumer law to produce fast, ethical, and permanent deletions — not temporary removals or simple updates

* Experience with data breach sweeps / identity-based deletion strategies for clients seeking the fastest possible results

* Ability to dispute and remove:

    * Late payments

    * Charge-offs

    * Collections

    * Repossessions

    * Inquiries

    * Bankruptcies

    * Closed & open accounts

* Familiarity with:

    * CFPB, FTC, BBB complaint escalation

    * DisputeFox or similar software

    * Experian, TransUnion, Equifax dispute systems

* Ability to produce clean, consistent, and permanent results

* Understanding of litigation-based dispute strategies (highly preferred)



What You’ll Be Doing:



* Managing client credit profiles and dispute rounds

* Executing advanced, law-based dispute strategies (not just basic templates)

* Running data breach & identity-based sweeps where appropriate

* Escalating cases through CFPB, FTC, BBB when needed

* Identifying violations and leveraging them for deletion

* Providing strategic insight on complex files



Compensation:



Pay is based on experience and performance:



High performers will be rewarded with:



* Increased pay

* More client volume

* Full-time opportunities



Bonus Points If You:



* Have worked with successful credit repair business

* Understand how credit ties into personal & business funding approvals

* Can suggest better strategies, systems, or automation improvements



Important:



We are not looking for template disputers.



We are looking for someone who understands how to use consumer law and strategies to get results that stick.



Apply With:



* Your experience

* Specific results you’ve achieved

* Tools/software you’ve used

* Proof that you can get results from both consumer law and credit sweeps

* Why you’re a good fit

title: Part-Time Content Creator + Admin Support
description:
About Nokvex



Nokvex is a Philippines-based content studio serving remote agencies and freelancers across Australia and North America. We offer flexible payment in USD or PHP, treat our team as long-term partners, and keep communication clear and respectful.



---



The Role



We're looking for a Part-Time Content Creator with light admin support responsibilities. This is a long-term role with a clear path to full-time.



20 hours/week | $300/month USD ($70/week) | Weekly payment | Starting immediately



---



Schedule



- 20 hours/week distributed across Monday to Friday primarily

- Flexible - you choose your daily hours within PHT business time

- Occasional weekend support (max 2x/month) for urgent content or time-sensitive posts

- Results-based, not hour-based monitoring



---



Main Responsibilities



1. Video Editing (40%)

- 2 long-form YouTube videos per month (8-15 minutes each)

- 8 short-form videos per month (30-60 seconds, Reels/Shorts/TikTok)

- AI education content, cartoon/Nickelodeon-inspired style

- Dynamic captions, B-roll, basic motion graphics



2. Graphic Design (20%)

- YouTube thumbnails

- Social media post graphics (Canva)

- Simple branded assets



3. AI Asset Generation (15%)

- Image generation (Nano Banana, Midjourney, or similar)

- Character art, backgrounds, supporting visuals

- Following detailed briefs



4. Social Media Management (15%)

- Scheduling posts across Instagram,
, TikTok

- Basic caption drafting

- Engagement monitoring



5. Light Admin Support (10%)

- File organization (Google Drive)

- Basic research tasks (competitor analysis, data gathering)

- Spreadsheet updates

- Simple documentation



---



Growth Path



As our content volume grows, this role will evolve:



- Month 4-6: Hours may increase to 30-40 hrs/week, salary $450-$600

- Month 7-12: Option for full-time at $650-$800/month

- Scope will narrow to specialization (video editing + graphic design focus)

- SMM and admin tasks will transfer to other tea
mbers



Salary reviewed every 3 months based on performance.



---



Who You Are



- 1-2+ years experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve)

- Portfolio showing YouTube long-form AND short-form work

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva minimum)

- Familiar with AI image tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar) OR willing to learn fast

- Comfortable with social media scheduling tools

- Good English written communication

- Reliable internet (backup required)

- Available during regular PHT business hours



Bonus Points:

- Experience with cartoon/animation-style editing

- After Effects skills

- Thumbnail design portfolio (YouTube-specific)

- AI education or tech content experience



---



What We Offer



- $300 USD/month ($70/week), paid weekly via Wise

- 20 hours/week with flexible schedule

- Occasional weekend availability for time-sensitive tasks (max 2x/month)

- 13th month bonus after 6 months of continuous service

- 5 days paid time off per year, available after 3 months

- Clear 12-month growth path (part-time ? full-time)

- Long-term collaboration, not a gig

- Respectful, async-first work culture



---



How to Apply



Please send:



1. Your portfolio link (video editing + graphic design samples)

2. Short answer: What's your favorite editing project and why?

3. A 30-second Loom video introducing yourself

4. Your availability (days and PHT hours)



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 3 days and reply to everyone.



Learn more at

title: Video Editor — E-Commerce Ad Creatives (Long-Term)
description:
We run multiple e-commerce brands and spend heavily on Meta ads. We need a video editor who can keep up.



What you'll do:



Edit 1–5 minute video ads for
/Instagram — direct response, not brand fluff. You'll work from scripts we provide but you're expected to bring your own creative input. Specifically:



• AI-generated video using tools like Kling, Veo 3, Runway, etc. — you should already know these or be the type who figures them out fast

• Pixar-style animated ad creatives (AI-generated characters, scenes, storytelling)

• Mixed format ads combining AI-generated footage with sourced B-roll

• Multiple hook variations per concept

• Text overlays, captions, sound design, pacing for retention



You must:



• Be obsessed with staying current on AI video tools — if a new tool drops, you should know about it before we do

• Be fast and resourceful at finding high-quality B-roll and stock footage

• Understand direct-response ad pacing — hooks, retention, CTR

• Deliver clean work, fast. We need volume and quality

• Communicate clearly — ask questions before you start, not after you deliver

• Be proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut, or both. After Effects is a plus



Paid test task (required):



We'll send you a product and script. You create 1–2 edited videos with 3 hook variations each. You source the footage, music, and handle all editing. This is how we hire — no exceptions.



What you get:



• Stable long-term work, not a gig

• Room to grow into a lead creative role

• We pay properly and on time



To apply, send:



• Short intro + your experience with AI video tools specifically

• 2–3 ad samples you've edited (e-commerce preferred)

• Your software stack

• Availability (hours/day + timezone)

• Confirmation you'll do the paid test task



Don't apply if you're not willing to learn new tools every month. This space moves fast and we need someone who moves with it.

title: Facebook Ads Video Editor
description:
Ji Martial Arts is a premium martial arts performance brand founded by brothers Joshua and Joel Iyalla — elite martial artists with over 35 years of combined experience and a combined following of 3.5 million across social media. Our founder Joshua Iyalla holds three Guinness World Records including the world's fastest puncher. UFC fighter Michael "Venom" Page uses and endorses our product.

We are full-time content creators with over 10 years of combined experience in the industry. We understand content deeply and know exactly what we want. We need an editor who shares that same understanding — someone who can take our vision and bring it to life on screen with precision and creativity.

We are hiring a part-time
 Ads Video Editor to produce high-converting ad creatives for our flagship product — the Ji Full Body Resistance Band — and future products as we scale.

What the role looks like week to week:

This is a lean, structured role with predictable hours. You will work primarily on Mondays (6 hours) to source clips, edit all ads for the week, and deliver them for review. You will also attend a short tea
eting on Fridays (1 hour). If revisions are needed following review, you may be required for up to 2 additional hours on Tuesday. Total hours: 7–9 hours per week.

Growth potential:

This role starts part-time, but that will not stay the case for long. As Ji Martial Arts scales — increasing ad volume, launching new products, and expanding into new content — the demand for editing will grow fast. The right person will find their hours and responsibilities increasing naturally with the brand. For the editor who performs, full-time is a very realistic outcome.

What you will do:



Receive ad scripts via Slack every Monday and edit 3–5
 ad creatives per week

Source your own clips from our Airtable raw clips library

Generate AI voiceovers using ElevenLabs where required

Apply your own creative judgement on music, SFX, pacing, and visual effects

Log all clips used in Airtable after each edit

Upload finished edits to Google Drive following our naming convention

Move cards through our Notion pipeline at each stage

Attend a weekly tea
eting on Fridays

Action revision feedback when required



What we need from you:



Proven experience editing
 or Instagram ads specifically — not just organic content. A portfolio is required; applications without one will not be reviewed

Proficiency in CapCut — this is mandatory, not optional

A strong creative eye with the ability to match a premium, cinematic aesthetic

Familiarity with Airtable and Notion, or the ability to get up to speed quickly

Reliability — you hit deadlines and communicate proactively

Self-sufficient — you do not need to be hand-held through every task



This role is NOT for you if:



You have never edited a paid ad

You are not proficient in CapCut

You need every asset handed to you before you start

You cannot commit to Monday as your primary working day



To apply, complete our application form here: 

Applications without a portfolio of ad work will not be reviewed.

title: Full-Time Marketing Assistant (Local SEO, Reviews, and Systems) – Detail-Oriented + Smart Problem Solver
description:
FULL-TIME MARKETING ASSISTANT (LOCAL SEO, REVIEWS, SYSTEMS)



ABOUT US:



We are Breakthrough Basketball, a well-established basketball training company that runs camps and programs across the United States.



We serve thousands of players and families each year and are focused on improving our local online presence across hundreds of locations.



ABOUT THE ROLE:



We are hiring a full-time marketing assistant to help manage and improve our local online presence.



This role starts with execution (following systems and checklists), but will grow into owning projects and improving processes over time.



You do NOT need to be an expert.



But you DO need to be:



* detail-oriented

* reliable

* a good communicator

* able to figure things out



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



* manage and optimize Google Business Profiles (GBP)

* help generate and track customer reviews

* update listings, citations, and business information

* follow step-by-step SEO and marketing processes

* monitor rankings and report changes

* help improve systems over time (after training)



We have written systems and instructions for you to follow and complete the above tasks. 



IMPORTANT:



This is NOT just a task-following job.



We want someone who:



* pays attention to detail

* takes ownership over time

* notices problems and helps solve them



REQUIREMENTS:



* excellent written and spoken English

* strong attention to detail (VERY important)

* reliable and consistent

* able to follow instructions exactly

* comfortable learning new tools and systems

* available full-time (40 hrs/week, Mon-Fri)



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED):



* experience with SEO, Google Business Profile, or marketing

* experience with spreadsheets or tracking data

* past marketing or admin experience



COMPENSATION:



* $5 to $8 per hour depending on experience

* full-time (40 hours per week)



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY):



To be considered, you MUST follow ALL steps below.



STEP 1:

At the TOP of your application, write this exact phrase:



Breakthrough Basketball - Detail Matters



STEP 2:

Record a short video (2 to 4 minutes) and include the link.



In your video, answer:

1) Tell me about yourself and your work experience

2) Why are you a good fit for this role

3) Describe a time you had to follow detailed instructions



STEP 3:

Answer this question in writing:



If you were asked to double-check 50 business listings for accuracy, what steps would you take to make sure nothing is missed?



STEP 4:

Confirm this statement:



I am available full-time (40 hours per week) and can work consistently Monday through Friday.



IMPORTANT:



Applications that do NOT follow these instructions will NOT be considered.

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):

title: Social Media & Content Creator (with Graphic Design Skills)
description:
About Jolene

Jolene is a UK-based, female-founded brand known for its premium Nipple Covers – designed to give women comfort and confidence in every outfit. We donate 10% of profits to breast cancer charities, and our mission is to become the UK’s #1 nipple cover brand through meaningful content and community.



We’re now looking for a creative, reliable and highly aesthetic Social Media VA to take charge of our Instagram presence and grow our organic engagement.



Role Overview

You’ll be responsible for creating, scheduling and managing content across Instagram (and potentially TikTok/Pinterest down the line). From styling tips and bridal trends to fun, relatable 
 content – your job is to help bring Jolene’s personality to life online in a way that feels less like marketing, more like sisterly advice.



Key Responsibilities

- Create on-brand, engaging content for Instagram (Reels, static posts, 
s, carousels, story graphics)

- Use brand colours, fonts, and tone of voice (fun, empowering, stylish)

- Design 12–20 high-quality assets per week using Canva, Adobe, or similar tools

- Write captions in fluent, witty English (with British tone & spelling)

- Help plan and schedule a monthly content calendar in Google Sheets and Later

- Edit and repurpose testimonials, UGC and reviews into feed content

- Monitor engagement and suggest post ideas based on trends

- Occasionally assist with
 graphics, Pinterest pins, or basic video editing



Requirements

- Fluent English (written and spoken) – confident writing captions and understanding tone

- Strong graphic design skills – portfolio or Instagram examples required

- Proficient with Canva and/or Adobe Illustrator/Photoshop

- Experience managing Instagram pages for lifestyle, fashion or beauty brands

- Strong eye for aesthetic, typography and visual layout

- Reliable, organised, and proactive – able to manage a content calendar

- Basic understanding of trends in fashion, weddings, body confidence, etc.



Bonus (Not Required)

Experience editing short Reels or TikToks

Familiarity with UK culture, humour, and bridal/women’s lifestyle trends

Experience with Klaviyo or Shopify
 banners

Comfortable working with Google Sheets



Please send your CV and a portfolio (or sample IG designs) to 
 with the subject line:

SOCIAL VA – [Your Name]

?

* Draft and send customized dispute letters using FCRA-compliant language

* Utilize Credit Repair Cloud for tracking, automation, and client management

* File complaints with agencies (CFPB, FTC, credit bureaus) when necessary

* Monitor results and adjust strategies to maximize legal deletions

* Maintain detailed notes and compliance documentation

* Communicate updates and expectations clearly with clients



Administrative Duties (Sister Company Support):



* Organize and file electronic documents into proper folders and systems

* Maintain accurate digital records and client files

* Respond to client
s in a professional and timely manner

* Assist with onboarding documentation and data entry

* Support day-to-day administrative operations as needed

* Ensure confidentiality and proper handling of sensitive information



?



Qualifications:



* Proven experience in credit repair (required)

* Proficiency in Credit Repair Cloud (required)

* Strong knowledge of FCRA, FDCPA, and CROA regulations

* Experience with dispute strategies, collections, repossessions, and charge-offs

* Strong written communication skills (especially
)

* Highly organized with strong attention to detail

* Ability to multitask and manage both operational and client-facing tasks

* Self-motivated and able to meet deadlines without supervision



?



Preferred Qualifications:



* Experience working in a credit repair or financial services company

* Familiarity with Metro 2 compliance strategies

* Administrative or virtual assistant experience

* Experience handling sensitive or confidential client data

title: Jolene - TikTok Shop Creator & Operations VA
description:
Location: Remote

Type: Part time (15 hours per week, with potential to grow)



About Jolene

Jolene is a UK female founded brand on a mission to help women feel confident in what they wear. The brand designs premium silicone nipple covers that disappear under clothing, giving women a seamless and comfortable alternative to traditional bras. Jolene has grown quickly through community, creator partnerships and organic social media, with thousands of customers discovering the brand through TikTok and word of mouth.



As the business enters its next stage of growth, we are looking for a hands-on TikTok Shop Creator & Operations VA to work directly with the founder to scale brand awareness, partnerships and marketing campaigns.



Overview

We’re looking for a proactive and highly organised Virtual Assistant to support the day?to?day

operations of our TikTok Shop Creator Programme. You’ll be directly involved in creator

communication, outreach, and campaign coordination - keeping everything running smoothly

behind the scenes as we scale a fast?growing creator channel.



This is a fast?paced, hands-on role ideal for someone who thrives on structure, multitasking, and

helping creators succeed.



Key Responsibilities

Manage creator activity within TikTok Shop:

- Communicate with creators daily (messages, follow?ups, support)

- Send briefs and coordinate content requirements

- Assist with creator outreach and sourcing

- Manage sample requests within TikTok Shop Seller Centre

- Maintain accurate tracking of creators and activity

- Support general admin tasks across campaigns

- Ensure smooth execution of creator onboarding and deliverables



Requirements

- Strong written English skills

- Highly organised and detail?oriented

- Proactive, reliable, and responsive

- Comfortable managing multiple conversations at once

- Able to work independently

- Experience with TikTok Shop, influencer marketing, or creator outreach

- Familiarity with spreadsheets or tracking systems (e.g. Google Sheets)

Working Style

- Fast?paced, execution?focused environment

- Clear processes and expectations

- Communication through Slack/Email/WhatsApp (depending on workflow)

- Flexible hours with some overlap with GMT working hours preferred



To Apply

We value initiative, communication, and creativity - and we love working with people who get things done.

About the Role





We are a growing startup cruise travel agency in the US looking for a creative, tech-savvy Filipino Social Media Manager. As our first social media hire, you will lead our content strategy as a "team of one." This role is perfect for a night-shift professional who is an expert at blending traditional video editing with modern AI tools.

Strategy: Build and manage a content calendar tailored to the US travel market.



Video & AI: Edit pre-recorded cruise video and use AI tools (e.g., Canva, CapCut, HeyGen) to create high-impact reels and image-to-video content.



Design: Create high-quality static images and carousels for Instagram,
, and Pinterest.

description:
We're Hiring! 

AI Video Production Assistant

Full-Time



Hi! We run a fast-growing network of Youtube channels, publishing daily content across niches. We need a reliable, detail-oriented person to help us keep up with production.



This is a production role, not a creative one. You'll follow a defined workflow to take video concepts from start to finish — including scripting, video creation, and publishing — using a suite of AI tools we'll train you on. Expect to manage a high daily output across multiple channels.

This is a time consuming job, but with great opportunities to work with us for years to come.



What We're Looking For

• Available full-time (8 hrs/day, flexible scheduling)

• Strong attention to detail — accuracy in publishing matters

• Self-motivated and able to work independently

• Comfortable learning new browser-based AI tools quickly

• Reliable internet and responsive during working hours

• Good written English; you don't need to speak all languages we publish in

• Committed long-term — this is a core team role, not a gig



Nice to Have

• YouTube or content publishing experience

• Prior use of AI tools (writing, image, or video generation)

Compensation

Base: $300 USD/month + potential bonuses!

To Apply

We have a specific style and workflow, and we're looking for one dedicated editor — not a team or agency — who can learn our process and grow with us over time. You'll be working directly with project files in FCPX, so experience with that software is a must.



Requirements

- Proficient in Final Cut Pro X (FCPX) with the ability to work directly in project files (and zip up/send project files after each edit)

- Fluent English comprehension (you need to understand spoken and written English clearly to follow editing directions, voiceovers,  and work with our content)

- Available to work Tuesday through Saturday

- Able to handle 1–3 video edits per day to start

- Solo operator: you personally do the editing, not a team working under your name



Compensation

$20 USD per video to start, with room for increases as you prove yourself and gain experience with our stylle.



To Apply, Please Answer These Questions:



How long have you been editing video?

How long have you been editing specifically in FCPX?

On a scale of 1–10, how fluent are you in FCPX?

On a scale of 1–10, how fluent are you in English understanding?

Are you available Tuesday through Saturday for editing jobs?



We're excited to find the right person and build a great working relationship. If this sounds like a fit, we'd love to hear from you!



Here are some examples of the types of Reels we will be editing: 
/lucrativedynamics

title: Shopify Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:
NOTE: Please do not apply unless you have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.



We are looking for a senior Ecommerce Operations Manager with strong Shopify experience to oversee the day-to-day operations of a growing DTC brand. This is a full-time, remote freelance role focused on keeping the online store, fulfillment pipeline, and operational systems running smoothly while improving speed, accuracy, compliance, and customer experience.



Company: The Lion Advisory

Website: 



Language: English

Availability: Full Time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: AEST

Work Type: Freelance, Remote, Flexible Hours

Niche: Performance-Focused DTC, Ecommerce, Shopify

Payment: $ 2,000 - $ 4,000

Role Details: Operations Manager, Ecommerce (Shopify)



Responsibilities



-Manage the daily operations of the Shopify store to ensure listings, pricing, promotions, and overall store performance are accurate and up to date

-Oversee the full order process from checkout to dispatch, tracking, returns, and issue resolution with a focus on speed and accuracy

-Build, document, and improve SOPs across inventory management, warehouse workflows, and 3PL coordination

-Forecast demand and manage stock levels across SKUs to avoid stockouts and reduce excess inventory

-Track and improve core operational KPIs such as fulfillment time, shipping cost, COGS, return rate, and customer satisfaction

-Manage the operational tech stack, including Shopify apps and key integrations, to automate workflows and reduce manual tasks

-Work closely with marketing to support campaign launches, seasonal promotions, and subscription or recurring order programs

-Manage relationships with carriers, suppliers, packaging partners, and 3PLs while maintaining service quality as the business grows

-Identify operational issues that affect customer experience and implement fixes that improve retention and satisfaction

-Ensure operations follow relevant Australian compliance requirements for regulated health or therapeutic products sold online



Must-Haves



-5 to 8+ years of ecommerce operations experience, ideally in regulated categories such as health, wellness, supplements, or similar

-Strong hands-on Shopify experience, including admin workflows, app ecosystem knowledge, and platform limitations

-Proven experience managing fulfillment operations, inventory planning, and 3PL relationships at scale in Australia

-Strong analytical skills with experience in KPI reporting, dashboards, and data-driven decision-making

-Experience with ecommerce operations tools such as ShipStation, Starshipit, Cin7, TradeGecko, QuickBooks Commerce, or -similar platforms

-Strong project management skills with the ability to handle multiple workstreams and meet deadlines

-Process improvement mindset with a track record of identifying issues and implementing long-term fixes

-Working knowledge of Australian compliance requirements for regulated health or therapeutic goods sold online, including TGA-related considerations



Nice to Haves



-Experience in telehealth, pharmaceutical, medtech, or other regulated industries

-Familiarity with subscription or recurring ecommerce operations and logistics

-Familiarity with Shopify ecosystem tools like Klaviyo, Recharge, or loyalty platforms

-Experience working in founder-led or high-growth businesses where systems and processes are still being built



Benefits



-Competitive pay based on experience

-High ownership role with direct access to leadership

-Flexible remote work setup

-Opportunity to build and improve systems in a growing company

-Access to company products or services where applicable

title: Shopify Product Lister + AI Image Creator (GMC-Compliant Listings)
description:
We're an e-commerce company running multiple DTC Shopify brands jewelry, fasion niches. We're scaling fast and looking for a reliable, detail-obsessed product lister to join our team long-term.



What You'll Do



Create Shopify product listings that are fully Google Merchant Center (GMC) compliant — titles, descriptions, attributes, categories, all clean and correct.

Generate realistic AI fashion images using Freepik (and other tools) — images with real-looking models, proper lighting, and natural poses. No "AI-looking" images.

Use Claude and ChatGPT to work efficiently — writing descriptions, checking compliance, speeding up repetitive work.

Double-check every listing before marking it done. Mistakes cost us money and ad accounts.

Share ideas and feedback on how we can improve listings, visuals, and workflows. We want a teammate, not just a task-doer.





Must-Haves



Proven experience with Shopify product listings (please share examples).

Experience generating AI images with Freepik or similar tools — must be able to produce realistic fashion/product photography with models.

Detail-oriented to the point where you re-check your own work before submitting.

Comfortable using Claude and ChatGPT daily to work faster and smarter.

Familiarity with GMC policies and common disapproval reasons.

Reliable internet and ability to commit to consistent hours.





Schedule



First weeks (mandatory): Available 14:00–19:00 Philippine Time. Hours may extend depending on workload.

After onboarding: Schedule becomes more flexible once you're up to speed and delivering consistently.





Pay & Growth



Starting: $3/hour

Growth: up to $8/hour based on quality, speed, reliability, and the value you bring.

This is a long-term role. If you help us grow, we grow together — and your pay grows with us.





How to Apply Please send:



Examples of Shopify listings you've created (links preferred).

2–3 sample AI-generated fashion images with models that you made yourself (please specify the tool used).

A short note: which Shopify store or brand impresses you most right now, and why?

Your availability for the 14:00–19:00 PH window.

Applications without samples will not be reviewed.



To confirm you read this post carefully, start your message with the word "Carmen".

description:

Create strong hooks in the first seconds to grab viewer attention

Use fast-paced editing, zooms, and transitions

Follow trends and adapt content for viral potential

Ensure videos are optimized for audience retention and engagement



Important: Shorts are very short and must capture attention immediately, otherwise viewers will swipe away

Experience with video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, After Effects, etc.)

Understanding of YouTube Shorts / TikTok-style editing

Ability to create engaging, fast-paced content

Good sense of timing, storytelling, and trends

Basic knowledge of sound design and captions



Bonus Skills

Motion graphics / animations

Experience with viral content formats

Understanding of the YouTube algorithm and retention

title: AI Creative Asset Specialist
description:
Ubiquity Media is looking for a Senior AI Creative Asset Specialist to own the end-to-end generation of scalable creative assets for a single DTC brand, Pawty Dog Toys. This person will be responsible for producing and refining AI-assisted UGC-style content, static lifestyle imagery, short-form video, and campaign-ready creative assets that support paid social, organic social, e-commerce,
, landing pages, and internal brand initiatives.



This is a hands-on production role for someone who combines strong prompting and AI workflow skills with excellent creative judgment, channel awareness, pop-culture awareness and production discipline. The right candidate knows how to move quickly, generate at volume, and maintain a high standard of taste and consistency. They also understand how to prepare assets so they are immediately usable by growth, design, and editing teams across digital channels.



This person will help build a repeatable, efficient, and brand-safe content pipeline that allows Pawty to create more assets, test more creative concepts, and support growth without sacrificing quality.



Success in this role means producing high-quality, scalable creative assets that are immediately usable across Pawty’s digital channels and flexible enough for downstream editing, testing, and iteration.



TL:DR of the role: part AI prompter + part creative producer + part asset operations manager + part DTC performance creative thinker



Qualifications



5+ years of experience in creative production, digital content, design, performance creative, or AI-assisted asset generation

Strong hands-on experience producing assets with AI tools for consumer brands, ecommerce, or paid social environments

Proven ability to generate UGC-style content, static imagery, and short-form video assets that are commercially usable

Experience adapting assets for digital marketing channels including Meta, TikTok,
, web, PDPs, and landing pages

Strong file organization, version control, and asset management habits

Excellent communication skills with the ability to interpret briefs and turn ambiguous direction into strong creative output

Highly organized, self-directed, and output-oriented



Additional “Nice-to-have” Qualifications

Prior graphic design, photography, videography experience.

Experience preparing assets for paid social, ecommerce, web,
, and organic social specifications

Understanding of safe zones, aspect ratios, compression, file types, cutdown needs, and modular asset delivery

Ability to deliver assets in a way that allows designers, editors, and media buyers to easily repurpose or iterate on them



Qualifications

5+ years of experience in creative production, digital content, design, performance creative, or AI-assisted asset generation

Strong hands-on experience producing assets with AI tools for consumer brands, ecommerce, or paid social environments

Proven ability to generate UGC-style content, static imagery, and short-form video assets that are commercially usable

, web, PDPs, and landing pages
