title: EA / PA / VA
description:
Full-Time Executive Assistant (Remote) - Join a Global Social Impact Social Enterprise ScaleUp.

Salary: Up to 1000 USD / monthly (Full-Time, 160+ hours).

But at HubLearn Group, we focus on outcomes, not hours.

Thanks to our use of advanced tools and systems, much of the repetitive work is automated. 

This means your actual working hours will likely be much lower (if you can work with the setup), allowing you to focus on problem-solving, decision-making, and using your full human potential.



IMPORTANT: I personally review only applications that follow the instructions outlined in the “How to apply” section below. Please read carefully.

Do you want to work from home while contributing to a purpose-driven global international Danish social enterprise that is committed to co-create, upskilling and reskilling people around the world, no matter their background or class?

Are you a highly capable, business- and proactive-minded Executive Assistant who thrives in a dynamic environment and is ready to grow alongside a fast-scaling organization?



Welcome and please keep reading.



My name is Adam, and I am the Founder and CEO of HubLearn Group.

I am looking for a full-time, highly professional, proactive, and independent Executive Assistant who can support me at a high level while actively contributing to our shared personal growth.

This is not just a traditional assistant role. It is a long-term collaboration (2+ years minimum) where you will play a key part in scaling a global, mission-driven company while continuously developing your own professional and personal potential.

Due to my international travel schedule, your working hours will be aligned with your time zone, offering flexibility and autonomy in how you manage your work. 

For me, it is about solving the task and not the hours spent. For that reason, you will be paid the same amount no matter if you spend 80+ hours or 200+ hours monthly - It is the result and your growth that count!

Our social enterprise, HubLearn Group, is built on a clear vision: to increase access to knowledge, tools, and opportunities for individuals and businesses with limited resources worldwide. Through collaboration, education, and innovation, we aim to create meaningful and lasting impact.



The tasks I am looking for you to take ownership of include:

Responsibilities:

• Organising, coordinating, and communicating with all kinds of people, from top governmental stakeholders to local individuals in Y-country, ensuring that I (and you) are on track with meetings and one step ahead for upcoming meetings and CEO responsibilities

• Calendar management and meeting coordination

• Executing tasks communicated via voice memos, calls, or written instructions

• Starting, supporting, and updating the many global donation programs

• Creating written content for our social media platforms in collaboration with our content creator

• Managing and responding to business
s professionally and efficiently

• Proofreading, refining, and elevating my drafts

• Acting proactively and staying one step ahead by anticipating needs and priorities

• Ghostwriting and copywriting, with a strong focus on persuasive, sales- and empowering-oriented content

• Social media management, including writing, posting, engaging, and responding across platforms such as LinkedIn,
, Instagram, and YouTube

• Administrative support (largely automated), including follow-ups on events and meetings and transcription of videos and voice memos



This role requires someone who can work on their own, is proactive, curious, and wants to contribute - not just follow instructions. I expect you to take an active role in our collaboration by sharing your ideas, asking questions, and continuously looking for ways to improve how you and I operate.



You are someone who:

• Has strong English skills, both written and spoken, at a professional level

• Is an excellent communicator and writer who can create engaging, clear, and persuasive content

• Has a proactive mindset and takes ownership of tasks while keeping me consistently updated

• Works independently and delivers high-quality results with attention to detail

• Understands the role of being an EA while working remotely as my Virtual Assistant and how to provide exceptional support in a fast-paced environment

• Has strong digital skills and a stable internet connection

• Is comfortable working with a CEO who has a Nordic leadership style and with an international, diverse team

• Is eager to learn, grow, and continuously improve

At HubLearn Group, we are committed to your growth as much as our own. We aim to create an environment where you are supported, challenged, and given the tools to expand your potential.



What you can expect:

• Valuable experience in a global startup and scale-up environment

• Continuous professional and personal development

• Flexible working conditions

• Access to online courses and learning resources

• A collaborative, informal, and inspiring team environment

• The opportunity to make a real impact on people’s lives worldwide

• Potential opportunities to work in periods physically abroad in Denmark

• Study and obtain a higher degree education in Denmark

You will be part of the core main team at HubLearn Group while working remotely as an independent contractor under a contractor agreement and potentially later as an integrated employee with all the benefits of a Danish employee (health care, access to your own office worldwide, etc.).



How to apply for the position:

To be considered for this position, please complete the following tasks carefully. I will review your written tasks first before proceeding to the final step.

Task-1 Executive Scenario:

You receive this message fro
:

“I have multiple upcoming meetings with different stakeholders (government, partners, internal team), and I am traveling with no preparation done.”

Explain step-by-step how you would organize everything, what you would prepare for me, and how you ensure I stay one step ahead.



Task-2 Professional Communication:

Write a professional
 reply to a potential partner who is interested in collaborating with HubLearn Group but asks for more details about our mission and how we create impact.



Task-3 Task Execution from Ambiguous Input:

You receive a short voice memo fro
 saying:

“Follow up on the donation program, check where we are, and update me.”

Explain what actions you would take, what information you would gather, and how you would report back to me.



Task-4 Content & Copywriting:

Write a short piece of content (max 800 characters) that promotes a global initiative related to education, impact, or opportunity. The content should be engaging, clear, and include a call-to-action.



Task-5 Why you?:

• List four reasons why you are the ideal Executive Assistant for HubLearn Group

title: Founding Senior Full-Stack Engineer (AI, Web & Mobile)
description:
About the Company



We are building an AI-native operating system for real estate professionals.



Our mission is to transform how agents, brokers, and operators source deals, analyze opportunities, and execute transactions end-to-end—bringing everything into a single intelligent system powered by AI, automation, and real-time data.



We are building the “Harvey of real estate”—a platform where workflows that once took hours or days are executed in minutes.



Our MVP is already live and built using modern AI tooling (Lovable + Supabase). It demonstrates strong product-market potential, but now needs to evolve into a production-grade, scalable system.







The Role



We’re hiring a Senior Founding Engineer to take ownership of our platform and lead the next phase of development.



This is not a typical engineering role. You will operate as a technical co-builder, shaping architecture, product direction, and execution from the ground up.



You’ll transform a high-potential MVP into a robust, scalable AI platform—while moving fast and maintaining high standards.







What You’ll Do

 • Own and evolve the current MVP into a production-ready system

 • Architect and build scalable backend systems, APIs, and data models

 • Design and implement AI/ML systems using frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and modern LLM APIs

 • Develop AI-driven workflows and automation pipelines

 • Build and ship full-stack web & mobile applications (React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, Express)

 • Integrate third-party systems including:

 • MLS data providers

 • DocuSign

 • Gmail

 • Payment processors

 • Cloud services (AWS/GCP)

 • Manage and secure multi-API ecosystems (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Cloud, GitHub, etc.)

 • Implement secure API practices:

 • Key rotation

 • Token management

 • Permissioning systems

 • Build cloud-based CI/CD pipelines and deployment infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

 • Design and maintain RESTful and GraphQL APIs

 • Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability

 • Continuously evaluate and integrate emerging AI tools and models

 • Translate product ideas into high-quality, shipped features quickly

 • Collaborate closely with founders on product strategy and roadmap

 • Conduct code reviews, mentor future engineers, and help establish engineering best practices





Technical Requirements

 • Strong experience in JavaScript / TypeScript

 • Experience with React, Next.js, or similar frameworks

 • Backend development experience (Node.js, Express, or similar)

 • Experience building scalable APIs (REST & GraphQL)

 • Experience with Postgres or Supabase

 • Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

 • Experience working with LLM APIs and AI integrations

 • Experience building or deploying AI/ML models (TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar)

 • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and production deployments

 • Strong understanding of security best practices in API systems







What We’re Looking For

 • Builder mindset — ships fast, executes faster

 • Deep curiosity and passion for AI and emerging technologies

 • Ability to operate in high ambiguity environments

 • Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills

 • High ownership mentality — thinks like a founder

 • Product-minded engineer focused on real-world impact

 • Resourceful, adaptable, and constantly learning

 • Thrives in early-stage startup environments





Compensation

 • Competitive salary

 • Meaningful early-stage equity





Why Join

 • Build a category-defining AI product in real estate

 • Work directly with founders on core product and technical decisions

 • Shape the architecture of a platform from the ground up

 • Operate at the intersection of AI, automation, and real-world transactions

 • Be part of something positioned to redefine an entire industry

title: Senior SEO Specialist With Content Writing Experience
description:
**SEO Specialist & Content Writer – Part-Time | Sydney-Based Electrical & Security Company**



Hours: Part-Time

Schedule: Some overlap with Australian business hours preferred

Position Type: Long-term PT



**About Us**



Kmelectric is a growing electrical and security installation company based in Sydney, Australia. We have been serving the Sydney market for over 20 years and are expanding our digital presence to match our on-the-ground reputation.



We are looking for a talented, reliable, and experienced SEO Specialist and Content Writer to join our team on a part-time basis. You will be working across two websites — our existing Kmelectric website and a brand-new website currently under construction — helping us rank higher on Google, generate more leads, and grow both businesses through organic search.



This is a long-term part-time position for someone who is serious about their craft and wants to grow with a stable, established company.



**What You Will Be Doing**



• Manage SEO across two websites — our established Kmelectric site and a new site currently in development

• Write and develop content for the new website from the ground up as it is being built

• Implement on-page SEO improvements across all service pages on both sites

• Create and optimise location-specific suburb pages for local SEO

• Monitor keyword rankings and SEO performance across both sites using industry tools

• Manage and optimise our Google Business Profiles

• Build internal links and improve site structure across both websites

• Write and publish blog posts and website content regularly

• Assist with technical SEO recommendations

• Work directly with the business owner to improve lead generation through organic search



**What We Are Looking For**



Required:

• Solid understanding of SEO — especially Local SEO for service businesses

• Strong content writing skills in English — you will be writing content for a brand new website

• Experience with Google Search Console and Google Analytics

• Proven ability to optimise content and pages for search engine rankings

• Experience ranking service businesses in Google Maps / Local Pack

• Ability to manage SEO across multiple websites simultaneously

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to meet weekly deadlines and work well within a team environment

• Ability to communicate regularly and reliably with the team



Preferred:

• Experience launching and optimising new websites from scratch

• Experience using AI tools to assist with content writing

• Experience with service-based businesses



**Why Join Kmelectric**



• Long-term, stable part-time position — not a short contract

• Work directly with the business owner — no corporate layers

• Opportunity to manage and grow SEO across two websites

• Be part of the launch of a brand new website from day one

• Consistent work with clear goals and measurable results

• A company that values your expertise and invests in long-term relationships



**How to Apply**



Please send your application and include all of the following — applications missing any of these details will not be considered:



1. A summary of your SEO experience

2. Examples of websites you have worked on (URLs preferred)

3. Results you have achieved — rankings improved, traffic growth, leads generated

4. Your monthly salary expectation (in USD or PHP)

5. Your favourite SEO tool and why you use it



We look forward to hearing from serious applicants only. If you have the skills and want a long-term home with a growing Australian company, we want to hear from you.

title: Meta Media Buyer
description:
Meta Media Buyer - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $5–$10 USD Per Hour



MUST HAVE at least 2 years of experience running Meta ads for e-commerce brands

Hey there! We're a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we're looking for a Meta Media Buyer to join our team full-time. You'll work closely with our creative and strategy teams to launch, test, and scale winning ad campaigns for our Shopify customers.

Why This Role is Crucial:

This is one of the most important roles at our brand. If you're a skilled media buyer who thrives on launching campaigns that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your campaigns move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.

Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.

Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

As a Meta Media Buyer, you'll bring our team's deep strategic insights to life through precise campaign execution and sharp data analysis. Your ability to launch ads flawlessly, read performance data accurately, and make smart optimization decisions will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your buying decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every campaign is structured correctly.

Executing with precision — Launching campaigns cleanly, naming conventions done right, tracking in place, and zero sloppy mistakes. Attention to detail is non-negotiable.

Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Launch and manage Meta ad campaigns daily across multiple ad accounts.

Upload fresh creatives, set up A/B tests, and structure campaigns according to our playbook.

Monitor ad performance daily and flag winners, losers, and optimization opportunities.

Collaborate with our creative and strategy teams to ensure concepts are tested properly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Maintain clean, organized ad accounts with flawless naming conventions and tracking.

Communicate clearly in English — written and verbal — with the team every single day.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes Meta campaigns win or lose.

More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

You'll have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

Learn directly from operators running a multi 7-figure Meta ad operation.

Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you've been waiting for, I'd love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $5-10 USD per hour

Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to buy media from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology

Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday

Do you have experience buying Meta ads for eCommerce brands?

What got you started in media buying?

Experience:

Meta Media Buying: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience required. + Will to learn

How to Apply

Please include: A short introductory Loom video about yourself, your experience with Meta media buying (brands you've worked with, results you've driven), and up to 5 examples MAX of past ad accounts or case studies you've worked on. Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day).

Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: The one and only Executive Assistant (Remote) in a Global Social Impact Social Enterprise ScaleUp

Salary: Up to 1000 USD/month (Full-Time, 160+ hours)



At HubLearn Group, we focus on outcomes—not hours.

With advanced tools and systems, much of the repetitive work is automated. This means your actual working hours will likely be lower, allowing you to focus on problem-solving, decision-making, and using your full potential.



IMPORTANT: I personally review only applications that follow the instructions outlined in the “How to apply” section below. Please read carefully.

s professionally

This role is for someone proactive, curious, and independent—someone who contributes, not just follows instructions.



You:

• Have strong English communication skills

• Are a skilled writer and communicator

• Take ownership and stay structured

• Work independently with high attention to detail

• Understand remote EA work at a high level

• Have strong digital skills and stable internet

What you get:

• Access to learning resources

• A supportive and ambitious team

• Opportunity to create real global impact

• Potential to work and study in Denmark

How to apply for the position:



To be considered for this position, please complete the following tasks carefully. I will review your written tasks first before proceeding to the final step.



Task-1 Executive Scenario:

You receive this message fro
:

“I have multiple upcoming meetings with different stakeholders (government, partners, internal team), and I am traveling with no preparation done.”

Explain step-by-step how you would organize everything, what you would prepare for me, and how you ensure I stay one step ahead.



Task-2 Professional Communication:

Write a professional
 reply to a potential partner who is interested in collaborating with HubLearn Group but asks for more details about our mission and how we create impact.

You receive a short voice memo fro
 saying:

“Follow up on the donation program, check where we are, and update me.”

Explain what actions you would take, what information you would gather, and how you would report back to me.



Task-4 Content & Copywriting:

Write a short piece of content (max 800 characters) that promotes a global initiative related to education, impact, or opportunity. The content should be engaging, clear, and include a call-to-action.



Task-5 Why you?:

• List four reasons why you are the ideal Executive Assistant for HubLearn Group



Task-6 Short Video (max 2 minutes):

Record a short video introducing yourself and explaining why you are a strong fit for this role and how you would support a CEO working globally.



You may submit your application in any format you prefer (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, etc.).



I personally review applications on an ongoing basis and will hire as soon as I find the right person.



I look forward to hearing from you.



Best regards,

Adam D

Must-Haves:

title: Facebook Ad Creative Compliance Specialist — Health & Wellness EU
description:
About the role:

We are a growing European health and wellness e-commerce brand running direct response
 campaigns across Finland and expanding into new EU markets. We target the 50-70 age demographic with health, wellness and skincare products.

We need a creative specialist who takes existing competitor static ad creatives and transforms them into fully 
pliant versions — adjusting copy, headlines and visuals while preserving the core message and conversion power.



What you will do:



Take existing competitor ad creatives and recreate compliant versions

Adjust headlines, ad copy and creative elements to meet Meta health advertising policies for EU markets

Generate ad images using Nano Banana 2 based on detailed prompts

Use ChatGPT and Claude to refine copy and check compliance

Produce compliant creatives for multiple health and wellness products daily

Ensure every submission is ready to go live — no back and forth on basic compliance issues





What we are looking for:



Experience with health, wellness, supplements or skincare advertising on

Strong understanding of Meta advertising policies for health products — especially EU market regulations

Hands-on experience with AI tools — Nano Banana 2, ChatGPT, Claude

Fast worker — multiple products need creatives daily

Review this ad and identify all compliance violations, then rewrite the copy and suggest what the image should show to make it fully 
pliant:

"Cures joint pain in 72 hours — clinically proven. Before: could barely walk. After: back to normal. Doctors are amazed. Order now while stocks last — limited time 80% discount."

Applications without the completed screening test will not be considered.

Remote, fully flexible hours

Deliverables expected same day or next day

Weekly 30-minute video call for feedback and direction



leave your phone number / no phone number = no application

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
# Hiring 10+ Closers to Help Build Local Business Communities - $1,500-$4,000/Month



**Company:** Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)



**Location:** Remote - **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)



**Type:** Full-time Independent Contractor



---



## The Story Behind Start Over



Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

- Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

- Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

- Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

- Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)



It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.



---



## Why We Need You



We are looking for at least 10 cold caller closers to help launch and fill the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ closers across all our territories. 10 is a minimum target for Mississippi alone, not a cap - we will hire every qualified closer we find.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.



Your job is to find them, explain it, and close them on the call. One business per industry means urgency sells itself. Once the plumber in Jackson signs up, no other plumber in Mississippi can join. That is the hook.



---



## What You Will Earn



Commission is simple: **$100 for every $1,500 membership you close.** No cap. Pro-rated on cash collected, full commission once the full membership clears. Paid every Friday via Wise, PayPal or Payoneer.



| Monthly Closes | Commission |

|---|---|

| 15 (modest) | $1,500 |

| 25 (solid) | $2,500 |

| 40 (strong) | $4,000 |

| More | More |



Plus a $15/day base, paid daily, to cover your time while you ramp up and to guarantee you earn something from day one.



---



## The 14-Day Trial



We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:



- $15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

- Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

- **Day 1:** Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

- **Day 2 onwards:** Full production with daily minimums

- Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

- Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2



**Event attendees count too:** Every call you make that leads to someone attending a Start Over event and closing at that event earns you the same $100 commission. Attribution = whoever secured the attendance.



**To continue past day 14, you need to have earned $200 in commissions during the trial.** That is 2 full sales (or more in partial payments / event closes). This gate exists because we invest real time and resources in training you. If you cannot close 2 deals in 14 days, it is not the right fit - for either of us.



---



## What Makes This Role Different



**1. You are not hustling a bad offer.** Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



**2. You are part of a real team.** We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



**3. You have a growth path.** Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



**4. You get real support.** Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.



---



## The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:



- **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

- Monday to Friday, five nights a week

- **300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day** from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

- **10+ event bookings per day** (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

- Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

- End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

- Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)



It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.



---



## We Are Looking For Someone Who



**Must have:**

- 2+ years phone sales or closing experience

- **OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+** verified on your profile

- **NBI clearance** (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

- Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

- Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

- Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

- Own Zoom Pro account

- Reliable internet (**25+ Mbps** - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset



**Will thrive if you:**

- Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

- Care about what you sell, not just about commission

- Take coaching well

- Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

- Want a long-term role, not a quick gig



---



## Honest Caveats



- The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

- Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

- Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

- Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.



---



## Verification and Accountability



We use:

- **TimeProof** (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

- **GoHighLevel / Ringover** (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

- **Shared call tracker** (real-time logging)

- **Random call audits** (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)



This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

1. We know you are working the hours you claim

2. You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

3. Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls



We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.



**Zero tolerance for fraud:** Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.



---



## Termination



Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.



---



## Group Interview - Tomorrow



We are hosting a **group interview tomorrow (Saturday) at 7pm Manila time** (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).



**Zoom link:**  







This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

- Webcam and microphone working

- Professional background and attire

- Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

- Questions about the role



If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.



---



## How To Apply



Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:



1. **Name and location**

2. **Internet speed test screenshot** (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

3. **ID Proof score** (60+ required) and NBI clearance status

4. **Short summary of your sales experience** - where, what, for how long

5. **A 2-3 minute voice recording** where you:

   - Introduce yourself

   - Answer this directly: **"Can you do 120 connects per night and close $1,500 deals? Prove it."**

   - Handle this objection
 *"I am already in BNI, why would I need another group?"*

6. **Your earliest start date**

7. **Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift** consistently



No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.



---



**Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for one real closer in Mississippi.**



We look forward to meeting you tomorrow

title: Funnel Builder (Funnelish Experience Required)
description:
We're looking for a full-time Funnel Builder who doesn't just build — but thinks. You have proven Funnelish experience, you can write advertorials yourself, and you use AI tools daily to work faster and smarter.

The target output is 2–3 funnels per day. With our SOPs, templates, and proven structures, this is absolutely achievable. You'll build 1 strong core funnel per day and create 2–3 translated or adapted versions for other markets.

But speed alone isn't enough. We want someone who researches competitors, spots winning patterns, and comes to us with new angles to test — before we ask. You have a point of view on what converts and why.

We also need someone who can breathe new life into our proven winners. You take funnels that already performed, dig into current market trends, and come back with fresh advertorials, new hooks, and creative angles that make them convert again. You don't let a winner die — you evolve it.

You must be comfortable writing compelling copy — advertorials, headlines, CTAs — without needing someone else to hand you the words. You use AI (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) not as a crutch, but as a multiplier.

Communication is extremely important. If something is delayed, unclear, or not achievable within the deadline, you communicate immediately. We value transparency, ownership, and reliability. Being fully present during working hours and proactively updating progress is non-negotiable.

We are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes responsibility, and wants to build at scale long-term.



How to Apply

Start your application with "I am that person" and show us:



Links to 2–3 funnels you've built in Funnelish

Advertorials you have made from scratch

Which AI tools you use and how they make you faster

title: WordPress + SEO Operator — Own Our Website
description:
The role

Around Finance is a modern Irish accountancy firm and we're scaling. We're building an in-house marketing function and need a senior WordPress operator to own our website as a marketing asset.



This starts as on-call work — but the right person grows into a permanent fixture as we expand over the next 12–18 months. We want someone who'll learn our business, get faster and better with us, and become someone we trust without question.

You'd work directly with Richie (founder/CEO).



How it works

I send a Loom or written brief. You quote hours and turnaround. You complete the work and invoice. Sometimes that's 1 hour, sometimes 15, sometimes nothing for a month.

This works if you already have 2–3 anchor clients and want flexible top-up work. It doesn't work if you're looking for guaranteed weekly hours from day one.

The remit



Own the website. In practice that means:



WordPress page builds, edits, and updates

New landing pages from templates or from briefs

Theme refinements as the brand evolves

Conversion improvements — CTAs, forms, page structure, lead capture

On-page SEO — Yoast, schema, internal linking, image optimisation, URL structure, redirects

Technical hygiene — page speed, mobile, plugin management, security

Tracking — GA4, GTM, conversion events, Search Console

Monthly SEMrush research — competitor gaps, ranking opportunities, search intent shifts. One-page Notion summary, top 3–5 opportunities flagged.



If something needs a specialist developer or designer, flag it and we'll bring one in. The more you can own end-to-end, the better.

What we're looking for



3+ years WordPress experience

Previous experience with US, AUS, or UK professional services or B2B agency clients — strong preference, not optional

Strong on-page SEO — Yoast, schema, internal linking, image optimisation

Comfortable running SEMrush and presenting findings clearly

Familiarity with Search Console and GA4

Background in accounting, legal, financial services, or premium professional services is a real advantage

Excellent written English

Reliable turnaround on agreed timelines (24–72 hours)

Comfortable with on-call rather than guaranteed hours



Show us examples of your work.

A portfolio, links to live sites, or a Loom walkthrough. We don't need access to private back-ends.

What success looks like



Briefs completed accurately first time

Turnaround matches what you quoted

You flag issues before I notice them

You respond within 24 hours, even if it's "I can't take this one"

The website gets measurably better — speed, conversion, rankings, hygiene



Not a fit



Looking for full-time or guaranteed hours

Only worked for local PH clients or entry-level accounts

Need a lot of direction to get started

Want a minimum monthly retainer to commit



First task

First engagement is a small paid task (1–2 hours) so we can see how you work. If it goes well, we continue. If not, we part on good terms and you've been paid for your time.

How to apply



Start your message with the word TEMPLATES — applications without it won't be read.



Then tell us:



Who you've worked for, especially US, AUS, or UK professional services or agency clients

Examples of your WordPress work

Your on-page SEO and SEMrush experience

Your hourly rate in USD

Your current client load and capacity for ad-hoc work

How you'd handle a month with zero work from us





SKILL REQUIREMENT

WordPress, On-Page SEO, Search Engine Optimization

- Dislike structured processes

- Rush tasks or multitask

- “Wing it” instead of following rules



Tools



Google Sheets, Google Chrome (Remote Desktop), ChatGPT (assist only), internal SOPs, Notion



 What Success Looks Like



High accuracy, correct client profile every time, calm pace, minimal corrections



Accuracy over speed.



How to Apply (Important)



Include **all** of the following:



1. Number of monitors you use **with a photo**

2. A short example of a repetitive task you’ve done well

3. The phrase **“Accuracy over speed”** in your message



Applications that don’t follow instructions will not be reviewed.



Subject line: PT- LEAD

title: Graphic Designer
description:
GRAPHIC DESIGNER: FAST-TURN CREATIVE ASSETS

Full-time / Part-time | 20–40 hrs/week | Remote | Long-term Relationship



WE MOVE FAST.

If you thrive under tight deadlines and can produce polished work quickly, this role was built for you.



ABOUT US

We're a marketing agency called Motive (
) serving personal brands. We handle social media, video, podcasts, ads, slide decks, keynote presentations, and web projects for a range of high-profile clients, and we need a graphic designer who can keep up with our growth.



This is a long-term position. We're not looking for a one-off freelancer. We want someone who becomes a trusted part of our creative team and grows with us.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Design social media graphics, story templates, carousels, and branded content, often within same-day turnaround.

- Create thumbnails, event graphics, promotional materials, and presentation assets.

- Resize and adapt existing assets across multiple platforms and formats quickly.

- Maintain brand consistency across multiple client accounts simultaneously.

- Receive feedback and revise assets fast. We often need a second version within an hour.

- Organize and manage design files in shared folders so the team can always find what they need.

- Collaborate directly with our team via Slack throughout your day.



MUST-HAVES



Tools:

- Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator

- Adobe InDesign (a plus)

- Google Drive or Dropbox file management



Skills & traits:

- Strong typography and layout sense

- Excellent English comprehension

- Comfortable receiving fast, direct feedback

- Available during US Central Time hours



WHAT SETS THE RIGHT PERSON APART



We're not looking for the most technically advanced designer. We're looking for someone who is fast, reliable, and easy to work with. You take direction well, ask clarifying questions upfront, and don't disappear when things get busy. You know how to work across multiple brand styles without blending them together.



Experience in faith-based, nonprofit, or speaker/coaching content is a bonus, but not required.



POSITION DETAILS:

Hours: 20–40 hrs/week (flexible based on workload)

Type: Long-term, ongoing

Timezone: Must have strong overlap with US Central Time (CST)

Communication: Slack. Responsive during work hours if possible.

Portfolio: Required. Link in your application.



HOW TO APPLY:

Include a link to your portfolio or samples of recent work. In the first line of your message, write "Graphic Designer: I read the full post". This tells us you pay attention to details. Bonus: share one project you're especially proud of and what made it challenging.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

Comprehensive online training will be provided upon employment to support your development in these tasks.

title: Growth Video Editor — Meta Ad Creatives (TikTok Sourcing + Editing)
description:
We're a fast-growing B2B SaaS company looking for a full-time Growth Video Editor to create high-performing Meta ad creatives. Your main job is sourcing viral/trending content from TikTok and editing it into scroll-stopping ad creatives that drive results on
 and Instagram.



This is an execution role — we'll provide creative direction and briefs, you produce the ads.



What You'll Do:



- Source trending and relevant video content from TikTok daily

- Edit and repurpose TikTok videos into Meta ad creatives (different hooks, formats, lengths)

- Create multiple ad variations for A/B testing (different hooks, CTAs, text overlays)

- Add captions, text overlays, transitions, and branded elements

- Resize and format videos for different Meta ad placements (Feed, Stories, Reels)

- Deliver a consistent volume of fresh creatives weekly (target: 15-20 ad variations/week)

- Organize and maintain a creative asset library



You're a Great Fit If You Have:



- 1+ years of experience editing short-form video content (TikTok, Reels, Meta ads)

- Proficiency in video editing tools (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

- Strong eye for what makes content engaging — hooks, pacing, text placement

- Understanding of Meta ad formats and specs (aspect ratios, safe zones, length best practices)

- Ability to turn around edits quickly — we move fast and test a lot

- Familiarity with TikTok trends, formats, and what's currently working in paid social



Bonus Points:



- Experience editing Meta/Facebook ad creatives specifically

- Basic motion graphics or animation skills (After Effects, CapCut templates)

- Understanding of direct response advertising (hooks that stop the scroll, CTAs that convert)

- Experience with thumbnail creation



Why Join Us:



- Fully remote — work from anywhere

- Creative work with real impact — your ads directly drive revenue

- Small, fast-moving team — lots of ownership, no bureaucracy

- Consistent workload with clear deliverables



To Apply:



Send us 2-3 examples of short-form video ads you've edited (TikTok repurposes, Meta ads, or similar). If you don't have ad-specific samples, send any short-form video edits that show your style — hooks, pacing, text overlays, transitions. We want to see your editing skills in action.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT
description:
Executive Virtual Assistant -  Farm Girl - only apply if you have taken the tests : English must be C1 - IQ 120+ & 2 years + experience 



We’re looking for a highly organised, proactive and reliable Virtual Assistant to support the day-to-day running of Farm Girl.



This is a remote role, working closely with SJ and the on-site team, helping manage the backend of the business across admin, systems, communication and support.



Farm Girl is a busy wellness space with 7 therapists and one on-site admin lady, alongside Farm Girl Facial and additional wellness offerings. This role supports across all areas of the business and requires strong organisation, responsiveness and attention to detail.



About the Role

This is a varied support role focused on keeping the business running smoothly behind the scenes.

You will not be the main person managing the diaries, but you will act as a support and back-up to the on-site admin, helping ensure therapist schedules, bookings and client communication continue to run smoothly when needed.



You will need to be communicating with clients via WhatsApp and messaging, so it’s really important you can match our tone — warm, calm, professional and helpful.



You’ll also be expected to learn our booking system (Phorest), and over time become confident in running reports and identifying patterns — such as gaps in bookings, client retention and general trends — and flagging these back to SJ (founder)



Key Responsibilities

Admin & Operations



Supporting SJ with day-to-day admin and organisation

Managing general business admin across multiple areas

Assisting with urgent queries outside of on-site hours when needed



Diary & Booking Support (Back-Up)

Supporting the on-site admin with diary management when required

Reviewing the diary to understand therapist availability

Identifying gaps and flagging opportunities to fill appointments

Assisting with booking adjustments and client coordination

Sending consultation forms to clients if they haven't filled them in



Supporting Phorest backend (training provided)

Client Communication

Responding to WhatsApp messages where needed

Assisting with Instagra
ssages when required

Replying to Google reviews weekly

Ensuring all communication feels aligned with our brand (warm, thoughtful, professional)



Finance & Reporting Support

Maintaining a finance spreadsheet

Filing and organising invoices

Sending weekly invoices to the bookkeeper

Supporting with reporting through Phorest



Supplier & Stock Coordination

Monitoring stock levels and supporting retail product ordering

Placing orders with suppliers when required

Following up on deliveries and ensuring stock arrives on time

Liaising with suppliers regarding products, branding or any issues

Helping ensure the business is always well stocked and prepared



Digital Support

Managing Shopify listings

Uploading and organising content, including saving facial videos and assets



HR & Team Support

Logging sickness and updating records

Supporting rotas and team coordination

Keeping contracts and records organised



Farm Girl Facial - Training academy 

Supporting admin for training and courses

Assisting with onboarding



Events

Supporting admin for events and wellness sessions



We’re Looking For Someone Who:

Is highly organised and detail-oriented

Is very responsive and reliable

Communicates clearly and naturally (written English is very important)

Can match a warm, calm and professional tone when messaging clients

Is confident learning new systems (including booking systems like Phorest)

Is comfortable working with data and willing to learn how to run reports and identify trends

Is able to support and step in where needed, working alongside an on-site admin





Can manage multiple tasks across different areas of the business





Is able to work within UK business hours





Is available to support occasional urgent enquiries (including some Saturday mornings)





Has previous experience as a Virtual Assistant or similar role

title: Tableau Expert to make a free guide giveaway to beginners
description:
Freelance Designer & Tableau User — Create a Beginner-Friendly Tableau Cheat Sheet in Canva



About This Project

We are looking for a freelancer who knows Tableau and Canva to create a visually attractive, easy-to-read beginner's cheat sheet or mini-guide for Tableau. This will be a free PDF giveaway offered to people who respond to our Instagram ad promoting low-cost Tableau tutoring services.

This is not a textbook or a full manual. Think of it as a friendly, visual "first look" at Tableau — just enough to get a curious beginner excited and oriented. Something they can glance at and immediately feel less intimidated by the software.



What You Will Deliver

A multi-page cheat sheet or mini-guide (approximately 6–12 pages, though final length is flexible based on content flow).

Designed in Canva using a free Canva account (no premium/Pro elements) so that we can edit it later ourselves.

You will share the editable Canva project link with us upon completion — this is a hard requirement.

The guide must include your own original screenshots taken from Tableau Public (the free version). No stock images of Tableau, no screenshots copied from other websites or courses.

Final export as a high-quality PDF, ready to send digitally.

Requirements for Applicants

You must have working knowledge of Tableau. You will be taking your own screenshots and writing short descriptions, so you need to actually understand what you are showing.

You must have Tableau Public installed (or be willing to install it — it is free) to capture all screenshots yourself.

You must be comfortable with Canva and able to produce a polished, professional-looking document.

Good written English. The text will be short, but it must be clear, grammatically correct, and friendly in tone.

Ability to meet a deadline (we will agree on timeline after hiring).



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

A brief introduction about yourself.

Your experience with Tableau — tell us how you have used it (work, school, personal projects, etc.). If you have a Tableau Public profile, please share the link.

A sample of your Canva design work — this can be any document, infographic, or guide you have made. We want to see your design sense.

Your proposed timeline to complete this project.

Your rate for this project (fixed price).

Bonus (not required): If you have created educational content, cheat sheets, tutorials, or guides before, we would love to see examples.



Budget

This is a one-time, fixed-price project. Please quote your rate in your application. We are a small tutoring operation, so our budget is modest, but we pay fairly and promptly.



Why This Matters

This cheat sheet is the first thing a potential student will see from us. It needs to feel helpful, generous, and professional — the kind of freebie that makes someone think, "If the free guide is this good, the tutoring must be great."

If this project goes well, there may be future work creating similar guides for other tools.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Funnelish Funnel Builder — Copy, Rebrand & Translate Competitor Advertorials (Daily Work)
description:
BUDGET: $15 USD per funnel | 7 days a week (Past experience with proof is needed)



---



ABOUT THE ROLE

--------------

I run a dropshipping business selling health and skincare products in Portugal. I need a funnel builder who can take

competitor advertorials and product pages, rebrand them to my brand and

colors, translate them into the target language, and publish them — fast.



This is a 7-days-a-week ongoing role. If you are reliable and fast,

you will have consistent daily work with me long-term.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO EACH TIME

---------------------
. I send you a competitor advertorial/product page URL

2. You study the layout, structure and copy style

3. You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to:

   - Translate it into the target language (Portuguese)

   - Rebrand all product names, brand names and claims to my brand

   - Rebrand all product images to match our branding

4. You rebuild the page in Funnelish

  5. You apply my brand colors, fonts and logo throughout

6. You deliver a live preview link within 48 hours



Each funnel = 1 advertorial page + 1 product/order page.



---



WHAT I PROVIDE

---------------

- Competitor reference URLs for each funnel

- My brand name, logo, colors and product images

- Product details and any specific claims to include or avoid

- Fast feedback — I will review and approve within 24 hours



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR

---------------------

? MUST HAVE Past Experience building advertorial-style pages (the "article that sells" format)

? Comfortable using AI tools to rewrite and translate copy

? MUST HAVE Experience with Funnelish

? Can match the look and feel of a reference page closely

? Reliable — available 7 days a week, responds within a few hours

? Fast — 48-hour turnaround per funnel is the expectation

? Good eye for design — pages must look professional and trustworthy



---



TO APPLY — ANSWER THESE 5 QUESTIONS

--------------------------------------

Applications without answers to all 5 questions will be ignored.



1. How long have you been using Funnelish?

2. Have you built advertorial/pre-lander pages before?

   Share 2 live examples or screenshots.

3. Have you used AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for copywriting or

   translation?

4. Can you work 7 days a week and deliver within 48 hours per funnel?

5. Leave your number in this format +?6?3?1?2?3?4?5?6?7?8

---



RATE: $15 USD per complete funnel (advertorial + product page)

TYPE: Full-time ongoing, 7 days a week

HOURS: Flexible — async communication is fine, but fast responses expected

START: Immediately

title: Figma/Framer Parallax Web Designer
description:
I need someone to design an interactive web design as follows.





Deliverables

Full website design or front-end build

Responsive layouts for desktop, tablet, and mobile

Smooth parallax and scroll-based animations

No coding is required, just create it on FRAMER or WEBFLOW



If your portfolio don't have any parallax design, create one sample with watermark to be considered.

If not your application will be ignored.

title: Remote Appointment Setter
description:
If you enjoy talking to people, following a clear process, and being measured on your results, keep reading.



About us:

We’re Bulletproof Cycling. We coach cyclists 50+ to ride stronger for longer without wrecking their life. Clients are mostly successful professionals and retired entrepreneurs who take their goals seriously.



We’re now hiring Remote Appointment Setters to help us handle the volume of warm leads coming in. You do not have to generate your own leads. Your job is simple: talk to riders who already requested more information and book them into the next call.



What you’ll do

Speak to warm leads from our funnels (inbound leads, reactivation lists, and existing conversations).

Use proven scripts to start and continue conversations via
, and short calls.

Qualify interest and book appointments for our closer.

Follow up with riders who haven’t replied or haven’t booked yet.

Hit clear daily and weekly targets (conversations started, appointments booked, show rate).

Log activity and notes in our CRM so the closer has context.

You are not selling the full program. Your focus is high?quality appointments.



What we provide:

A steady flow of warm leads.

Scripts, objection handling, and conversation frameworks.

Training on our avatar (cyclists 50+) and our offer.

Regular coaching so you can improve your numbers.

A clear progression path for top performers.

Pay and progression



This role includes:

A fixed monthly amount plus

Additional pay that increases with your performance

Most new tea
mbers who meet target activity and quality metrics earn around $3000–$3500 per month once ramped. Strong performers who consistently exceed targets can earn more and may be considered for more senior roles over time.



Exact details of the structure, targets, and progression path are explained during the interview process.



You’re a fit if:

You can work UK evenings / business hours and be available for live conversations.

You like using scripts and can also adapt based on feedback.

You’re motivated by improving your numbers and seeing that reflected in your pay.

You have reliable internet, a working computer, a webcam, and a quiet place to work.

Requirements:



Strong written and spoken English.

Comfortable on Zoom and phone.

Able to work Mon–Sa, 9am –5pm UK



How to apply:


/t/6ni393yCWvus.

This is a short form where we ask about your experience, availability, and income expectations.

If it looks like a potential fit on paper, we’ll invite you to a live group interview on Wednesday at 7pm UK.

Top candidates from the group interview will be invited to a short 1:1 call and a paid trial period.

Job Type: Full-time



Work Location: Remote

title: Customer Service Specialist (E-commerce)
description:
We are looking for a sharp, fast, and detail-oriented Customer Service Specialist to join our growing e-commerce team.

This is not a beginner role — we only hire people who already understand how professional customer service works in e-commerce.



What you’ll do



- Handle daily customer support tickets via Reamaze

- Respond to customers using structured templates (and improve them where needed)

- Process refunds, resends, and order-related issues in Shopify

- Work efficiently under time pressure while maintaining accuracy

- Spot recurring problems and proactively suggest improvements



?? Working hours

- 2 hours per day

- Fixed schedule (you must clock in at the same time every day)

- Monday – Saturday



Compensation



$4.5 per hour

Long-term opportunity if performance is strong



Requirements (IMPORTANT)



- Proven experience in e-commerce customer service

- Experience with Reamaze (REQUIRED – applications without this will be rejected)

- Experience with Shopify

- Able to work with templates AND think independently

- Fast typing and quick decision-making

- High attention to detail (mistakes are not acceptable)

- Strong written English (clear, professional, no grammar mistakes)



 What we’re really looking for



We don’t want someone who just replies to tickets.

We want someone who:

- Thinks in solutions, not problems

- Works fast without losing quality

- Takes ownership

- Can handle pressure without getting sloppy

- Improves systems instead of blindly following them



 Do NOT apply if:



- You have no Reamaze experience

- You need constant supervision

- You work slowly or make frequent mistakes

- You copy-paste without understanding



How to apply (IMPORTANT FILTER)



To make sure you actually read this:

Start your application with:

 "I work fast and precise – ready to prove it."

Then include:

- Your Reamaze experience (specific examples)

- Your Shopify experience

- Your typing speed (WPM)

A short example of how you would handle this case:

 Customer received wrong size – what do you do?

Applications that do NOT follow this will be ignored.

title: Product Research, SEO Listings and Customer Support on Vinted and Etsy ($200 per month)
description:
Do you want to work on a cool fashion and e-commerce project from home, with complete autonomy?

We are looking for a creative, resourceful, and curious person to help us find products and create perfect visuals for our Vinted store using AI.



Your (daily) missions:



Use Gemini AI to research trending fashion niches using our prompts.



Get inspired via Pinterest to understand the visual universe of these niches.



Find similar items on platforms like AliExpress, Temu, and Shein.



Generate realistic and stylish photos according to our methods (we will train you on this) using Gemini AI and ChatGPT.



What we expect from you:



To be autonomous and constantly improving.



To enjoy brainstorming, getting inspired, and immersing yourself in new niches to find the most suitable products.



To be meticulous regarding the quality of the generated photos.



No need to be a design expert: if you know how to use Gemini and have a fashion view on Shein, you already have a big advantage.



Compensation:



$200 per month (7 hours a day).



Paid time off.



Opportunities for growth and evolution.



Conditions:



100% Remote work.



Flexible working hours.



Complete training with ready-to-use processes upon your arrival.



How to apply:

Send a short message explaining:

(Send a cover letter through the platform)



Hello and welcome! My name is Kyoungbu Kang. This is my TikTok channel to understand what I do: 



To move forward, I'd like to invite you to a short test.



This task is designed to test your understanding, your ability to follow instructions, and how well you interpret style and detail — not just basic execution.



Here's the full step-by-step guide for the task (Google Doc):





Here's the video where I explain everything visually:





Important Notes:

– Don't worry if it's not perfect.

– What matters most is that you do your best, follow each step carefully, and show you understand what I'm really looking for.

– If you go a little further or improve a small part: that's a big plus



 About Gemini:

The image generation step requires Gemini with image access (ideally Gemini Pro).

If you don't have Pro, try with the free version — it usually works, but with limitations.

Please let me know right away if you can't generate images, so I can find a solution.



Once you've completed the task, please send everything in one
 or message.



Send me your test by
 (you can use a Google Drive link) and also include your WhatsApp number.



Thanks again, and if your work is perfect for me, we will do a call together to explain what products I'm selling right now, and how to respond and list products on Vinted and Etsy.



There is also a possibility for evolution in salary to $300 per month for a job as a manager if you're good at your job.

title: Property Client Support & Lead Gen
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a dependable and organised Customer Relations / Virtual Assistant to support our client management and lead-handling processes. You will be the first point of contact for new enquiries, while also supporting existing clients and ensuring projects move forward smoothly.



This role suits someone confident on the phone, strong with follow-ups, and excellent at staying organised across multiple tasks.



?



Key Responsibilities



Lead Handling & Appointment Booking

 • Call warm leads promptly

 • Qualify prospects using simple scripts

 • Log detailed call notes

 • Book and manage calendar appointments



Client & Project Support

 • Track the status of active clients and projects

 • Chase updates from internal tea
mbers and external partners

 • Flag delays or issues early



Client Communication

 • Provide regular client updates

 • Answer basic questions and escalate when needed

 • Ensure clients always know the next step



Research Support

 • Research property areas, agents, contractors and comparable deals

 • Prepare short, clear summaries



Administration

 • Update CRM (GoHighLevel) and task lists accurately

 • Prepare simple weekly reports (calls, appointments, progress)

 • Coordinate documents and follow-ups

 • Maintain high attention to detail at all times



?



Requirements

 • Excellent spoken and written English

 • Confident and professional phone manner

 • Strong organisation and time-management skills

 • Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently

 • Comfortable using:

 • Outlook

 • CRMs (GoHighLevel preferred)

 • Google Drive/Docs/Sheets



?



Preferred 

 • Experience in customer service, client success, or admin support

 • Experience in property or professional services environments

title: Property Investment Sourcing Assistant
description:
If you're interested provide your CV and a loom video on why you're the right fit for this role in particular. 



We are looking for a highly organised and proactive Property Sourcing Assistant to support our investment team. The role involves identifying suitable property opportunities, conducting due diligence, coordinating with agents and partners, and helping ensure deals progress smoothly from enquiry through to offer.



Candidates with UK property experience are strongly preferred.



?



Key Responsibilities

 • Source below-market and value-add property opportunities across the UK

 • Build relationships with estate agents, brokers, and local contacts

 • Conduct due diligence: pricing comparables, rental estimates, refurb checks, licensing considerations

 • Prepare property summaries and deal packs for review

 • Arrange and track viewings, surveys and follow-ups

 • Maintain accurate records in the CRM and spreadsheets

 • Support offer negotiations and manage communications with agents

 • Monitor active deals and flag risks, delays, or missing information

 • General research and admin support to the acquisitions team



?



Requirements

 • Experience in UK property sourcing, lettings, investments, or similar (preferred)

 • Strong analytical and research skills

 • Excellent written and spoken English

 • Confident communicator on phone and

 • High attention to detail and ability to spot issues early

 • Organised, reliable, and able to work independently

 • Comfortable using CRMs, spreadsheets, Google Drive/Docs, and
 tools



?



Desirable

 • Knowledge of BRRR, buy-to-let, HMOs, refurb projects

 • Understanding of valuations, yields, and basic deal analysis

 • Experience liaising with agents, builders, solicitors, or brokers

title: Property Investing Sourcer Assistant
description:
Do you enjoy researching properties, running numbers, and spotting hidden opportunities? We’re looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Property Investment Sourcing Assistant to join our growing team.



You’ll play a key role in finding and analysing property investment deals in the UK market – from Buy-to-Let properties to exciting refurbishment opportunities. This role starts part-time, with the potential to grow into a full-time position as we scale.



What You’ll Do

 • Research and source property investment opportunities in the UK.

 • Analyse deals for ROI, rental yield, and profitability.

 • Create clear, concise deal summaries for the team.

 • Reach out confidently to property owners, agents, and stakeholders via phone and
.

 • Keep accurate records of leads and deals.

 • Share a short Loom video introducing yourself and highlighting your experience.



What We’re Looking For

 • Previous experience in property sourcing, research, or real estate (UK property knowledge is a big plus, but not required if you’re a fast learner).

 • Strong understanding of numbers – ROI, yield, and investment returns.

 • Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).

 • Confidence when speaking on the phone.

 • Proactive, organised, and able to work independently.



Why Join Us?

 • Work remotely with flexible hours.

 • Be part of a small but growing property investment company.

 • Real opportunity to grow into a long-term, full-time role.

 • Gain hands-on experience in the UK property investment industry.



How to Apply



Send us your CV plus a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your relevant experience or why you’d be a great fit for this role.



?



This version:

 • Feels more inviting and engaging, not just a checklist.

 • Opens the door to candidates who may not have UK property sourcing experience but have transferable skills.

 • Emphasises growth and opportunity, which is attractive.

 • Uses simple, direct language instead of corporate-style wording.

title: Marketing & Growth
description:
We are looking for an Engagement and Content Creator who can work independently, understands social media, and can handle both content posting and audience engagement. The ideal candidate is creative, reliable, organized, and proactive, with the ability to maintain a consistent online presence, communicate professionally, and be a real contributor to the business by bringing ideas, solving problems, and adding value beyond basic task completion.



• Strong written English and clear communication

• Good eye for branding, tone, and content quality

• Can follow instructions but also take initiative

• Consistent, dependable, and detail-oriented

• Able to meet deadlines and manage time well

• Previous experience with social media accounts or online communities

• Willing to contribute ideas that help improve growth, engagement, and the business overall



Subject line must start with: Media 

(Applications without this word will not be reviewed.)



Subm a 1-2 min intro video

         • Blog content

         •
 marketing campaigns
