5. Share a time you took initiative and did something helpful without being asked





6. Provide one link to work samples (blog, reel,
, or
 screenshot).

title: UK Event Marketing & Partnerships Manager
description:
About Us



RA Monster Events is one of the UK’s fastest-growing live event companies, delivering large-scale Monster Truck Motorfest and family entertainment events nationwide.



We are looking for an experienced, driven, and highly organised UK Event Marketing & Partnerships Manager to help grow attendance across all events through strategic media buying, community partnerships, and national promotional campaigns.



Role Overview



You will be responsible for creating and managing nationwide marketing systems that drive ticket sales and local awareness for our UK event schedule.



This is a hands-on role focused on performance, partnerships, and results.



Key Responsibilities



National Marketing Suppliers



Source and manage trusted UK-wide providers for:



Poster distribution campaigns



Leaflet drop services



Influencer marketing campaigns



Billboard advertising across the UK



Local Media Planning



For every event location, research and recommend:



Top 5 Newspapers / Press Titles



Best reach



Best local readership



Best advertising value



Top 5 Radio Stations



Highest local audience



Family / commuter reach



Sponsorship / competition opportunities



Live Event Radio Activation



Coordinate an on-site live radio station presence at selected events including:



Live broadcasting



Competitions



Presenter appearances



Ticket giveaways



Audience engagement



Community Partnership Network



Build a strong local promotional network for every event including:



? Football teams???? Rugby clubs???? Schools / PTAs???? Martial arts clubs???? Dance schools???? Running clubs???? Youth groups / Scouts / Cadets????? Community
 groups????? Charities / fundraisers



Responsibilities include:



Creating free ticket giveaway partnerships



Running competitions



Community promo packs



Cross-promotion campaigns



Building long-term relationships



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who has:



Experience in events marketing, promotions, media buying or partnerships



Strong UK media knowledge



Great communication skills



Ability to negotiate deals and partnerships



Organised and self-motivated attitude



Focus on ticket sales and ROI



Creative mindset for grassroots promotion



Bonus Experience



Outdoor advertising



Influencer campaigns



Radio promotions



Sponsorship sales



Sports/community club partnerships



Success Metrics



You will be judged on:



Ticket sales growth



Marketing reach



Quality supplier deals



Community partnerships built



ROI from campaigns



Attendance increases



Position Type



Full-time / Part-time / Freelance considered



Remote with UK travel when required



Performance-based opportunities available

title: Social Media Video Editor and Content Manager
description:
Job Title: Social Media Video Editor and Content Manager



Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full Time

Compensation: $15 to $20 AUD per hour





About the Role

We are looking for a talented and proactive Social Media Video Editor and Content Manager to join our team. This role combines creative video editing, graphic design, and hands on social media management. You will play a key role in producing engaging content and building meaningful interactions with our audience.





Key Responsibilities

- Edit short form and long form video content for social media platforms such as Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube

- Design supporting graphics and visual assets aligned with brand guidelines

- Schedule and publish content across social media channels

- Monitor comments, messages, and mentions, and actively engage with followers

- Respond to audience inquiries in a timely and professional manner

- Collaborate with the team on content ideas, campaigns, and trends

- Ensure all content is optimized for each platform and audience





Requirements

- Proven experience in video editing for social media

- Strong skills in graphic design tools such as Canva, Adobe Photoshop, or similar

What We Offer

title: Advanced level secretary
description:
# Job Opportunity – Elite Executive Secretary  

## RA Monster Events



RA Monster Events is one of the UK’s fastest-growing live entertainment and event companies, delivering large-scale Monster Truck Motorfest and family events across the UK.



We are seeking an elite-level Executive Secretary to become a key part of the business and support the day-to-day operations of a fast-paced, ambitious company.



This is a high-level role for someone exceptional — highly organised, professional, intelligent, proactive, and capable of operating at executive standard.



---



## Role Overview



You will work directly with senior management, helping keep the business organised, efficient, and moving forward at speed.



You must have advanced English communication skills, excellent judgement, and the ability to manage multiple priorities with precision.



This role requires someone who can think ahead, solve problems, and handle confidential business matters professionally.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### Executive Support

- Manage diaries, schedules, meetings and appointments  

- Organise travel, accommodation and itineraries  

- Prioritise daily tasks and deadlines  

- Prepare reports, presentations and documents  

- Handle confidential business information discreetly



### Communication Management

- Draft professional
s and responses  

- Manage inboxes and communications  

- Liaise with venues, suppliers, partners and clients  

- Follow up enquiries and maintain relationships



### Administration & Operations

- Maintain organised systems and databases  

- Create trackers, spreadsheets and reports  

- Monitor deadlines and ensure completion of tasks  

- Assist with contracts, paperwork and event documentation  

- Support event planning and logistics administration



### Problem Solving & Initiative

- Anticipate issues before they arise  

- Improve systems and efficiency  

- Handle urgent requests calmly and professionally  

- Take ownership of tasks without constant supervision



---



## Required Skills



### Essential

- Advanced spoken and written English

- Exceptional organisational ability

- High attention to detail

- Strong administrative experience

- Excellent time management

- Professional communication skills

- Ability to multitask under pressure

- Strong computer skills (Google Workspace / Microsoft Office / spreadsheets)

- Trustworthy and discreet with confidential information



### Preferred

- Executive assistant / secretary experience

- Events industry experience

- Social media / marketing awareness

- Project management ability

- Experience working remotely with UK businesses



---



## Personality We Need



- Sharp and intelligent  

- Loyal and dependable  

- Calm under pressure  

- Solutions-focused  

- Fast learner  

- Positive attitude  

- High standards  

- Professional appearance and manner



---



## Performance Expectations



You will be measured on:



- Speed and accuracy of work  

- Communication quality  

- Organisation of systems  

- Ability to reduce workload for management  

- Initiative and problem solving  

- Reliability and consistency



---



## Position Details



- Full-time preferred  

- Remote / Hybrid considered  

- UK time-zone alignment preferred  

- Long-term growth opportunity for the right person



---



## Why Join RA Monster Events



This is an opportunity to work inside an ambitious, fast-growing events business with exciting projects across the UK. We are looking for someone exceptional who wants to grow with the company and become indispensable.



---



## How to Apply



Please send:



1. CV / Resume  

2. Cover message explaining why you are elite-level for this role  

3. Examples of administrative or executive support experience  

4. Confirm availability and working hours



RA Monster Events

title: Appointment Setter & GHL Specialist - US Home Services Marketing Agency
description:
We're a US-based agency that generates inbound leads for home service companies (construction, remodeling, HVAC, roofing, plumbing). You'll call warm leads, qualify them, and book appointments. These are NOT cold calls.

Compensation: 4-5$ per hour, full time



Experience: 

* 1 year+ in appointment setting. 

* Hands-on GoHighLevel experience (non-negotiable).



Responsibilities:

* Call every lead within 60 seconds of submission.

* Qualify using a short script (project type, timeline, location, budget).

* Book appointment for our clients directly on their calendar using GHL

* Follow ups with no-answers - double-dial, text, re-engage.

* 50 calls per day minimum.



What You Need:

* Fluent English with a neutral or American accent. DO NOT APPLY IF YOUR ENGLISH IS NOT IMPECCABLE.

* Organized & detail-oriented - every call logged accurately in GHL.

* Available to work 8 AM – 7 PM EST, Monday–Friday.



Growth: This is a long-term position. Top performers grow into Team Lead roles with salary increases.



Apply here: 



When asked "What do we value the most at our company?" - the answer is "Honesty."

title: Credit Repair Dispute Specialist | DisputeFox Required | Long-Term FTEC Role
description:
Futuristic Tech Consulting is hiring a long-term Credit Repair Dispute Specialist to help manage client credit repair files inside DisputeFox.



This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who understands credit report audits, factual disputes, DisputeFox, dispute letter creation, letter library organization, bureau/furnisher responses, and deletion/correction tracking.



Your main job will be to review credit reports, identify factual dispute angles, create accurate dispute letters inside DisputeFox, organize templates, track deadlines, review responses, and help us improve client results.



We are building a long-term system, not hiring a freelancer for one quick task. You must be detail-oriented, reliable, honest, and willing to follow SOPs.



Main Responsibilities

Audit credit reports from Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion

Identify factual errors, inconsistencies, duplicate accounts, obsolete items, and reporting issues

Create factual dispute letters inside DisputeFox

Organize and label DisputeFox letter templates

Track Round 1, Round 2, Round 3, and escalation actions

Review bureau, furnisher, and collector responses

Track deletions, corrections, verified items, and next steps

Prepare daily reports

Help build SOPs for the FTEC dispute process

Keep client data secure and never store client files on personal devices

Required Experience

Credit repair experience required

DisputeFox experience strongly preferred

Strong English writing skills

Experience with factual disputing

Ability to read and compare all three credit bureaus

Ability to track deadlines and results

Ability to follow instructions and ask questions when stuck

Bonus Skills

GoHighLevel experience

Client update writing

SOP creation

Credit repair automation

Experience with CFPB complaint preparation

Experience with PrintFox/certified mail workflows

Important



This role is about legitimate, compliant dispute work. We do not promise fake results, guaranteed deletions, or removal of accurate negative information. We focus on finding real reporting issues, documenting them, disputing them correctly, and tracking results.



Accurate negative information generally cannot be removed just because it is negative, and strong disputes should explain what is wrong, why it is wrong, and include supporting documents.



Application Instructions



At the very top of your application, write:



FTEC AUDIT READY



If you do not write this exact phrase, your application will not be reviewed.



Then answer these questions:



Have you personally used DisputeFox? List the exact tasks you have done inside it.

How many credit repair client files have you processed from audit through Round 2 or Round 3?

Explain factual disputing in your own words.

What is the first thing you look for when auditing a credit report?

What do you do when a bureau verifies an item but the report still has factual inconsistencies?

What account types are you strongest with: collections, charge-offs, late payments, medical collections, inquiries, repossessions, bankruptcies, student loans, or identity theft?

What account types are you weakest with?

Are you currently working another job? If yes, how many hours per week?

Are you comfortable with the listed salary?

Are you willing to complete a paid test using fake credit report data?

Better Version If You Want It Shorter



This is the cleaner version if the job post box feels too crowded:



Futuristic Tech Consulting is hiring a long-term Credit Repair Dispute Specialist with DisputeFox experience.



This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who can audit credit reports, identify factual dispute angles, create dispute letters inside DisputeFox, organize the letter library, track dispute rounds, review bureau/furnisher responses, and help us produce legitimate deletions and corrections.



Main tasks:



Audit credit reports from all three bureaus

Identify factual errors and inconsistencies

Create dispute letters inside DisputeFox

Organize and label dispute letter templates

Track Round 1, Round 2, Round 3, and escalation steps

Review bureau responses

Track deletions, corrections, verified items, and next actions

Prepare daily reports

Help build SOPs for our credit repair process



Required:



Credit repair experience

DisputeFox experience preferred

Strong English writing

Factual dispute knowledge

Detail-oriented

Reliable daily communication



At the top of your application, write:



FTEC AUDIT READY



Then answer:



Have you personally used DisputeFox? What tasks have you done?

How many credit repair files have you processed?

Explain factual disputing in your own words.

What do you do when an item comes back verified?

Are you comfortable with the listed salary?

Are you willing to complete a paid test using fake credit report data?

title: Executive Operations Assistant (Remote) – Global Social Impact
description:
Full-Time Executive Assistant (Remote) – Join a Global Social Impact Social Enterprise ScaleUp

Salary: Up to 1000 USD/month (Full-Time, 160+ hours)



At HubLearn Group, we operate with a clear principle: outcomes over hours.

Through the use of advanced tools and systems, a significant part of repetitive work is automated. This allows you to focus on higher-value activities such as problem-solving, decision-making, and structured execution. As a result, your actual working hours may be lower—provided you are able to operate efficiently within this setup.



IMPORTANT: I personally review only applications that follow the instructions outlined in the “How to apply” section below. Please read carefully.



This role is for someone who wants to work remotely while contributing to a global Danish social enterprise focused on co-creation, upskilling, and reskilling people worldwide—independent of background or circumstance.



I am looking for a highly capable, business-minded, and proactive Executive Assistant who operates well in a dynamic environment and is motivated by growth, ownership, and long-term impact.



My name is Adam, Founder and CEO of HubLearn Group.



This is not a traditional assistant role. It is a long-term collaboration (minimum 2+ years) where you will act as an extension of my execution capacity and play a central role in scaling a global, mission-driven organization.



Due to my international schedule, your working hours will be aligned with your time zone. You will have autonomy in how you structure your work. What matters is execution, consistency, and results—not time spent. You will be compensated equally regardless of whether tasks require 80 or 200+ hours monthly. Performance and growth are the key metrics.



HubLearn Group’s mission is to increase access to knowledge, tools, and opportunities for individuals and organizations with limited resources. We operate globally with a focus on education, collaboration, and long-term impact.



Responsibilities:



• Organising, coordinating, and managing communication across stakeholders globally—from governmental level to local partners—ensuring alignment, preparation, and forward planning for meetings and CEO priorities

• Full calendar ownership, including scheduling, prioritization, and coordination

• Executing tasks based on voice memos, calls, and written instructions with minimal supervision

• Supporting, structuring, and updating global donation programs

• Developing written content in collaboration with the content team

• Managing and responding to business communication at a professional level

• Reviewing, refining, and elevating written materials

• Anticipating needs, identifying gaps, and ensuring forward 
ntum

• Supporting copywriting initiatives with a focus on persuasive and impact-driven communication

• Managing and coordinating social media activities across platforms

• Handling administrative workflows (largely automated), including follow-ups and transcription



This role requires independent thinking, structured execution, and a proactive mindset. You are expected to contribute actively—not simply execute instructions. You will be involved in improving processes, communication, and overall operational flow.



You:



• Operate with strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Are able to produce clear, structured, and engaging written communication

• Take ownership and maintain high levels of accountability

• Work independently with strong attention to detail and prioritization

• Understand the expectations of working as a remote EA in a high-performance environment

• Are digitally capable and comfortable working with systems and tools

• Can operate in an international and fast-paced context

• Are committed to continuous development and learning



What you can expect:



• Direct involvement in a global startup and scale-up environment

• Continuous professional and personal development

• Flexible working structure based on output

• Access to tools and learning resources

• A collaborative and performance-oriented team environment

• The opportunity to contribute to meaningful global impact

• Potential opportunities to work physically in Denmark for periods

• Access to further education opportunities in Denmark



You will join the core team as an independent contractor, with the potential for long-term integration into the organization under a Danish employment structure.



How to apply for the position:



To be considered for this position, please complete the following tasks carefully. I will review your written tasks first before proceeding to the final step.



Task-1 Executive Scenario:

You receive this message fro
:

“I have multiple upcoming meetings with different stakeholders (government, partners, internal team), and I am traveling with no preparation done.”

Explain step-by-step how you would organize everything, what you would prepare for me, and how you ensure I stay one step ahead.



Task-2 Professional Communication:

Write a professional
 reply to a potential partner who is interested in collaborating with HubLearn Group but asks for more details about our mission and how we create impact.



Task-3 Task Execution from Ambiguous Input:

You receive a short voice memo fro
 saying:

“Follow up on the donation program, check where we are, and update me.”

Explain what actions you would take, what information you would gather, and how you would report back to me.



Task-4 Content & Copywriting:

Write a short piece of content (max 800 characters) that promotes a global initiative related to education, impact, or opportunity. The content should be engaging, clear, and include a call-to-action.



Task-5 Why you?:

• List four reasons why you are the ideal Executive Assistant for HubLearn Group



Task-6 Short Video (max 2 minutes):

Record a short video introducing yourself and explaining why you are a strong fit for this role and how you would support a CEO working globally.



You may submit your application in any format you prefer (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, etc.).



I review applications personally on an ongoing basis and will hire as soon as the right candidate is identified.



I look forward to your application.



Best regards,

Adam D

title: Senior Sales Representative
description:
We are hiring a Senior Sales Rep for Little Pixies Studios, a premium children’s portrait studio in the UK.



This is a phone sales role for someone who is excellent at building trust quickly, handling emotional conversations well, and confidently securing paid bookings from warm leads.



**This role is best suited to someone who understands motherhood who has strong phone sales ability, because the conversations are emotionally led and centred around speaking with mums.**



This is not a customer support role and it is not a cold calling role.

You will be speaking to warm inbound leads and follow-up leads, helping them book our fairy tale photo shoot experience and secure their paid booking.



Pay

35,000 PHP base salary + Uncapped commission



Realistic OTE: 60,000 PHP+ per month (Strong performers can earn more)



Schedule

Monday - Saturday UK hours



What problem does this role solve for the business?

Filling our photography calendar with qualified bookings by building trust and persuading mothers our shoots are work their investment.



What you’ll be doing:

- Calling warm leads quickly and confidently

- Following up persistently until leads are booked or genuinely abandoned

- Building rapport fast and making mums feel understood

- Securing paid bookings and deposits over the phone

- Managing your pipeline properly inside GoHighLevel

- Sending follow-ups through our systems when needed

- Giving honest feedback on lead quality, objections, and sales process issues

- Taking ownership of results



Standards for this role:

- Minimum 15% close rate

- Fast follow-up speed

- 5-minute call time on new leads

- Consistent pipeline management

- Strong follow-up discipline



You are probably a strong fit if:

- You are a mother or have motherhood products/ services

- You have at least 2 years of phone sales / telesales / transactional sales experience

- You are excellent at building rapport and handling emotional sales conversations

- You are highly fluent in English with trusted accent (e.g. American, British, Irish, South African)

- You sound polished, clear, and trustworthy on the phone

- You are confident asking for the sale

- You are self-sufficient, organised, and performance-driven

- You take feedback well and care about improving



Strong preference for people with experience in:

- Luxury sales / Emotional sales (Photography sales, Fitness sales, Luxury vehicle, High-trust phone sales)

- Any role where rapport, emotion, and follow-up mattered more than hard-pressure tactics

- Clear, trust building Accent / phone presence



This is a high-trust phone role, so your spoken English must sound polished, natural, and easy for UK customers to trust.

Applicants with a clear, neutral, highly trusted English-speaking phone presence will stand out.



Tools



You’ll be using:

- GoHighLevel

- Slack

- WhatsApp

- Google Docs





This role is for someone who wants more than just a job.

If you are strong, coachable, hardworking, and want to grow with a company that values performance, this could be a great fit.



****** Please apply using the link below:




/c/little-pixies/jobs/senior-setter-remote-rstk?utm_source=onlinejobsph



Only apply if you are confident on the phone, strong in English, and comfortable working UK hours in a results-focused sales environment.

title: Experienced Amazon UK Product Sourcer / Deal Analyst (OA + Keepa + ArbiSource + Manual Analysis)
description:
Please Read Carefully Before Applying



We are only looking for experienced, high-level Amazon UK product sourcers who take pride in their work and want to grow long-term with a serious eCommerce business.



If you are the type of person who can spot opportunities others miss, understand Keepa deeply, and know how to source with both software and manual analysis, keep reading.



We are not looking for average VAs.



We are looking for real deal analysts.



?



About the Role



We are building a high-performance Amazon UK sourcing team and are looking for exceptional product sourcers who can consistently find profitable, scalable, and well-analysed deals.



This role is for someone who understands that sourcing is not just about running scans.



You must be able to:

	•	Analyse Keepa properly

	•	Understand historical price behaviour

	•	Identify strong opportunities from data

	•	Use tools like ArbiSource, SellerAmp, and Keepa

	•	Find both software-assisted and manually discovered deals

	•	Think critically like a buyer / analyst, not just a basic VA



If you are highly skilled, detail-oriented, and serious about becoming one of the best in Amazon sourcing, this could be a long-term opportunity with strong growth potential.



?



What We’re Looking For



We are specifically looking for someone with strong experience in:

	•	Amazon UK Online Arbitrage sourcing

	•	Keepa deal analysis (this is extremely important)

	•	ArbiSource sourcing / custom scans

	•	Manual sourcing / online analysis

	•	Amazon-to-Amazon opportunities

	•	Storefront stalking / advanced research methods

	•	Understanding of buy box behaviour, competition, rank, and price stability

	•	Ability to identify real opportunities, not just obvious or low-quality scan results



Wholesale sourcing experience is a plus, but not required.



?



Your Responsibilities

	•	Source profitable and high-quality products for Amazon UK

	•	Focus primarily on categories such as:

	•	Electronics

	•	Home & Kitchen

	•	Toys

	•	(and other strong opportunities where relevant)

	•	Find a mix of:

	•	Keepa-led opportunities

	•	ArbiSource opportunities

	•	Manual / online analysis deals

	•	Amazon-to-Amazon opportunities

	•	(Potentially wholesale opportunities if applicable)

	•	Deliver exclusive leads only

(No shared leads, no recycled leads, no leads given to multiple clients)

	•	Maintain a consistent output of quality over quantity

(We care more about strong, well-analysed deals than just random volume)

	•	Present all leads in a clean, professional spreadsheet including:

	•	Product name

	•	ASIN

	•	Supplier / website

	•	Cost price

	•	Selling price

	•	Estimated profit

	•	ROI

	•	Sales rank / estimated sales

	•	Number of sellers

	•	Buy box analysis

	•	Keepa screenshots / notes

	•	Any risks or concerns

	•	Avoid:

	•	Oversaturated products

	•	Unstable Keepa charts

	•	Obvious tanking listings

	•	Hazardous/restricted/problematic brands

	•	Low-quality “scan and send” deals with weak analysis



?



Minimum Deal Standards



As a general baseline, leads should typically meet:

	•	Minimum £10 profit

	•	20%+ ROI

	•	Strong sales consistency / healthy demand

	•	Stable or logical Keepa history

	•	Reasonable competition

	•	Clear buying rationale



Important:

We care more about good decisions and strong analysis than blindly forcing numbers.

A great deal analyst understands why a product is good, not just what the calculator says.



?



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



To be considered, you must have:

	•	Proven experience in Amazon UK Online Arbitrage sourcing

	•	Strong Keepa analysis skills (non-negotiable)

	•	Experience using:

	•	Keepa

	•	SellerAmp

	•	ArbiSource (custom scan experience strongly preferred)

	•	Ability to source through:

	•	Software

	•	Manual analysis

	•	Storefront stalking

	•	Online research

	•	Amazon-to-Amazon opportunities

	•	Strong understanding of:

	•	Buy box trends

	•	Price drops / tanking risk

	•	Seller competition

	•	Rank consistency

	•	Seasonal patterns

	•	Listing risk / product quality issues

	•	High attention to detail

	•	Strong communication

	•	Ability to work independently

	•	Reliability and consistency



?



Who Will Excel in This Role



You will do well in this role if you:

	•	Think like an analyst, not just a scanner

	•	Can explain why a deal is good

	•	Understand how to read Keepa deeply

	•	Know how to spot when a deal is actually bad even if the numbers look good

	•	Care about long-term account health, not just quick wins

	•	Take pride in being one of the best at what you do

	•	Want to grow with a serious Amazon business long-term



?



Why Join Us

	•	Work directly with a serious, fast-growing Amazon UK business

	•	Long-term opportunity for the right people

	•	Performance-based bonuses for strong, consistent work

	•	Growth potential into a more senior sourcing / buying role

	•	Work with a team that values:

	•	Excellence

	•	High standards

	•	Long-term thinking



We are building a real team — not just hiring random freelancers.



?



How to Apply



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.



To apply, you must do ALL of the following:



1. Start your application with the word: YES



2. Send a sample of your previous sourcing work / deal sheet

4. Briefly explain your sourcing process

Tell us:

	•	How you find deals

	•	How you analyse Keepa

	•	How you d
 whether a lead is worth sending

6. (Important filter question)

Please answer this question in your application:



What makes a Keepa chart attractive to you, and what are 3 red flags that would make you reject a deal even if the ROI looks good?



?



Final Note



We are only looking for people who take pride in being excellent.



If you are average, this role is not for you.

If you are serious, skilled, and want to grow with a high-performance team — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
About the Role

Royal Assistants is a systems and operations consultancy supporting service-based businesses. We’re looking for a detail-driven, self-directed Executive & Operations Assistant to support the Founder directly across communications, task management, and day-to-day admin.



This role exists because things move fast and nothing should fall through the cracks. You will be a second set of eyes on everything coming in —
, Slack, and ClickUp — and a second set of hands on whatever needs to get done. Some days that looks like drafting a message. Some days it’s updating a task, pulling together a document, or completing a form submission. You will not always be told exactly what to do. You are expected to assess, prioritize, and execute.



If you need a detailed checklist every morning to function, this is not the role for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

Communications Monitoring

 • Monitoring shared
 inbox and flagging or drafting responses as needed

 • Monitoring Slack for messages that require action or follow-up

 • Sending communications on behalf of the Founder using established tone and context

ClickUp Task Management

 • Monitoring ClickUp for open tasks, overdue items, and anything that needs attention

 • Updating task statuses, adding notes, and keeping records clean and current

 • Following up on outstanding items with internal tea
mbers as directed

Administrative Support

 • Creating documents, templates, SOPs, trackers, and other internal resources

 • Completing form submissions, scheduling support, and research tasks

 • Preparing meeting notes, agendas, and supporting materials

 • Pulling and organizing data or reports as needed

 • Handling one-off admin requests that fall outside of a defined category — this is intentional

General Execution

 • Supporting internal operations tasks as they arise across marketing, client management, and team coordination

 • Assisting with content organization, file management, and other behind-the-scenes needs

 • Filling gaps — if something needs to happen and it doesn’t require the Founder’s direct involvement, that’s your lane



What We’re Looking For

 • Genuinely comfortable with ambiguity — you assess what’s needed and move without being pushed

 • Strong written communication; you can match tone, represent a brand professionally, and draft without heavy editing

 • Highly responsive during your availability window

 • Experience with ClickUp, Slack, and a shared
 platform (Polymail or similar)

 • Able to distinguish what to handle independently from what to escalate — and when to escalate fast

 • Organized without being rigid; you can manage multiple moving pieces without dropping any

 • Prior experience supporting a founder, executive, or small business owner in a remote capacity preferred



Logistics

 • Contract / 1099 engagement

 • Approximately 4 hours per day, multiple days per week

 • Fully remote

 • Compensation commensurate with experience

title: PDF OCR & AI Text Extraction Specialist (Searchable PDFs +  AI)
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and reliable virtual assistant to take over our current PDF-to-Word conversion workflow.



**Main Focus:**  

The primary purpose of this role is to extract text from PDF documents and deliver it in clean Microsoft Word format so we can easily copy and paste the words into AI tools (such as Grok) whenever needed.



**Exact Daily Tasks:**

- Use any OCR software (Adobe Acrobat, ABBYY, PDFelement, or equivalent) to make PDF documents fully searchable and text-selectable.

- Split the searchable PDFs into small batches of pages.

- Upload each batch to Grok AI (or any AI program) and request text extraction while preserving the original formatting, line spacing, line breaks, and layout.

- Copy the extracted text exactly as Grok returns it (including page labels like **PAGE X**, separators, and structure).

- Paste the final text into a clean Microsoft Word (.docx) document.

- Ensure 100?curacy — no words can be missed or changed. These are important court/legal documents.



**Requirements:**

- Experience using OCR software to convert scanned/image PDFs into fully searchable PDFs.

- Comfortable working with Grok AI (or similar AI chat tools) and following very specific formatting instructions.

- Extremely careful and patient with repetitive, high-accuracy work.

- Able to deliver clean, perfectly formatted Word files every time that are ready for easy copy-paste into AI.



This is precise, detail-heavy work. Speed is good, but **accuracy is critical** — we cannot have any missing or altered text.



If you are detail-obsessed and can follow instructions exactly, this is a great long-term position.

title: VIRAL REELS CREATOR FOR MEN’S AESTHETIC BRAND
description:
Part-Time | Remote | Fixed + Bonus Pay



---



WHAT WE DO



We run a men’s fashion brand called MECENAS. Our target customer is an ambitious man aged 21–30 who is into old money style, surfing, classic cars, stoic philosophy, and living well. 



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Your only job is to post 2 Reels per day on our Instagram.



To do this, you will:



1. Search TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube for videos that are already viral and match our brand vibe

2. Re-use that footage or remix it slightly to fit our brand

3. Add our brand’s philosophy text, quotes, or voiceovers when needed

4. Also use footage from our own brand photoshoots (we will provide these)

5. Post 2 finished Reels every single day



You do NOT need to film anything yourself. You do NOT need to create everything from scratch. Most of the time you are finding content that already went viral for someone else and adapting it slightly for us.



---



WHAT KINDS OF VIDEOS TO MAKE



All videos must feel relevant to this type of man:



- Clips from movies like Peaky Blinders, American Psycho, The Godfather, James Bond

- Lifestyle content: classic cars, surfing, nice watches, coffee, suits, travel

- Motivational or stoic quotes with cinematic backgrounds

- Voiceover videos about discipline, ambition, success, style

- Men’s fashion and style clips

- Any viral content that a stylish, ambitious 25-year-old man would stop and watch



IMPORTANT: Do not post content about gym motivation, nightclubs, flashy cars, loud music, or anything that looks cheap or loud. Our brand is quiet, elegant, and classy.



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- You have experience creating or repurposing Reels or TikTok videos

- You know how to use CapCut or similar editing app

- You understand what makes a video go viral

- You are consistent and reliable — 2 posts per day, every day, no excuses

- You have good English for captions and text overlays

- You understand men’s lifestyle content (not required to be an expert, but needs to “get it”)



---



PAY



- Fixed base pay every month (discuss in application)

- Bonus payment for every Reel that reaches over 100,000 views

- The more videos go viral, the more you earn



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send us:

1. 3 examples of Reels or TikToks you have made or remixed (links are fine)

2. One sentence explaining why you understand our brand audience

3. Confirm you can post 2 Reels per day consistently



Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: Systems Administrator
description:
Location: Fully Remote (Ph)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (with flexibility as needed for client impact events)



About T3 Tech Partners



T3 Tech Partners is the team MSPs rely on when challenges exceed Tier 2 or internal expertise. We operate as a Fractional Tier 3 partner, delivering advanced Microsoft 365, cloud, and security expertise to MSPs supporting diverse client environments.

Our engineers are trusted technical partners — leading implementations, resolving complex escalations, and working directly with MSP clients to execute real-world solutions.

________________________________________

Role Overview

We are seeking a senior-level Cloud Solutions Engineer (Level 3) to lead advanced Microsoft 365 and cloud initiatives, handle complex escalations, and implement solutions directly with MSP clients. This is a technical, customer-facing role — while not sales-focused, you will regularly work directly with customers to design and implement the solutions required to meet their business and technical needs.

This role requires strong technical depth, independence, and the ability to step into unfamiliar environments and software ecosystems with confidence.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Advanced Cloud & Escalation Support

• Handle advanced and expert-level escalations related to cloud infrastructure and SaaS services.

• Serve as a senior escalation point for Microsoft 365 and cloud-related issues across multiple MSP environments.

• Perform root-cause analysis and implement long-term remediation for complex or recurring issues.

• Work directly with MSP clients and end customers to execute solutions and improvements.



Microsoft 365 (Core Focus Area)

• Architect, deploy, optimize, and support Microsoft 365 environments end-to-end, including:

o Exchange Online (mail flow, security, migrations, troubleshooting)

o SharePoint Online and OneDrive (architecture, permissions, governance, performance, migrations)

o Microsoft Teams (policies, governance, troubleshooting)

• Perform and lead tenant-to-tenant migrations, including
, OneDrive, SharePoint, and Teams data.

• Execute server-to-cloud migrations, such as file servers to SharePoint or OneDrive.

• Expert-level administration and troubleshooting of:

o Microsoft Intune (endpoint management, compliance policies, configuration profiles, application deployment, Autopilot)

o Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) including identity lifecycle, SSO, MFA, and hybrid identity

o Conditional Access policy design and enforcement

o Microsoft Defender (Endpoint, Office 365, Identity)

o Microsoft Purview (data governance, retention, compliance, DLP)

• Implement and maintain Microsoft 365 security best practices across client tenants.

• Assist MSPs with tenant configuration, licensing strategy, and feature utilization.



Third-Party Application Integration

• Work with third-party software applications that integrate with Microsoft 365 
, identity, security, document management, line-of-business platforms).

• Support applications you may not have prior experience with, requiring:

o Willingness to learn new platforms quickly

o Ability to understand how third-party systems interact with Microsoft 365

o Troubleshooting authentication, permissions, data flow, and integration issues

• Collaborate with vendors and MSPs to ensure proper configuration and supportability.



Server and Infrastructure Support

• Administer and troubleshoot Windows Server environments, including Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy, and File Services.

• Manage and support virtualization platforms (e.g., Hyper-V, VMware) in on-premises and hybrid configurations.

• Perform server migrations, including lift-and-shift to Azure, P2V conversions, and workload transitions to cloud-hosted services.

• Support and maintain backup and disaster recovery solutions, ensuring recoverability for both on-premises and cloud workloads.

• Assist with decommissioning legacy on-premises infrastructure as part of cloud migration projects.



Projects, Optimization & Automation

• Lead cloud migration and optimization projects for MSP clients.

• Optimize Microsoft 365 environments for security, performance, and cost efficiency.

• Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Intune, and related administrative tasks.

• Recommend improvements, standards, and long-term strategies to MSP partners.

• Stay current on Microsoft 365 feature changes and emerging cloud technologies.

Availability & Support Expectations

• Standard working hours are 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST.

• Some flexibility is required for high-impact client issues, critical changes, or migrations outside normal hours.

• This role is not on-call, but responsiveness during critical events is expected.

________________________________________

Qualifications

Required Experience

• 5+ years of hands-on experience with cloud solutions in an MSP or multi-tenant environment.

• Expert-level proficiency in:

o Microsoft 365 (all major workloads and admin portals)

o Microsoft Intune

o Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)

o Conditional Access and MFA

o Microsoft Defender and Purview

• Strong experience with:

o Tenant-to-tenant Microsoft 365 migrations

o Server-to-cloud migrations (e.g., file servers to SharePoint/OneDrive)

o
 and data migrations

• Required experience with PowerShell for administration and automation.

• Experience with Google Workspace and cross-platform migrations.

• Expert-level understanding of SaaS security and cloud cost optimization.

• General knowledge of infrastructure and networking concepts.

• Proven experience working in MSP environments (required).

• Excellent native-level English communication skills, both written and verbal.

title: Content Coordinator
description:
JOB ANNOUNCEMENT



Advance Chiropractic and Performance



My name is Dr. Derek Huddleston. I’m a Chiropractic Sports Physician and I own a high-value, concierge, movement based wellness clinic called Advance Chiropractic and Performance. My mission is to keep 100,000 people out of surgery in Central Arkansas. In order to do that, I need help in building a solid marketing approach. My small team is looking for an A player for the Content Coordinator role! 



I need you to edit and schedule social content and help me develop a repeatable content execution system!



At its core, this is not a strategy role.  I’ll handle messaging direction but I want and need your input. Your job is to take what we discuss, ask questions for clarity and get it done.



READ THIS. IT MAY SAVE BOTH OF US TIME.



If your natural style is very cautious, slow to act, or requires a high level of structure before starting, this position will be frustrating for you.  If you’re someone who gets things done without making it complicated, this will be a good fit. 



If you’ve taken a DiSC assessment, include your results in your application.



This position requires someone who naturally moves fast, takes action, and adjusts as they go (typically Influence or Dominance styles).



If your
/application reads like it was written by AI, it will not be considered.



Application Process



Step 1:

Do not reply on onlinejobs.ph 

Check out the job announcement below

Step 2: You’ll receive the job description with steps to follow

Step 3: Test task w/ time limit



What you’ll do

Help me organize and execute a social content strategy, which includes a content pillar

Edit content using Edits and Instagram tools

Use Meta to schedule and manage content

Use AI tools for generating captivating social content and
s in my voice from a custom bot

Help launch content campaigns 
s, social, in-office)

Track your numbers associated with engaging content

Track your numbers associated with your Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Added bonus if you can use Canva to help re-brand PDFs and Lead Magnets



What success looks like

Content goes out on time with minimal touchpoints

We develop an organized way to streamline transfer of content and messaging 

We get more booked calls from people engaging with the content

You know the numbers associated with engaging content



What it’s like working with me

I move fast, I think out loud, I will change direction when needed

I don’t micromanage. If I trust you, I expect you to handle your role

I’m not going to hand you everything perfectly organized. We will need to talk through the process until we find a good solution

You’ll need to think a little and figure things out

If you need constant direction or slow pace, this won’t work

If you like moving and getting things done, you’ll be fine

I care about execution, not titles

At some point, you will be asked to do things outside of your job description. If you’re not okay with that, do not apply.



I’m looking for someone who

Moves fast and takes action without overthinking

Operates without needing constant direction

Asks clarifying questions, then executes

Looks for answers on their own

Communicates clearly and directly

Takes ownership of outcomes

Works hard and stays humble

Collaborates well within a team

Understands how to represent a high-value service

Has high English proficiency



This is NOT for you if

You need perfect instructions before starting

You overthink everything

You argue instead of trying to understand

You rely on credentials instead of results

You move slow because you want everything perfect



Tools you’ll use

GHL

Instagram / Meta

Edits

Canva

ChatGPT



Requirements

Must overlap with United States, Central Standard Time (CST)

English must be strong (written and verbal)

Go High Level experience at the level of being able to create and schedule
 campaigns.



If you’ve read through this and think you’d be a great Content Coordinator for our specific needs, please fill out this form and you’ll get the job description with more instructions.

title: Senior Business Analyst
description:
Senior Business Analyst

Indigenous Wealth

Remote (Philippines-based)

Business/Systems Analysts

Full time (Contract)



About the Role

* This is one of the most important hires we'll make this year. You'll report directly to the COO and work across the full breadth of the business, not in a silo.

* Indigenous Wealth is an Australian property investment consultancy that educates, empowers, and equips Indigenous Australians to build generational wealth through property investment. We're growing, and we need a Senior BA who can build the operational backbone to scale nationally.

* Our strategic framework is built on three pillars: Capability (can we deliver?), Growth (is it working commercially?), and Impact (are clients better off?). Your job is to make sure we can measure, track, and improve against all three, and that the processes, systems, and data underneath them actually work.

* This isn't a role where you write requirements documents and hand them off. You'll design first, then build, test, and implement, taking solutions from whiteboard through to working reality. You'll own things, shape how the business operates, and see the direct impact of your work every day.



What You'll Do

* Map and improve end-to-end business processes across every function (client engagement, relationships, property, contracts, settlement) so nothing falls through the cracks

* Design how work flows through each process, assess what applications are needed at each stage, and recommend whether additional workflow or document management systems are required

* Map the data the business needs across all its processes and ensure it is clean, connected, and trustworthy

* Evaluate, recommend, and build the dashboards and reporting that give leadership real-time visibility across our Capability, Growth, and Impact metrics

* Build and own company policies, procedures, and SOPs from the ground up

* Administer and optimise HubSpot CRM: workflows, automations, pipelines, and data quality. HubSpot is a core system in the business, so strong knowledge here means you add value from day one

* Design, build, and maintain an Intranet (SharePoint or equivalent) as the team's single source of truth, including document storage

*Act as the key internal contact for all technology and IT support matters, working with external vendors and help desks to resolve issues so the rest of the team can stay focused on their roles

* Work directly with the COO to continuously improve how the business operates



What You Bring

- Every item below matters. In your cover letter, address each one with a real example or honest reflection, not a generic sentence.

* Exceptionally capable and naturally humble. No ego. You let your work speak for itself.

* 4-6 years in business analysis or a similar role where you wore multiple hats. You've been resourceful, not just followed a playbook.

* Strong HubSpot CRM experience. You've built workflows, automations, dashboards, and reporting, not just used someone else's setup.

* Ability to evaluate dashboard and reporting tools and build within them, not just read what someone else has created.

* Ability to design, build, and maintain an Intranet (SharePoint or equivalent), including document storage.

* A track record of building processes and policies from scratch, in a business that didn't have them yet.

* Sharp analytical mind with communication skills to match. You see patterns, solve problems, and explain what you found clearly.

* Excellent written and spoken English. You'll communicate daily with senior leadership in Australia and need to be clear, concise, and confident.

* High professionalism. You'll work with the COO and the Founder, and you need to hold your own.

* Self-driven. You see gaps, flag them, and fix them without being told.



Nice to Have

* Don't tick every box? If you're sharp, curious, and back yourself, we still want to hear from you. Experience in property, financial services, or consulting is a plus. So is familiarity with tools like Xero, 
, Loom, or DocuSign. Experience working with Australian businesses is a bonus but not a requirement. Qualifications are a bonus, not a barrier.



Our Values

* These aren't words on a wall. They guide how we work and who we hire: Connection (lasting relationships), Integrity (clients' best interests, always), Accountability (do what we say), Action (do the work, not just talk about it), and Excellence (quality in everything).



Why This Role?

* You'll report directly to the COO. You'll have genuine influence. The environment is professional but not stuffy. We move fast, back each other, and don't hide behind corporate jargon. If you want a role where your work actually matters, this is it.

* This is a contract role, but you'll be treated as a core member of the team. Competitive salary commensurate with experience. Working hours: 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Manila Time (10:00 AM to 6:00 PM AEST). Flexibility to occasionally extend beyond core hours when the business needs it is appreciated.



How to Apply

** Submit your CV, a Cover Letter, and a short video introduction.

**Your cover letter is how we d
 who to interview. In it, specifically address:

   - Each item in "What You Bring" with real examples, not generic claims

   - How you approach your work across different levels, from surface-level reporting through to underlying data quality and process design

   - Describe your remote work setup, including how you ensure reliable connectivity and availability during Australian business hours



**Video: Record a 2-3 minute video (Loom or similar) introducing yourself and explaining why this role interests you.



Generic applications that don't address the above will not be considered.

title: Social Media Marketer (7 Figure Online Music Education Company)
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality

Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool

Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more

Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently

Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)

Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers

Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales

Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins

Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why

Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder

Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales

Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder

Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule

Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and

Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads

Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates

Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:



-Experience with content repurposing workflows — turning long-form content (video, podcast, blog) into social-native formats



-Background in
 marketing or digital funnels (understanding the broader customer journey matters here)



-Genuine enthusiasm for or knowledge of music — especially jazz or music education. Our audience is adult musicians, and understanding how they think, what they struggle with, and the language they use will make everything you do more effective



Compensation & Structure:



Type: Full-time, remote



Salary: $1,500/month (1,075,905 PHP/year)



13th Month Pay: paid out in December



End of year performance bonuses: paid out in December if applicable



Reports to: Founder



Support: You'll have access to a video editor for repurposing existing content, Founder guidance, and support from other tea
mbers when needed.



TO APPLY FILL OUT THIS SHORT APPLICATION:



(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION)

title: GoHighLevel Developer + Client Delivery Specialist (Part Time to Full Time)

JOB TITLE: GoHighLevel Developer + Client Delivery Specialist (Part Time to Full Time)



We are a fast-growing digital marketing and AI automation company (Viral Growth Media) looking for a senior GoHighLevel developer who can own client-facing builds from start to finish.



This is NOT a generic VA role. We need someone who lives inside GoHighLevel daily - building funnels, automating workflows, managing pipelines, and communicating directly with US-based clients. You will be the person our clients interact with for technical deliverables.



What You'll Do

- Design and deploy high-converting landing pages and sales funnels inside GHL

- Create advanced automation workflows for lead nurture, follow-up, reactivation, and customer lifecycle

, SMS, voi
 drops, and pipeline-triggered actions

, and direct API connections (Stripe, Twilio, etc.)

- Communicate directly with US-based clients via Loom walkthroughs, Zoom calls, and Slack

- Create SOPs and documentation for every system you build

- Design visually polished pages and interfaces - not just functional, but professional



Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)

description:
We’re looking for a high-level Conversion Funnel Specialist to help us build and optimize landing pages, advertorials, and sales funnels for a fast-growing ecommerce brand in the fitness niche.



This is not a “just design a page” role.



You will work directly with our ads team,
marketing, and social media team to ensure that we have high-converting landing pages to send our traffic, with the goal of increasing conversion rate and improving paid ads performance.



About us

We are a premium fitness brand focused on grip strength and forearm training equipment. We work with athletes, influencers, and a strong content engine, and now want to level up our funnel infrastructure. You can check out current website and pages at 
.



What You’ll Do:

- Help think out high-converting landing pages & advertorials

- Creative clean designs of these pages in Figma

- Collaborate with our ads team to align messaging and structure

- Optimize pages for conversion rate (CRO)

- Continuously test and improve based on performance data

- Build out the pages in Shopify or tools like Replo / Gempages



What we're looking for:

- Strong experience with direct response landing pages / advertorials

- Deep understanding of CRO principles

- Ability to think in funnels, not just pages

- Skilled in Figma

- Experience working with ecommerce brands

- Strong understanding of paid traffic (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

- Proactive and able to take ownership



Bonus points: if you have affinity with strength training and fitness (big bonus if you're also into grip strength and armwrestling).



How to apply:

- Send us your portfolio of landing pages you've built.

- Share some significants results you were able to achieve

- A short explanation of your approach to building out high converting pages

- Optional, but makes you stand out: a Loom/video breakdown of a funnel you've built out. Bonus points if you are able to show a template funnel that would relate to one of our products.



Potential performance based bonuses could be included in your compensation.

title: OPERATIONS ASSISTANT (SYSTEMS + CUSTOMER SUPPORT) — LONG TERM
description:
OPERATIONS ASSISTANT (SYSTEMS + CUSTOMER SUPPORT) — LONG TERM



ABOUT US



We are a pool service company based in California.



Our focus is simple:

Clear communication

Clean systems

Reliable service

We take pride in being organized, proactive, and easy to work with—both for our customers and internally as a team.

We run our business through structured systems:

Task tracking

Customer communication

Job tracking (repairs, service, follow-ups)

Billing

Internal trackers

We are not looking for a generic VA.

We are looking for someone who can think critically, stay organized, and help keep operations moving every day without constant oversight.



THE ROLE

This is an Operations Assistant role.

Your responsibility is to manage the day-to-day flow of work across our systems and continuously improve how those systems operate over time.



You are the person making sure:

Jobs are tracked correctly

Customers are communicated with

Technicians are supported

Nothing gets missed

This includes:

Tracking jobs from start to finish

Communicating with customers

Keeping systems accurate and up to date

Following up on open items

Making sure nothing falls through the cracks

Identifying inefficiencies and improving workflows

This is not just task completion.

Your role is to help keep the entire operation running smoothly and evolving.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Log all incoming work into a task tracker

Assign priority and follow tasks through to completion

Communicate with customers (text,
, CRM)

Send approvals and follow up until resolved

Maintain and update spreadsheets (repairs, filter cleans, onboarding, parts)

Track parts ordering, status, and delivery

Coordinate with technicians and ensure they have what they need

Act as the communication bridge between technicians and customers, ensuring clear information flow, accurate updates, and proper follow-through

Track jobs, parts, and progress across systems

Support billing (invoice checks, resends, follow-ups)

Scheduling exists, but this role is primarily about tracking, communication, and follow-through—not building routes.



SYSTEMS & IMPROVEMENT (IMPORTANT)



Once you understand our workflows, you will also be expected to:

Identify gaps or inefficiencies in our current systems

Suggest improvements to workflows, tracking, or communication

Help organize and refine task tracking and documentation

Improve how jobs, notes, and communication are tracked

Contribute to building cleaner, more scalable processes

We value people who can think beyond the current system and help improve it.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



You must be:

? Highly organized and detail-oriented

? A strong written communicator (clear, professional English)

? Comfortable working with systems and spreadsheets

? Able to follow processes AND think independently

? Reliable and consistent

? Able to identify problems and suggest improvements



IMPORTANT — HOW YOU THINK



We are specifically looking for someone who:

Does not stop at “I don’t know”

Looks for the next step or solution

Follows things through until they are resolved

Notices when something is stuck and takes action

Thinks about how to make systems better over time

If you wait for instructions for every step, this role is not a fit.



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (IMPORTANT)



You should have experience with at least one of the following:

CRM or job tracking systems (field service or similar is a plus)

Task or project management tools

Coordinating workflows or multi-step processes

Handling customer communication in a professional setting

You do not need to know our exact tools, but you must be comfortable learning quickly.



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



CRM / job tracking system (communication + job tracking)

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

Task tracker

Messaging tools (text,
)



PAY



Starting: $6–9 USD/hour

Based on experience and performance

We are willing to pay more for the right person who can take ownership and improve operations.

Long-term opportunity with growth for the right person.



HOW TO APPLY



Reply with the following:

A short introduction about yourself

Your experience managing workflows, tasks, or operations

Your experience with Google Sheets or similar tools

A brief example of a process or system you helped improve (if any)



REQUIRED QUESTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)



1. Customer Communication

A technician reports:

“Pump leaking at union. Needs replacement. Estimate $120.”

The customer asks:

“Do we really need to fix it now?”

? How would you respond to the customer?



2. Workflow Ownership

A job has been approved, but the technician hasn’t scheduled it and no updates have been made for 3 days.

? What steps would you take to move this forward?



3. Organization & Systems

You are managing 20+ open jobs at different stages.

? How would you keep everything organized and ensure nothing gets missed?



4. Systems Improvement

You notice that the same type of task keeps getting delayed or missed.

? What would you do to fix the issue long-term?



FILTER

Include the word:

POOL

in your application so we know you read the full post.

Applications without the keyword or incomplete answers will not be reviewed.



FINAL NOTE



We are looking for someone long-term who:

Thinks clearly

Communicates well

Takes ownership

Keeps work moving

Improves systems over time

If that sounds like you, we’d like to hear from you.



APPLICATION NOTE



Short, clear, and thoughtful answers are preferred. Generic or vague responses will not be considered.

title: Operations VA — Meta Ads + Go High Level
description:
IMPORTANT: Applications without the completed test task will be ignored. No exceptions. Instructions at the bottom.



We are a marketing agency that generates exclusive leads for contractors (roofing, renovation) in France and the Netherlands. We run paid ads on Meta 
/Instagram) and manage the full lead generation system for our clients through Go High Level.



We are growing fast. The founder handles sales and strategy. We need a reliable VA to own the operational and execution side — setting up accounts, uploading ads, managing campaigns, and keeping everything running smoothly.



This is not a creative or strategy role. You will follow SOPs and checklists. Your job is to execute fast and accurately.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Meta Ads Manager:

• Upload video and image creatives to Meta Ads Manager following a step-by-step SOP

• Duplicate campaigns and ad sets for new clients

• Set up new client ad accounts inside Meta Business Manager

• Organize and label creatives in the ad library



Go High Level (CRM):

• Create and configure new client sub-accounts from a setup checklist

• Connect pipelines, calendars, and automations from existing templates

• Verify that lead notifications, contracts, and onboarding forms are working correctly after setup



Creative Execution:

• Edit short-form video ads (15-60 seconds) in CapCut following a template

• Build static image ad variations from existing Canva templates

• Organize all creative assets in Google Drive with correct naming and labeling



REQUIREMENTS



• Hands-on experience inside Meta Ads Manager — uploading creatives, managing ad sets, navigating Business Manager

• Experience with Go High Level or a comparable CRM (sub-accounts, pipelines, automations)

• Proficient in CapCut or Premiere Pro for short-form video editing

• Follows SOPs exactly — no improvising, no skipping steps

• Communicates proactively — if something is unclear or blocked, you flag it immediately, you do not wait

• Available 20 hours/week minimum, flexible schedule

• Reliable internet connection



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience working inside a marketing or lead generation agency

• Has worked on ads in non-English markets (Dutch, French, or similar)

• Familiar with ElevenLabs or AI voiceover tools

• Understanding of direct response ad formats (hooks, CTAs, short-form structure)



COMPENSATION



• $
/month based on output and reliability

• Paid per deliverable — volume grows as the agency scales

• Payment via Wise/Bank transfer



TO APPLY

Complete the test task below. Applications without it will not be reviewed.



TEST TASK:



1. Log into Meta Ads Manager. Go to an existing campaign, open an ad set, and create a new ad (you do not need to publish it). Take a screenshot of the screen where you would upload a video creative — this is the screen inside the ad creation flow where you see the option to add media (image or video). The screenshot must show the ad creation interface, not the campaign list.



2. In 3-5 sentences, describe the last time you set something up inside Go High Level or a similar CRM — what did you configure and for what type of business?



3. Send both with your application.



ALSO INCLUDE:



1. A brief description of your Meta Ads Manager experience — what have you actually done inside it

2. Links to 1-2 short-form video ads you have edited (not brand content — ads that were run as paid advertisements)

3. Your available hours per week and timezone

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Node.js / AI-Native) – Healthcare Marketplace
description:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Node.js / AI-Native) – Healthcare Marketplace**



**Location:** 100% Remote (Philippines-based)  

**Schedule:** US Pacific Time (Overlapping hours required)  

**Reporting to:** Founder & Chief Medical Officer  



**The Mission**

We are not just building another app; we are disrupting how healthcare is priced and delivered. Led by a quadruple board-certified Neurologist, our flagship platform, **MedBid.ai**, is a high-stakes marketplace where medical providers bid for patient care in real-time. We are looking for a "Business-Logic First" engineer to lead the full-scale deployment and technical hardening of this ecosystem.



**The Tech Stack**

* **Backend:** Node.js / Express (High-performance, low-latency bidding logic).

* **Frontend:** Modern React / TypeScript.

* **Environment:** GitHub-centric workflow with **Cursor** (AI-augmented development).

* **Compliance:** HIPAA 2026 Security Standards (Data-at-rest encryption, MFA, and audit logging).

* **Deployment:** Netlify / AWS.



**What You’ll Do**

* **Marketplace Architecture:** Optimize the real-time bidding engine to handle sub-second latency for provider notifications.

* **Security & Compliance:** Implement and maintain the latest 2026 HIPAA standards to ensure absolute patient data privacy.

* **AI Integration:** Leverage AI-native coding tools (Cursor) to maintain a high-velocity feature release cycle.

* **Collaborative Growth:** Work directly with the Founder to translate clinical needs into technical features for MedBid and our sister platform, NeuroJyoti.

What You’ll Build:

Patient case submission system (structured intake)

Provider bidding engine (real-time updates)

Dashboard for providers and patients

Notification system (bid alerts, updates)

API integrations (payments, messaging)



**Requirements**

* **5+ Years** in Full-Stack development (Node.js/React).

* **Proven Experience** with marketplace logic or real-time transactional systems.

* **Security Mindset:** Familiarity with HIPAA, SOC2, or similar healthcare regulatory frameworks.

* **Communication:** Exceptional English—you must be comfortable explaining technical trade-offs to a non-technical medical board.

Self-Starter:** You prefer value a stable, long-term professional home.



Include a 2-minute Loom explaining a system you built



**Compensation & 2026 Benefits**

* **Competitive Salary:** Paid in USD or PHP equivalent (Niche premium for healthcare/security experience).

* **13th & 14th Month Pay:** Standard and performance-based bonuses.

* **Work-Life Balance:** Fixed weekends off and a culture that values clinical precision over "crunch mode."

title: Credit Repair
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant (VA) to support daily operations for a growing credit repair business. The ideal candidate has experience in credit repair processes, client communication, and is proficient in tools such as DisputeFox and MyFreeScoreNow. This role also benefits from someone who can help manage CRM systems and leverage AI tools to improve efficiency and client experience.



Key Responsibilities:



* Manage client onboarding process (collect documents, agreements, and credit reports)

* Analyze credit reports and identify negative items, inaccuracies, and opportunities for improvement

* Prepare and submit dispute letters using DisputeFox

* Monitor dispute progress and update client files accordingly

* Access and review credit reports via MyFreeScoreNow

* Maintain accurate records of disputes, updates, and client progress

* Communicate with clients via text,
, or CRM regarding updates and next steps

* Send follow-ups, reminders, and status updates to clients

* Assist with scheduling consultations and managing calendar

* Handle basic customer service inquiries in a professional and timely manner

* Upload and organize client documents in CRM or cloud storage

* Assist with administrative tasks as needed



CRM & Automation Responsibilities (Preferred):



* Manage and maintain GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM system

* Build and optimize pipelines, workflows, and automations

* Set up and manage
/SMS campaigns for client follow-ups

* Create landing pages, forms, and funnels within GHL

* Track leads and ensure proper tagging, segmentation, and follow-up

* Integrate third-party tools and improve system efficiency



AI & Efficiency (Preferred):



* Utilize AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT or similar) to streamline communication, dispute drafting, and follow-ups

* Assist in creating automated responses, templates, and content

* Identify opportunities to automate repetitive tasks and improve workflow efficiency



Required Skills & Qualifications:



* Proven experience in credit repair or related field (preferred)

* Proficiency in DisputeFox (required)

* Proficiency in MyFreeScoreNow (required)

* Strong understanding of credit reporting, dispute process, and credit bureaus

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* High attention to detail and accuracy

* Ability to manage multiple clients and tasks efficiently

* Strong time management and organizational skills

* Familiarity with CRMs and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

* Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information



Preferred Qualifications:



* Experience managing GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM

* Experience with AI tools and automation

* Knowledge of Metro 2 compliance (a plus)

* Experience working with credit repair companies or financial services



Work Expectations:



* Availability during business hours (or agreed schedule)

* Quick response time and consistent communication

* Ability to meet deadlines and maintain workflow consistency

* Willingness to learn and adapt to company processes



Compensation:

Based on experience (Hourly or Per Client)



How to Apply:

Please submit your experience, tools you’ve worked with (especially DisputeFox, MyFreeScoreNow, and GoHighLevel), and any relevant background in credit repair and automation.
