 subscribers, 

15+ clients/month, $25K-$40K revenue. You're earning $1,200-$1,400 

with bonuses.



Month 12: 40,000+ subscribers, $50K+/month, you're at $1,500-$2,000 

with bonuses and revenue share.



If we hit these, you grow with us. If we don't, we figure out why 

together.



???????????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU GET FROM US



- Clear SOPs and documented processes (not guess work)

- Direct access to the founder via Slack (not a middleman)

- Full training on our research workflows and brand voice

- Paid subscriptions to all tools you need (Canva Pro, 

  ChatGPT Plus, SEO tools, etc.)

- 13th month salary + annual performance review with raise

- Paid leave: 12 days/year after 3 months

- Professional development budget: $500/year for courses, 

  books, certifications



???????????????????????????????????????????????



HOW TO APPLY



Applications that skip any step will be ignored. We read 

everything carefully. Do the same.



STEP 1 — SUBJECT LINE

Use this exact format:

"1945-OPS Application — [Your Name] — [Yrs Shopify / Yrs SEO]"

Example: "1945-OPS Application — Maria Dela Cruz — 4 Shopify / 2 SEO"



STEP 2 — LOOM VIDEO (5-7 minutes)

Record a Loom video covering:

(a) Your name, location, current workload

(b) ONE Shopify store you've managed — share the URL and 

    specific results you drove (traffic, conversion, revenue)

(c) ONE SEO win you're proud of — keyword, ranking, 

    timeframe, traffic impact

(d) ONE automation you built — walk us through the workflow 

    and the
 it saved

(e) Your first three observations visiting 
 — 

    what would you fix in the first week?



STEP 3 — WRITTEN RESPONSES (keep each answer under 150 words)



Q1: A $997 customer just submitted their intake form. Walk me 

through the EXACT workflow from submission to Day 1 of research. 

What tools, what
s, what timing?



Q2: Our blog has 0 SEO traffic. You have 30 days and $0 budget 

for links. What do you focus on first, second, third?



Q3: Our niche is emotionally sensitive (Holocaust descendants). 

How does this change your approach to content and social media 

vs. a regular eCommerce brand?



Q4: Describe a time you pushed back on a founder's idea because 

you thought it would hurt the business. What happened?



STEP 4 — PORTFOLIO

Links to 2-3 Shopify stores you've worked on, with one sentence 

each describing your specific contribution (not "managed the 

store" — tell me what YOU did).



If possible, include:

- One blog article you wrote that ranks

- One
 sequence you built

- One automation workflow you designed



STEP 5 — AVAILABILITY

Confirm:

- Start date

- 8 hrs/day, 5 days/week minimum

- No other competing clients

- 6-month minimum commitment



???????????????????????????????????????????????



SCREENING PROCESS



Week 1: Application review (5 business days)

Week 2: 30-minute video interview with Matan

Week 3: PAID 5-day trial at full day-rate ($40/day)

Week 4: Offer to the best candidate, 30-day probation begins



During the paid trial, you'll work on real tasks:

- Day 1: Full site audit + recommendations doc

- Day 2: Shopify product description rewrites (3 products)

- Day 3: Blog post outline + first 500 words

- Day 4: Automation workflow design in Zapier

- Day 5: Social content calendar for the following week



You get paid for the trial regardless of whether we move 

forward.



???????????????????????????????????????????????



A FEW THINGS TO KNOW BEFORE YOU APPLY



???? This niche is emotionally heavy. If Holocaust-related 

   content is difficult for you personally, please don't apply. 

   That's a valid personal boundary, and we respect it.



???? We do NOT use AI-generated "historical" content or fake 

   archive images. If you like cutting corners with AI to fake 

   authenticity, this is not the place.



???? We pay on time, every time, via Wise or PayPal. We expect 

   the same professionalism in return.



???? We are hiring ONE person. If you can't commit fully, please 

   don't apply — it's a waste of your time and ours.



???? If you're already managing 5 other clients and "have 

   bandwidth for one more," please don't apply. We want someone 

   whose primary focus is us.



???????????????????????????????????????????????



Ready? Take 60-90 minutes. Do it right. We'll notice.



— Matan Leker, Esq.

   Founder, 1945 The Story

title: Xero Payroll Management & Set up
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a qualified UK Bookkeeper with expertise in Xero payroll to manage payroll operations across our growing portfolio of client companies. This is a recurring monthly position focused on payroll processing, HMRC submissions, and accurate reporting.

We manage all payrolls on Xero payroll currently, so it is imperative that you are familiar with Xero payroll system, as well as the normal HMRC submissions for UK payroll.

This would include full payroll management and reporting all pay runs and additional submissions to the lead accountant for the client. 

This is expected to be completed in good time (10-14 days prior to HMRC deadlines), for the NI, RTI and other submissions to be completed as early as possible. With payroll itself, completed in good time for the client to make payments. 

Exact dates will be provided for each client. 



Position Type: Remote, Fixed Salary, Part-Time

Hours: 8-10 hours per month (concentrated at month-end)

Growth Potential: Scope to develop into broader part-time bookkeeping role



Key Responsibilities:

Process monthly pay runs and calculate employee deductions

Manage National Insurance contributions and RTI submissions to HMRC, in good timing, prior to deadlines.

Prepare and file P11/P45 documentation

Reconcile payroll accounts and generate month-end reports

Ensure compliance with HMRC regulations and deadlines

Liaise with lead accountants on payroll-related issues



Essential Requirements:

Qualified UK Bookkeeper (AAT, IAB, or equivalent)

2+ years' experience managing payroll in Xero

Strong knowledge of UK HMRC processes and RTI submissions

Meticulous attention to detail – accuracy is critical

Reliable and organised – ability to meet tight deadlines

UK Tax Year knowledge – tax codes, thresholds, and allowances



Desirable Experience:

Multi-company payroll management

Pension administration and auto-enrolment

Statutory payments (sick pay, maternity pay, etc.)

HMRC error corrections and queries



What We're Looking For:

A detail-oriented professional who takes pride in accuracy, understands the importance of HMRC deadlines, and has growth ambitions. As we expand our client base, this role will evolve with scope for broader bookkeeping responsibilities.



Working Arrangements:

Flexible hours worked to suit payroll deadlines

Current portfolio: ~30 employees across multiple clients (growing)

Specific deadlines provided for each client



How to Apply - Please submit:

CV detailing payroll and bookkeeping experience

Evidence of UK bookkeeping qualification

References demonstrating payroll expertise

Brief cover letter



We are a growing professional firm providing comprehensive accounting and bookkeeping services to businesses across multiple sectors. We value accuracy, reliability, and professional service.

title: Creative Graphic & Brand Designer – Fast-Growing US Team (Full-Time Hours Available!)
description:
Creative Graphic & Brand Designer – Fast-Growing US Team (Full-Time Hours Available!)



Company: STX Promo | 
 



Location: Remote (Philippines-based) Work Hours: U.S. Day Shift (Flexible, see below!) 



Pay: $6.00/hour 





About STX Promo & Our Explosive Growth:



STX Promo helps businesses and organizations "Step Up Their Setup" with eye-catching custom canopies, table covers, flags, banners, tradeshow setups and more.



We are growing at a massive pace. To give you an idea: we hired a two new graphic designers about 6 weeks ago, and our order volume is so high that we already need to hire another one! 



Bottom line: If you are hungry for work and want consistent, reliable hours, we have as much work as you can handle.





About the Role: Your Impact:



We need a visionary Graphic Designer who is highly creative, technically precise, and savvy with the latest AI design tools.

At STX Promo, we don’t just print logos; we help brands stand out at their biggest events. We need a designer with a "good eye" for premium aesthetics who can take a client's rough idea and turn it into a high-impact display.





Key Responsibilities:



Creative Layouts: Develop eye-catching, professional layouts for canopies, banners, flags, table covers, and apparel.



Ad Creative: Generate high-converting static image ads for Meta 
/Instagram) and Google.



Vector Excellence: Recreate logos into clean, high-quality vector files. (Note: We use Vector AI tools to speed this up, but you must have the manual Adobe Illustrator skills to clean up and perfect the final output).



AI Integration: Use tools like Nano Banana, Midjourney, etc., to generate and edit high-quality visual assets. You should be comfortable with prompt engineering.



Print Readiness: Ensure all files are technically perfect and formatted correctly for large-format printing.



Team Sync: Collaborate daily with our Sales and Production Coordinators via ClickUp,
, and WhatsApp.





You're a Great Fit If You Have:



A Creative Eye: You understand layout, typography, and color; you know how to make a design look "expensive" and professional.



Software Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop.



Vector Skills: Ability to manually recreate almost any logo from a low-quality image into a crisp vector when AI tools fall short.



AI Savvy: Experience using AI design tools and the ability to write effective prompts.



Fluent English: Excellent communication skills to coordinate with our US-based team.





How to Apply (Please Read Carefully):



To show us you’re the right fit, please submit the following. Applications missing a portfolio will be immediately deleted.



Your Portfolio: You MUST include examples of:



Your best creative layouts/marketing designs.



Static image ads (Social Media/Google).



Before & After examples of your vector conversions.



A short written note answering these two questions:



Briefly describe your experience preparing files for large-format printing or apparel.



Are you comfortable working U.S. Daytime hours?



(Note: If your portfolio blows us away, Step 2 of our interview process will be to submit a quick 2-minute video or voice intro so we can get to know you better!)



We look forward to reviewing your portfolio and finding the next creative powerhouse for our team!

title: WEBSITE DEVELOPER
description:
?? Build the Future of Search: Web Designer & SEO Growth Lead

Role: AI-Enhanced Web Design & SEO Expert

Status: Hourly Consultation ? Long-term Partnership

Location: Remote (U.S. EST Hours)



We aren’t looking for someone to just build "pretty" websites. We are looking for a Growth Architect. At Chromex Tools, we build high-speed, conversion-ready machines designed to dominate search rankings. We need a technical powerhouse who lives at the intersection of creative design, aggressive SEO, and AI-driven efficiency. If you know how to make a site load in milliseconds and rank on page one, we want you on the team..



?? What You’ll Do

You’ll have the keys to the engine. Your mission is to build, optimize, and scale:

Next-Gen Development: Build lightning-fast, responsive sites with flawless backend logic (GTM, GA4, redirects, and custom integrations).

AI-Powered Workflow: Use the latest AI tools to 10x your output without ever sacrificing premium quality.

SEO Dominance: Architect on-page strategies and sophisticated backlink campaigns. You don't just "get links"—you understand the why and where behind domain authority.

Performance Tuning: Hunt down speed bottlenecks and technical debt to ensure top-tier Core Web Vitals.



?? Who You Are

The Hybrid: You’re a designer who thinks like a developer and breathes like an SEO.

The Link Strategist: You have a deep understanding of the backlink ecosystem (paid and organic) and can provide high-level guidance on placement and sourcing.

Data-Obsessed: You don’t guess. You use GA4 and user behavior data to iterate and win.

Reliable & Driven: You are comfortable working U.S. EST hours and are focused on delivering measurable results.





??The Opportunity

Competitive Compensation: We pay for expertise. Salary is open for discussion based on your proven track record.

Evolution: Start as a high-impact consultant with a clear path to a consistent, long-term role.

Cutting-Edge Stack: Work with a team that embraces AI and modern automation.





?? HOW TO APPLY

We value experts who respect the process. If you have a portfolio of sites that rank and convert, we want to see it.

 your application,  portfolio and video introduction  to:









[!IMPORTANT]

No DMs: To ensure your application is tracked and reviewed by the right people, please use the
 above. DMs will not be monitored.

Note: This role requires active availability during U.S. hours and uses standard performance monitoring to ensure project milestones are met.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Sales-Focused Virtual Assistant (Strong Closer with Admin Skills) – U.S.

Cleaning Business

We are hiring a Sales-Oriented Virtual Assistant who knows how to confidently handle

objections and close deals over the phone. You’ll be the first point of contact for leads

interested in our U.S.-based cleaning services, and your main goal is to convert those inquiries

into paying customers.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in sales conversations, knows how to build trust

quickly, and doesn’t shy away from tough questions or hesitations from prospects.

Key Responsibilities:

? Take inbound sales calls from interested leads, catch up list of leads,  and follow up with outbound calls when

needed

? Confidently pitch our services and walk customers through pricing and packages

? Handle common objections (pricing, scheduling, trust concerns) with professionalism

and ease

? Convert warm leads into scheduled jobs with a consistent close rate

? Manage CRM updates, lead tracking, and post-call notes

? Assist with scheduling, follow-up
s, and basic administrative tasks

? Maintain excellent customer service before, during, and after the sale

What We're Looking For:

? Fluent in English with strong conversational skills

? Proven ability to overcome objections and close sales on calls

? Comfortable talking to U.S. customers and building rapport quickly

? Detail-oriented with solid administrative follow-through

? Able to work independently and take initiative without constant supervision

? Experience with cleaning or home services (preferred but not required)

Technical Requirements:

? Minimum 30 Mbps wired Internet connection



? Quiet, professional work environment with no background noise

? Backup Internet and device for emergencies

Compensation & Hours:

? $5–$5.50 per hour (depending on experience)

? Full-time role

? Must be available during U.S. business hours (Eastern or Pacific time)

To Apply:

Submit a short written and video message describing your experience with handling objections

and closing sales over the phone. Real examples or metrics from past roles are a plus.
